clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: We are going to save this Country Friend, I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for President of the United States. It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT! I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST Official 2024 Donor List TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend. Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down. Can I count on you at this critical time? Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Thoughts on the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Did you see AOC’s recent interview with The Intercept?
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221117-3625-header&t=1&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)
In light of the news that Democrats no longer control the House of Representatives, we thought we’d share some of Alexandria’s recent insights into what we can learn from the midterm outcomes.
Alexandria shared her thoughts with _The Intercept_ , which we summarize below (read the full article [here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15225?t=2&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)).
**1\. We must avoid rehashing Republican narratives.**
The choice among certain Democrats to validate and amplify Republican narratives on crime and policing actually ended up hurting them. The races where candidates were able to effectively center their narratives – whether that was abortion rights, saving democracy, or other key priorities – were better off.
For example, Democrats in New York ran ads around crime that only served to reinforce and amplify the Republican narratives on crime and policing. **If we’re going to talk about public safety, we must talk about it in the frame of what we’ve done on gun violence – including passing the first gun reform bill in 30 years.** Our alternatives are actually electorally effective _without_ having to lean on Republican narratives.
**2\. “If Democrats do not hang onto the House, I think that responsibility falls squarely on New York state.”**
Cuomo may be gone, but much of his infrastructure and political machinery is still running in New York state.
This machinery relies on lobbyists and big money and undercuts grassroots and state-level organizing. This leaves a void for Republicans to walk into. Last year, Republicans put millions of dollars into defeating the redistricting ballot measure that would have protected the NY congressional map, which would have put Democrats ahead. But New York State Democratic Party Committee Chair Jay Jacobs didn’t drop $1 to make sure that we got the redistricting ballot measure passed.
It’s very clear that the New York State Democratic Party has created an environment where the only “legitimate Democratic candidates” worthy of support are those who fight both progressives and Republicans, which is clearly not a winning strategy, especially not in the state of New York.
**3\. We need to be looking at donor bases.**
We shouldn’t be shifting in a direction where our party leadership becomes even more dependent on large donors and corporate backers, especially in a time when more Democrats are being elected independent of that, and when the infrastructure for small-dollar fundraising has only grown and become more vibrant. ([**You’re part of that and we appreciate all of your contributions.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221117.rTfItu&refcode=em20221117-3625-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)**)**
**4\. Youth won the election.**
The role of young people in this election cannot be understated. According to the Edison Research National Election Pool exit poll, the national youth vote choice for the U.S. House of Representatives was 63% for Democrats, 35% for Republicans.
By 2024, Millennials and Gen Z voters will outnumber voters who are Baby Boomers and older, 45%-25%. We are beginning to see the political impacts of that generational shift.
Being outwardly antagonistic towards a very enthused young progressive base is not a winning strategy.
**So, what’s next?**
In response to the election, Alexandria joined more than 600 New York state elected officials, organizations, and community leaders in formally calling for a change in New York Democratic leadership.1
If we’re going to thrive after this election, we need to clean things up from the very top and activate communities across the state. We know New York can and will do better, together.
Nationally, we have a lot to reckon with as well — from Latino voters increasingly trending toward Republicans to how we plan to combat rampant disinformation. Stay tuned for future emails on these topics.
Thanks for listening.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
Alexandria relies exclusively on grassroots donations to fund her campaign and we're proud to be the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress.
[If you can, please consider making a $3 donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221117.rTfItu&refcode=em20221117-3625-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221117.rTfItu&refcode=em20221117-3625-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)**
1 - [New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/15227?t=6&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221117?refcode=em20221117-3625-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&t=7&refcode2=3625_2526796_S4dCvB&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221117-3625-P_OTH_EXP_MIS&t=8&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=9&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=10&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=11&akid=3625%2E2526796%2ES4dCvB)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Peter, I'd like to meet with you
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=1) Peter -- Thank you for joining our important fight to **expand freedom and reduce government control**. We did not experience a Red Wave like many of us were expecting. Instead, Democrats took full control of Minnesota’s government. Which means we have a BIG FIGHT ahead of us, and we need to be ready to take on the Radical Left in January. **Especially if they are going to mandate the COVID vaccine for our children to attend schools!**

The Political Class has fought against us from Day One, but we are capable of beating them and protecting your liberty. After all, we Ended Walz' Emergency Powers back in 2021 and Tim Walz himself was forced to sign the bill! We've got our work cut out for us in 2023. And we're going to tell you what needs to be done. Your support means the world to me, which is why I want to meet with you in person on December 8th to discuss our upcoming battles. **Join me and hundreds of other patriots at our End-of-Year Christmas Event on****Thursday,** **December 8th****at the Mermaid in Mounds View.** We have a fun event featuring newly elected Senator Nathan Wesenberg, and a SPECIAL GUEST we will be announcing soon!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=2) Plus, we're **giving away a non-Biden approved AR-15** and a bunch of other guns. No raffles - just buy a ticket for dinner and you are automatically entered to win! Tickets are $60 per person, or $120 for a couple. We have special kids rates as well. **Want to make a bigger impact??? Reserve a table for $1,000 and invite 7 friends to hear our important message.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=3 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=3)
---
I'm excited to meet with you on December 8th and introduce you to our leadership team and our growing team of young liberty professionals.
Nothing could trigger the left more than knowing you spent a night with a bunch of conservatives and also walked away with an AR-15!
Please join us for an action packed night. Register now, which includes dinner, for $60. Or get a sponsor table for you and seven other guests at $1,000 and help the cause even more!
## **WHEN: Thursday, Dec 8th (Doors open at 5:00pm)**
## **WHERE: The Mermaid, Mounds View**
## **[YES, I WANT TO REGISTER FOR THIS AWESOME EVENT AND ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN AN AR-15](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=4)**
[No, I'll be attending Tim Walz' lecture on vaccinations for students](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRao148016fC4lg3OIZVyNaP&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=5)
See you on Dec 8th!

Jake Duesenberg
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=6)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=7)[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=8)
-=-=- Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2022_1&n=10). -=-=-

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Hundreds of billions of $$
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
As chair of our Progressive Caucus, it’s my job to make sure our progressive agenda is front and center. For the last 2 years, I have fought nonstop alongside our caucus for the lifesaving policies that will actually address the crises we’re facing.
**And it paid off, because we won – we won BIG.** I’m talking about hundreds of billions of dollars for climate action, infrastructure, gun reform, veterans’ services, and more. Every single one of us will benefit from Democrats’ historic wins this year.
**I’m proud to say that we delivered for working families – and even with a small GOP majority, we’re not going to stop. With the Presidency, the Senate, and the pull of progressives, we’ll keep delivering for Americans.**
[**So, Peter – will you help me out with a contribution today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23179?refcode=em20221117-1855&t=1&akid=1855%2E420207%2E5dS1TQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23179?refcode=em20221117-1855&t=20&akid=1855%2E420207%2E5dS1TQ)**
Despite starting the term with an unprecedented act of political violence on our nation’s Capitol, we remained undeterred. Let me remind you what Democrats have achieved since then:
🚑 **American Rescue Act** to help families & businesses during the pandemic
🪖 **PACT Act** to guarantee veterans critical healthcare services
⚖️ **First major gun reform** legislation in decades to protect each other
🏗 **Historic investment in infrastructure** to rehabilitate our communities
🌎 **Unprecedented legislation** to invest in our climate, environment, and people
💸 **Canceled tens of thousands of dollars** of student debt for millions of Americans
🌱 **Rescheduled cannabis** and expunged records for millions of Americans
Even with a GOP majority in the House, we’re not going to stop. We’re going to use our Senate majority, the Presidency, and the power of progressives in the House to continue to fight for our climate, protect reproductive rights, maintain democracy, raise the minimum wage, and pass more of the overwhelmingly popular policies we need.
[**I’m asking for your support because it really matters, Peter. So, can I count on your $3 donation?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23179?refcode=em20221117-1855&t=21&akid=1855%2E420207%2E5dS1TQ)
As always, thank you for supporting me in this fight.
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221117-1855-footer&t=22&refcode2=1855_420207_5dS1TQ&akid=1855%2E420207%2E5dS1TQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1855%2E420207%2E5dS1TQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1855%2E420207%2E5dS1TQ)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: don't have to scare you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- I don't know about you, but Trump just can't surprise me anymore. He's shown us time and time again who he really is -- and we believe him. It's not every week that the worst president in American history announces he's running for president _again_. We must ensure that he not only loses, but gets the prosecution and punishment he deserves. [](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=2) **> > [See my reaction.](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=3)** Hear me loud and clear: Our plan to keep him out of the White House and defeat the forces that have gotten us to this point starts right NOW. Country First was behind huge MAGA losses in both the primaries and general election, and we'll do it again.

**My promise to you: Trump is NOT going to like what we have planned.** It’s absolutely critical we put on a MASSIVE show of strength against him. So I’m calling for a MASSIVE response – 24,000 gifts before the end of the week – to pull off one of our strongest fundraising days in history and show Trump and his disciples that we will never allow him anywhere near the White House again. Can I count on your immediate [financial](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=4) or [volunteer](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=5) investment in Country First to overshadow Trump’s announcement and make his plans to run for President completely backfire? No kidding, even a gift of $1 adds up to a massive impact. Let me make this perfectly clear:
* We watched Trump rally insurrectionists in our Capitol.
* We watched Trump trash our democracy and spread lies, hate, and division.
* We watched Trump embarrass our country on the world stage.
* We watched Trump abuse our patriotism and con his followers.

And now, the worst president we've ever had has the gall to announce another run for the Presidency? Nope. Not gonna happen. I will do everything I possibly can to stop him from waltzing back into the White House. [** _But I can't do it alone._**](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=6) **Can I count on your support in this defining moment in our nation's history?** ** >> [Invest $5 now](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=7)** ** >> [Invest $15 now](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=8)** ** >> [Invest $25 now](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=9)** ** >> [Invest $100 now](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=10)** ** >> [Invest any other amount now](https://www.country1st.com/trump_stain?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=11)** ** >> [Invest with a purchase from our shop](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=12)** ** >> [Invest your time as a Volunteer](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=13)** Country First,

Adam | [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=14 "Wear Your Values") [Wear Your Values](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dJRvzSZalRTZC0Qwm1nuRI-rk5pyYwx3MVaObW7hk1A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trumprun_nd&n=14)

clean_body: HELP: Don’t give Pelosi the credit card! | | | | | Friend, The radical Biden agenda could still be forced down our throats for another year. Here’s how... Now that Congress has passed a short-term continuing resolution (CR) expiring in December to appropriate money for the federal government, another spending fight will come right before Christmas. In December, Pelosi and Schumer could pass one last omnibus spending bill to fund their left wing priorities until October 2023. After the November elections, the new Congress won’t be sworn in until January. So a December spending bill would allow Schumer and Pelosi to fund Joe Biden’s failed agenda for a third year —even after voters reject it! That’s why Heritage Action is FIGHTING BACK against this bill, just like we’ve successfully fought back against Biden’s agenda across the country. Throughout 2021 and 2022, we’ve consistently STOPPED Biden’s most radical priorities with Key Votes in Congress. Now, we have a chance to STOP this omnibus and DEFUND the rest of Biden’s radical agenda in 2023.But we can’t do it without you. | | | | Friend, if Pelosi and Schumer lose their majorities, they’ll be a lame duck Congress – voted out by the people – and we can’t let a lame duck Congress decide America’s future. The Pelosi-Schumer omnibus would totally ignore the will of the American people and keep Biden’s MOST unpopular policies in place: Title IX changes will go into effect The IRS’ ranks will be doubled Open border policies will persist You won’t let this happen, right? | | Friend, blocking the Pelosi-Schumer omnibus is CRITICAL for America’s future. That’s why we’re putting all of our influence into STOPPING this bill, by keeping Congress accountable to YOU. If conservatives in Congress stand up to this bill, we can DEFUND the ENTIRE BIDEN AGENDA next year. But our work – stopping this omnibus, fighting back against the Left’s ESG agenda, blocking Biden’s priorities, and everything in between –**is only possible because of grassroots supporters like you. Friend, conservatives should NOT let the Democrats force through an agenda that Americans voted to stop. Housing and health care costs are higher than they’ve EVER been.

A fourth stimulus check would provide desperately needed relief to America’s seniors.

**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | Folks – many American seniors can’t afford their bills right now. Housing and health care costs are higher than they’ve EVER been. A fourth stimulus check would provide desperately needed relief to America’s seniors. | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899719:J-9fy1GJN:m:1:3253819041:62C544FE1796472F9B1D6094488B985A:r)**

[TeamHerschel.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899719:J-9fy1GJN:m:1:3253819041:62C544FE1796472F9B1D6094488B985A:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899719:J-9fy1GJN:m:1:3253819041:62C544FE1796472F9B1D6094488B985A:r)**

name: American Defense News
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi86bjkmos1r7ihdeqcqma0u8ulia6eujcddneb8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj7cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlo1f3at6md7vc8fvi9htin9rkd0ehrajuvjl0no_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj7cth2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmji63o8hbpirfoc8qsd3j3ucsmrtfns21ris16g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcdedoufh1nqbge4duv22tg3nhoipr0kcp5r4qao_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zje5hrapamfkb6ld3laa01s31igvnccte9571n2o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56g3f3mhrrrkcttlocng1e5q0lvd6vq07njode0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvv0jjunqb244e83goefad92prt92l4jpos4d2g0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrkuc6o19hvdqe3j9kb208uljrif7qsp7g7ltj4o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvf3gui3jsvn26kucip8edbcdgfcb5ps27ejh510_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziuhaslhkj85g4tmt4tsqrm0797kq02lsv2q3fm0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze15g2m1jh7gavshgop56aisjcd7v0le97fs3308_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrf3mqksuco2211ds7gfqgaq7u0m8f6nsvmt8on0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj2c3h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zks1kutrojbhe0t2fc16r94sk4g0ff891i73imto_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc3qebbm778h4n6h12gb47e0am870difi3isvhao_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjpsr6eavrq84gp1gac95n1d3g2g5acfrrov8pl0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z363kgto55nie9h9kihglr6vika32lvnd16ig868_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za7731nkssmbinrmt30dsm2n6bplcihvhjimlor8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhgkapbci2paisgl83cohqe9b94osf1vpa606rq0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z80rbhf7bp97udpmhdlh0eh1s93q5gp8bgo5r008_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl9n7podvlt6direg7cu9ps9471m27tkuetv0mf0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbroccd8ovimvvd8avpc0gpo9puuit9hisi00o1o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z80fn7mk7bad1rbfdnojao87ske8hca4usvh275o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zq09agcpk5nqjnqbb5hu6og023vqbilce4kdlpt8).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z008d2qb83luefg8lq8b41h06ca3s10bh9ub93jo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9pj0cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsse0rrii6dta71fft41360vgckvmbfsp54eecj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj7c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0fk6el6qj5jhgu1sve7easovr2mgiu7j8k2nn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj7c9h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Taking Out a Terrorist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
There was this really bad guy - a terrorist who was responsible for the deaths of over 600 Americans.

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z386vnbugm872cbr7ait6pt36l6lhre40fook4l0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj4s9h2bs)
---

There was this really bad guy - **a terrorist who was responsible for the deaths of over _600_ Americans.**

Some of them were from Florida, some of them were from Kansas, and some of them were my friends. Maybe some of them were yours. He harmed hundreds and hundreds more.

**This terrorist was continuing to plot against America._We could see it._**

He traveled from Lebanon to Syria, and then to Iraq to plot with terrorist groups to murder Americans.

But just before he could leave Baghdad's airport, we executed a strike that ended the life of this notorious terrorist - **Qasem Soleimani.**

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7jic2dvkst29npgta0klm7m8dp7m511coiuhbng_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj4s9h2bs)
---

The assassination of Soleimani struck a blow to Iran that they still have not fully recovered from to this day. **But thanks to Joe Biden, the Iranian regime is rebounding.**

Iran is now flush with cash because Biden stopped enforcing the sanctions we imposed on them in the Trump Administration.

**We cannot allow the Biden Administration to continue aiding the Iranian regime one second longer.**

---

That is why I'm asking you to **_[help me in my fight against Iran with a contribution today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr5p9nsf33s2j5jdp95t2i62ut611b0agiuvufm0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sthm9oj4s9h2bs "help me in my fight against Iran with a contribution today.")_**

I'm working tirelessly to hold Joe Biden accountable for his reckless appeasement of Iran and bring this blood thirsty regime to heel.

We must not allow the memory of our fallen soldiers to be dishonored by Biden's appeasement of Iran.

Never Give An Inch,

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6334%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=rmVMipNuOSarDIiVNYGxTw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83896%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SYY5ERU2KLLT7qHWTQ%2fTcQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83897%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T4n%2b7HWEgLMoDb8j90BdsQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83897%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T4n%2b7HWEgLMoDb8j90BdsQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6334%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=rmVMipNuOSarDIiVNYGxTw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6334%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=rmVMipNuOSarDIiVNYGxTw&sysid=1)

name: Byron Donalds
subject: re: Winning in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
The fight to save America is far from over.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61902058:6UDmY1GNi:m:1:3317145305:D6A9DA99D1C023968A628BA49CA2A3E4:r)
---
Peter,
---
When I first ran for Congress, I vowed that I would do everything in my power to stop the radical Left and save America.
---
**That 's why my team is working around the clock to make sure my good friend Herschel Walker wins the Senate runoff election in Georgia on December 6th. **
---
_George Soros and national Democrats are already pouring MILLIONS into Georgia, and they 're going to pull out all the stops to try and stop Herschel from winning this critical Senate race. _
---
_The LAST thing they want is another outspoken, pro-Trump black conservative in Congress!_
---

subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901062:JL9GY1GNc:m:1:3331421248:31D89D4400AB6D1F73B305E16C20CEE9:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901062:JL9GY1GNc:m:1:3331421248:31D89D4400AB6D1F73B305E16C20CEE9:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901062:JL9GY1GNc:m:1:3331421248:31D89D4400AB6D1F73B305E16C20CEE9:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_

The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?

▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?

**[Please send $5, $10, $25, or more to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61902194:6VYwY1GuN:m:1:3253819041:665733C3F7B6D034C9BEA30F3C07180A:r)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Don’t Let the Left Steal This One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z17kddpm13s8j1rere4mqrjrhdg1ruli4957r158_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmcpr2cph2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhobgqfbokhkes536fhb7c05kr3iounnsm60901g_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmcpr2cph2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z02b4vehak1ej211vescqcqopnufplpdun84df3g_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmcpr2cph2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbh925q0nr1613lr3cp7ofbmnu2pas92fpr75ug0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmcpr2cph2bs)
---
|
---

name: American Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0032%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DqCSm1pB2Arsfhrs4TdgOg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40157%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bqm7pROjELtaPKbZZkL04Q&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40158%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TnziZzrQXKMBX3glMvlPdw&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40159%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C7SZcLYhb9cAPiDxhWyM1g&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40150%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0GAF933e2R37lwl6jexCLQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40151%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sqbm5SAH3lhsb1TGbOsagA&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf47gldt14anrbp4vbh2rkgta8roo20lqv17oupg_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmapb6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7ap7161p7cptkepgj5dj4skpnfcr1mlhr2d1hc5qrctpkehjrbcrh6lp3eob76v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664rjad9ge9qmccdimdgmfc5lclp2bs)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3dtdjdoqpoi47aaanoqqg0n2v3ng99caerd6b5g_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmapb6c9h2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl7kp07fvrf4il049167p2bqd73pab6jepe39j0o_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmapb6c9h2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeoksjgsos9v0amv7c4tova3qjifnpqdfqpienfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmapb6c9h2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2og3465k0glb7hgsv3hvmqigcshj0uknipbngi0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjmapb6c9h2bs)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Unbelievable… how the media framedTrump’s announcement
body:
It shouldn’t surprise me how despicable the left-wing media is. But somehow, they still manage to stoop lower in their ethics.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ies6qslojltr83i4sd5kfig3e22u6rabn05u1o_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjm2or4s5h2bs)
Friend,

It shouldn't surprise me how despicable the left-wing media is. But somehow, they still manage to stoop lower in their ethics. They are nothing more than the propaganda arm of the Democrats.

Looks like the new talking points were released by Pelosi. Here's how the left-wing media framed President Trump's announcement:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrqf65j37p3p6de02crhjcn05ppcfjolb1odp7a8_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjm2or4s5h2bs)

This is why Trump calls them Fake News.

And this is why it is my personal mission to expose and destroy the left-wing bias in the media.

I am Brent Bozell, President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

[_**I am humbly asking for your support to expose the fake news media. Can you send an urgent donation of $250, $35, $10, or any amount you can generously contribute?**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstti1uu0mj632kisjd0kf6a8jbhrkp80agauhl0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjm2or4s5h2bs)

I am preparing a bold new plan to defeat the radical left's lies before 2024. Voters must know the truth when it comes to fake news.

**FIRST:** MRC records thousands of hours of media clips each week. Our servers host over 800,000 hours of media clips to hold the media accountable.

**NEXT:** Our team of researchers comb through the clips for the most egregious examples of left-wing agenda... many times outright lies... being told in the media.

**THEN:** Using our massive online following, MRC releases our findings in online videos, articles, and published research. Our videos often go viral comparing the lies the media tells. And our research has been used in lawsuits against the Biden administration and others.

[_**Please rush your support today for America 's only organization holding the radical leftwing media accountable >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11o3d8f6gt5375rb4juis6v3hu161nn5oflngho_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjm2or4s5h2bs)

We already know the fake news will attack Trump non-stop. But our biggest victory will be exposing them to voters. The media's lies only work when they go unchecked. Our accountability has proven time and again to destroy their ratings and have voters lose trust in their lies.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now is the time for conservatives to go on the offensive. Our success will be determined when these corrupt media companies go bankrupt and lose the public's trust.

I will not be satisfied with anything less.

Here's how you can help.

Our goal is to raise $100,000 before the new year. 2023 is the year we defeat the media before 2024. I cannot do this alone. It will take millions of conservatives teaming up to topple the corrupt fake news corporations.

Please select an amount below to send your support today.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlt9nchv5a7suj0mfu3a93g7rmvbn39ecqcr2br8_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjm2or6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1tec1js557b8grhddm96dstp3fflltqsmli4f2o_rp22sh2s8i66or0stjm2or6c1h2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
