name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7572%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4cZJcYt4L05aGf3yPyiZEQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77129%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QRtqJbMFNc8bBxO%2fhwJgZA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77120%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4q25i7jt7uljS7TF5TOmIw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77120%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4q25i7jt7uljS7TF5TOmIw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7572%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=4cZJcYt4L05aGf3yPyiZEQ&sysid=1)_

name: Herschel Walker
subject: our opponent is better funded
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904046:Jt3QE1GNJ:m:1:3374012347:77E6BD4855F5FD3040B95DBAD428528D:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904046:Jt3QE1GNJ:m:1:3374012347:77E6BD4855F5FD3040B95DBAD428528D:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904046:Jt3QE1GNJ:m:1:3374012347:77E6BD4855F5FD3040B95DBAD428528D:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904046:Jt3QE1GNJ:m:1:3374012347:77E6BD4855F5FD3040B95DBAD428528D:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904046:Jt3QE1GNJ:m:1:3374012347:77E6BD4855F5FD3040B95DBAD428528D:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904046:Jt3QE1GNJ:m:1:3374012347:77E6BD4855F5FD3040B95DBAD428528D:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901328:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901328:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901327:6bYCE1GNW:m:1:3350876382:6B0577C58D0C600461795787640BEE54:r)

name: American Action News
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs5lnhfjbaq5lp05i2cfdrpaeoa6fhcs0bvc3ue0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zun0o5dq6l96un3og552m4r079s30gger6hlpie0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o32cth2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Ready for Ron
subject: Who do you want in the White House?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906191:6O-GE1GPN:m:1:3345639852:54EF088196FA475ACCF40309A012F7D0:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

[_**If you want Ron DeSantis in the White House, then we need your help today. Please click here to help us recruit Ron to run against Biden >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906191:6O-GE1GPN:m:1:3345639852:54EF088196FA475ACCF40309A012F7D0:r)

Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement, is working to convince Ron DeSantis to run for President in 2024. We're gathering 1 MILLION petition signatures, but we can't do it alone.

**I invite you to join the Ready for Ron movement. **

We're raising $20,000 in the next 48 hours to gather petition signatures. Can we count on you to send a gift today?

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: His life and future are in your hands
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2eg6mcs0l7fs65iq8tpoonqu0glqvhnsmh9j748_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9v465tbdt9a3gu8a7jpv0n6gac8l49gdchanpe0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv8f7llfkmm4jtbj6hsnfjce6bfnl6edeuitb938_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfap8rujtu15gja5ol2av478emimm156g8afd58o_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgv3d5usstmjjd0ql61b36o236av10aembk3l6jg_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbui0m654m918p3m231629h7hhftlpqnuit59adg_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)[**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3lefigpaom0hn2fq2k7l3cnrcbtufta1ifgcki8_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)
---
[** DONATE
**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znscjbcn07jtb3odkfl824bb1mg09cos7qvkhrp0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zah7595ehagv0h1779k2k1ik4hccql56f02eonb0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8lnra9762efurp388bo482e253snkjb4so9n3uo_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmga8nlli1rhl57am68pnd18vk7n5npscdhlemug_rp22sh2s8i66or0stge0o31c3h2bs)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0045%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Bl88IV8zOvtiaMff4npk6g&sysid=1)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40154%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LVEVPviWOlUljwbLbWsF3w&sysid=1)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40165%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ow0SvKvuxkznk2XE%2bqgKkQ&sysid=1)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40166%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KYYUpYz%2flc%2b%2bd%2fcY1Kfk7w&sysid=1)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40167%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y0dvfQfBjLlv7f3DzXYLPw&sysid=1)
---
|
---

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: The fate of Georgia rests on our shoulders
body:
| |
---
| | | Herschel Walker is headed to a runoff for Georgia's Senate seat.

His Democrat opponent Raphael Warnock has**$10.5 million** on hand.

This means the Radical Left has plenty of resources to run more ads on the airwaves, send more mailers, and reach out to more voters in the final days until the Georgia runoff.

The fate of our country depends on whether or not Herschel Walker wins against Raphael Warnock on December 6th.

That's why we need you, friend. Your immediate support will boost Herschel's campaign operations and help restore the Republican Senate majority that we need to _**stop rising crime, lower inflation, and fix the current border crisis. **_

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Together, we flipped it Red!
body:
Peter, I am honored to have been elected as the next Congressman in NY-04. Voters from all backgrounds and political affiliations believed in this common sense campaign, and I couldn't have achieved this great win without your hard work. Because of your dedication, financial support, and volunteer efforts, we turned a traditionally blue district red.

Peter,

I am honored to have been elected as the next Congressman in NY-04.

Voters from all backgrounds and political affiliations believed in our common sense campaign, and I couldn't have achieved this great win without your hard work. Because of your dedication, financial support, and volunteer efforts, we turned a traditionally blue district red.

Over the next couple of years, my team and I will remain diligent in protecting this highly targeted seat. The Democratic National Committee will stop at nothing to win it back. I will work harder, but I still need your help. Our work will consist of growing our base of common sense voters, community engagement, and meeting our fundraising goals.

Thank you for putting your trust and faith in me. I will work tirelessly to serve the resident of this district and bring Long Island's hometown values to Washington, D.C.

Will you celebrate this win with me by contributing today? [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Appeal%3A++Together%2C+we+flipped+it+Red%21]

As your Congressman-Elect,

I say Thank You.

I am thankful for your Efforts.

I request your Support.

Thank You,

Anthony

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Don’t Let the Left Steal This One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6348%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2f%2bkZ%2bZ7Ratp9XBqbASxU%2fg&sysid=1)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eZ8kEK5%2fDSTGF0e0O%2fxPHw&sysid=1)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83891%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TFbNoFG4ieax2OX7ZAwqKA&sysid=1)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83892%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AoUXAdmjBazJOtbv66a9tw&sysid=1)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83893%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sb5CqYCXdseGQGtem7mC1Q&sysid=1)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. subject: down-and-outers in Georgia?

body: | | --- | | | Peter, It's Nikki Haley. I'll be blunt: we're losing. Raphael Warnock is one point ahead of Herschel Walker going into the runoff, and his Hollywood mega-donors are helping him outraise us at EVERY TURN. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
This can't wait, friend: We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.
If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Serve America so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend even more in this next critical phase of the election.
We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
Will you split $20 between me and Serve America right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-warnock]
Thank you for coming through when it matters most.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: This is a Nail-Biter 😬 and I need your help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | Dear Peter --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906777:JwUcV1G-N:m:1:3331421248:F7D46D47BCC8EDE8063DC49EC42AB348:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906777:JwUcV1G-N:m:1:3331421248:F7D46D47BCC8EDE8063DC49EC42AB348:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906777:JwUcV1G-N:m:1:3331421248:F7D46D47BCC8EDE8063DC49EC42AB348:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906777:JwUcV1G-N:m:1:3331421248:F7D46D47BCC8EDE8063DC49EC42AB348:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906777:JwUcV1G-N:m:1:3331421248:F7D46D47BCC8EDE8063DC49EC42AB348:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906777:JwUcV1G-N:m:1:3331421248:F7D46D47BCC8EDE8063DC49EC42AB348:r)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: We WON Re-Election! ...but a recount is imminent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | | [WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r "WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY
>>")
---
| Dear Peter --

_**We have won this race!**_

With less than 200 votes left to be tallied, we are up by over 500 votes. So, I am very delighted to confidently declare victory in this hard-fought race.

I recorded a quick video last night in front of ~~Pelosi's House~~ the _**People's House**_ to thank supporters and update them about next steps. [Watch >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r)

**However, the fight is not over. Because of the razor-thin margin, Colorado law mandates an automatic recount. This will be an ongoing process that will conclude in early December.**

Our lawyers are telling us we need to brace for a bitter fight, and because of this we have to double down on our fundraising efforts. Please support our special [ Recount Fund ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r) with your most generous donation.
---
| [URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r "URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>")
---
| Big Democrat donors are flooding my lying, leftwing opponent with cash in the hopes of him winning the recount. _**Our House majority is so slim, it's never been more clear that we must HOLD THIS DISTRICT.**_

Sources tell us the [recount may be announced tomorrow](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r). So time is truly of the essence.

I cannot tell you how grateful I am to patriots like you, Peter, who have supported my campaign.

**But time is of the essence and we can't become complacent.** So I must ask that you too [double-down your support by making a quick online donation right now >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r)

We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans occur during the recount and affect the outcome of this race.

For Freedom,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907744:6ZL6G1G5N:m:1:3374012347:40513B5BD9114D54B03F2A917E471A76:r)
Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1s0qg45qck9r963331i70t4vmn7bbajljis4imo_rp22sh2s8i66or0stgecor1cth2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6mo0k8rh18u43sgdq6ce6irif1ooqpaq71deio_rp22sh2s8i66or0stgecor1cth2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd2unjse708jnqe59nbnnolnqachglcpf4tl4b58_rp22sh2s8i66or0stgecor1cth2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---

clean_body: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar | | | | Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar Lauren Boebert is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast. Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now. Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted. Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar. Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign. If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves. Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us. Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight. If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors. Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado! Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | | LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington. | "The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) | House Freedom Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans. Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. _**Peter, this is urgent and we couldn 't let you miss this email. **_

Newt Gingrich called on you to rush your immediate support to House Republicans so we can win the last remaining House races. **[Will you use your 1300% match and chip in to help Republicans win these close House races?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905951:6lcdG1GND:m:1:3331703221:92911FB67ECCA0F5FDFE752DB53756BD:r "Will you use your 1300% match and chip in to help Republicans win these close House
races?")**

NOW →")
---
**This is your last chance to make a difference in the 2022 Midterm Election.** We need you to take a stand and support House Republicans in this critical moment. This could be our last chance to take back our country. **[Rush support now>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905951:6lcdG1GND:m:1:3331703221:92911FB67ECCA0F5FDFE752DB53756BD:r "Rush support now >>>")**

To Victory,

House Republicans

From: **Newt Gingrich**
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905951:6lcdG1GND:m:1:3331703221:92911FB67ECCA0F5FDFE752DB53756BD:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Subject: An urgent update on the Congressional election
---
| | | | **MIDTERM ELECTION UPDATE **
---
| | **FROM SPEAKER NEWT GINGRICH**
---

Peter,

Speaker Newt Gingrich here with an urgent message on behalf of House Republicans:

**_This thing ain 't over!_** There are races yet to be called across the country and our Conservative candidates need your help to ensure victory.

**An incredible 1300% match is now LIVE for patriots like you.** _**[Will you use this 1300% match and chip in to help Republicans win these close House races?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905951:6lcdG1GND:m:1:3331703221:92911FB67ECCA0F5FDFE752DB53756BD:r "Will you use
this 1300% match and chip in to help Republicans win these close House races?")**_

---
| | | [1300% MATCH NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905951:6lcdG1GND:m:1:3331703221:92911FB67ECCA0F5FDFE752DB53756BD:r "1300% MATCH NOW →")
---
With your immediate support, Republicans can direct resources to these close races.

Thanks to the hard work and extraordinary effort of House Republicans, we may see a Conservative resurgence in Washington like we had in 1994 after the Contract with America.

But we need your help to finish strong and win these close races, Peter.

**[Will you rush a 1300% matched donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905951:6lcdG1GND:m:1:3331703221:92911FB67ECCA0F5FDFE752DB53756BD:r "Will you rush a 1300% matched donation today?")**

Thank you,

Newt Gingrich

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901352:JHNvI1GNP:m:1:3359512271:A578B5D124303C191CB38ECD359C0B2F:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901352:JHNvI1GNP:m:1:3359512271:A578B5D124303C191CB38ECD359C0B2F:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901352:JHNvI1GNP:m:1:3359512271:A578B5D124303C191CB38ECD359C0B2F:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901352:JHNvI1GNP:m:1:3359512271:A578B5D124303C191CB38ECD359C0B2F:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d25e733ffa96461a8adaa0808219b6f2&_e=dtCuz38nuq5KMYTRa2d6Brpii2BX107nSZIN0blfFGUIYPfkXVdZPQveSNbDPOvpENlQIduu87iOEXB5OVpqdk6rxh-YG2gx0_BShuQAoJ0xrdtOcV5F4P7NjsNht1lbiUwmGEKBqxUxW5vHHj9SyPXoQXDkG0KCngo0gfyON1zEetvfdrdwOPIkszkMLWfxeq4RUVvPMFF5mBXLjwqJtP2Lfhopzi5J17v51fNfAE20xtMAo3D4ESVRn3tx-2TTwi-XaF5MVEp75x5Aw0Sz6WXQYHmtRvg8jppPWXZaori5lL4d2LcNvo15RR1iYosrgzUYAkd6gAq9_i0c9q7bCASt_pGqkKHOCkYAFZrF2N7ZA4OXWESZ_akYaUagIpV7CDA9Z18tgEVG2yAqHVYwwA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d25e733ffa96461a8adaa0808219b6f2&_e=dtCuz38nuq5KMYTRa2d6Brpii2BX107nSZIN0blfFGUIYPfkXVdZPQveSNbDPOvpENlQIduu87iOEXB5OVpqdk6rxh-YG2gx0_BShuQAoJ0xrdtOcV5F4P7NjsNht1lbiUwmGEKBqxUxW5vHHj9SyPXoQXDkG0KCngo0gfyON1zEetvfdrdwOPIkszkMLWfxeq4RUVvPMFF5mBXLjwqJtP2Lfhopzi5J17v51fNfAE1sV7fbN5ylZssNI94dPPme-1K2a9GxWrc4zONa2nMjMt_xHcy58-ZAf1EDx4FAah4JumSy61s2VM-NmRIeiOU_ocME31EdLK9aSzrovBOg5I4xCZPF8wQb3DrqCBEunS2Lu3AbvAUEjHIgWndro6F5U6NcGqsm4RuqbPYf37T1sQ%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d25e733ffa96461a8adaa0808219b6f2&_e=dtCuz38nuq5KMYTRa2d6Brpii2BX107nSZIN0blfFGUIYPfkXVdZPQveSNbDPOvpENlQIduu87iOEXB5OVpqdk6rxh-YG2gx0_BShuQAoJ0xrdtOcV5F4P7NjsNht1lbiUwmGEKBqxUxW5vHHj9SyPXoQXDkG0KCngo0gfyON1zEetvfdrdwOPIkszkMLWfxeq4RUVvPMFF5mBXLjwqJtP2Lfhopzi5J17v51fNfAE0k9iGZJEQb4Re_TgU8sClOwmlRGbk-vh5mn1n-buyc4Tmd1hpUbkdj8N462eCleIG5hsj_QmOegb0nKXN4ZC-gLUnJtgy6PSMTnFH1g-UhCmEtScZjM3-cEyrOgqbXuLRg9DlyO9AzTnfW76qoZtB6z42sP4EeGlRNQaJREaPzCQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33ec74f56dc447bf95f6b0c2710d9eed&_e=h6FibOrM4027ZDKiGlDgiZ7XO136OKbDBeJbdym_eRfZ-vZlluNgQVKoCnyoO2I_5a3hiC3KaQxQYx2Q_m5jlDiwpZ9gBSletycadFPhOQ5nKZDpNkP2GE16q2gRm3-r0xM9lqXWdoSCJsR35Tz-TfKTwOjvywT6fdGYmKzwpT10PVuikPf00G0CBhdCNDwgQ0zQEpXKJPnNd2pV62o9gFyijTjWg2Qfy0SzBWJdT9utmlomgTYQ-ZlIfJKuG0UUE-9DyKKNSIhWfT4DaMzPilMhUGRiT-NJpaAU_D_4sTmrPs7CEa9v831FqLO4ENCUmyAWaowDY6f8OGnSzy4FJMpLNgoc94aejYn-3KQH7KB7jllOo8bxnresOwulKu0xHqh7Qnv3kqxMu500caH2Hw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33ec74f56dc447bf95f6b0c2710d9eed&_e=h6FibOrM4027ZDKiGlDgiZ7XO136OKbDBeJbdym_eRfZ-vZlluNgQVKoCnyoO2I_5a3hiC3KaQxQYx2Q_m5jlDiwpZ9gBSletycadFPhOQ5nKZDpNkP2GE16q2gRm3-r0xM9lqXWdoSCJsR35Tz-TfKTwOjvywT6fdGYmKzwpT10PVuikPf00G0CBhdCNDwgQ0zQEpXKJPnNd2pV62o9gFyijTjWg2Qfy0SzBWJdT9v54kdHLLvBvhcb4xrQJCZAqlquncclIwuQl3KwxharrbFgpuJxtRk0nRZkIu2_lEqHT7uotgpz5NRxLW7GwOSsVuyh0Ad-QNrVlRmHULSvAz1np1_6TL4MeSiHUQRLfSXisaPeMrCmKVPNQdJ5_LilUbTN5lQNuak9TzATAqvSlA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33ec74f56dc447bf95f6b0c2710d9eed&_e=h6FibOrM4027ZDKiGlDgiZ7XO136OKbDBeJbdym_eRfZ-vZlluNgQVKoCnyoO2I_5a3hiC3KaQxQYx2Q_m5jlDiwpZ9gBSletycadFPhOQ5nKZDpNkP2GE16q2gRm3-r0xM9lqXWdoSCJsR35Tz-TfKTwOjvywT6fdGYmKzwpT10PVuikPf00G0CBhdCNDwgQ0zQEpXKJPnNd2pV62o9gFyijTjWg2Qfy0SzBWJdT9vzulAtYjJx4CFwTuYu2LrVXqev8v74nlM5vMRAMtUfWlk_f9QzaJQsvaGi2CimczD-M7iW9F5CpJ13hR5pWshJAH9nFWj-74sqxUkCx-jxhgVN0rgYrexzz-G13rRokLk_k3j6vVhMQW0NBTWRu6WLSHJT-0sstq53d0WcU7iKdw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Need your help to get this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be.
|
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7826d8235d640ada8b711c9966c525f&_e=e4AD_-AmwKKKE-vGCZJGY7OpbX4JT3N4hni5LuJXCbsM8X45sfLIQ60aFGe9SssThc7vCk-fwVtRMvBMsAYaDAwwLQTiTZjifCuwR5Fbf2tQyfoifH4rJgQlGlPRLtrFXUVse3pWKk3FXK7WuBQHsEaPDGwyrWWDU0a1MyrphAOfnn9jD6QLCxr0ap2Gef3Ti2jwIjpTKTKR3YTFTu1Diy8CSh0st29pqSacxVrOBtmNtmdtxEhlud3PwlwoiR84gGsTkvnqG7BuPI4yH8Wv_tUMiYEmwjXZrvkR4lEcPuFeHPoV_epHe3gLl9cp3k2-IejpxC7JKBvvXaWn4yZu9S4D0dz7puX_m0DFgUMdzPJ7kPnyniLoR1RkmqDU6SpPQ_UkWEJcJvSQh3aqQPUGu1EQTPrryLDPEFqi3611Ijk_r7RFM1hD2ZoC4bpj5SiUW8261-jJuoEXvAGq4wC_vzzGgKhCeZn_5eXMLxKDP-U%3D)
---
Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: We WON Re-Election! ...but a recount is imminent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | | [WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r "WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY >>")
---
| Dear Peter --

_**We have won this race!**_

With less than 200 votes left to be tallied, we are up by over 500 votes. So, I am very delighted to confidently declare victory in this hard-fought race.

I recorded a quick video last night in front of ~~Pelosi's House~~ the _**People's House**_ to thank supporters and update them about next steps. [Watch >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r)

**However, the fight is not over. Because of the razor-thin margin, Colorado law mandates an automatic recount. This will be an ongoing process that will conclude in early December.**

Our lawyers are telling us we need to brace for a bitter fight, and because of this we have to double down on our fundraising efforts. Please support our special [ Recount Fund ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r) with your most generous donation.
---
| [URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r "URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>")
---
| Big Democrat donors are flooding my lying, leftwing opponent with cash in the hopes of him winning the recount. _**Our House majority is so slim, it's never been more clear that we must HOLD THIS DISTRICT.**_

Sources tell us the [recount may be announced tomorrow](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r). So time is truly of the essence.

I cannot tell you how grateful I am to patriots like you, Peter, who have supported my campaign.

**But time is of the essence and we can't become complacent.** So I must ask that you too [double-down your support by making a quick online donation right now >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r)

We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans occur during the recount and affect the outcome of this race.

For Freedom,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r)
Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado
---
| | |
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907748:JRHXI1GNL:m:1:3373497171:F165B8B831F6A7F2B628BE6153C2B8C0:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Say NO to higher drug prices
body:
Congress can fix this
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22225b52-08fb-4f79-892a-a194533cefae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter_ _ - _ **[Sign the petition to your member of Congress: Say NO to higher drug prices](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6aade264-3607-4a67-bd1d-144604c99752/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** High drug costs have been a serious issue for decades, but Big Pharma has always stood in the way. Until now. **For the first time in history, provisions in the Inflation Reduction Act will empower Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices and cap annual drug expenses for seniors**. These reforms are some of the Inflation Reduction Act’s most popular provisions, with [71% support](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68bfb3e8-6be7-48f3-ac9b-5d1033f472f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). But instead of supporting policies Americans want, some Republicans in Congress are putting Big Pharma and special interests ahead of working families by [blocking a $35 insulin co-pay bill](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbc43c31-b1ef-4653-967c-f18417d73833/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from inclusion in the Inflation Reduction Act, and [introducing a new bill to end ALL the lower drug pricing provisions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tedf9a11e-cff9-401c-8735-104c7fca1623/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). It’s no secret that some members of the GOP have always stood by Big Pharma--it’s one of the reasons the effort to lower drug costs has taken so long. But sponsoring a bill to revert popular reforms and allow Big Pharma to continue price gouging is extreme and out of touch with working families across the country. Americans are tired of Big Pharma’s skyrocketing prices for life-saving medications.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82e38ef0-92fd-40ce-a5df-3b80041fbadb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| The Inflation Reduction Act is a good start. But there is still more to do to lower drug prices, and Congress will have a chance to work on insulin reform later this year. They need to hear from you. **[Sign the petition to your member of Congress: Americans want Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices, and every American deserves a $35 insulin co-pay.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7d8b07f-e642-448e-97dc-c2fc64b4d662/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for all you do, Cliff
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc88fb746-6dd6-4303-9bb8-15eb5e8cb872/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/petitionsaynotohigherdrugprices2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T379dc4df-0067-4eb7-ab9c-44c689890146/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Mark Warner
subject: We aren’t finished winning elections yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Let’s help Sen. Warnock across the finish line.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54777440/379633955/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDNiOTIxYi01ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVPWy4jx2F2n7bLOxYTfX4yvmnYoupYU6weFtc5ZyQE=&emci=1e14f820-c866-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=c03b921b-5f67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Thanks to supporters like you, Democrats held the Senate this year. Now, if we can help my friend Senator Raphael Warnock across the finish line of the December 6 runoff, we will end this election cycle with one more Democratic Senator than we started with — and that’s incredible. That 51st vote will be even more important after Republicans narrowly took the House majority. More than ever, we need clear control of the Senate to keep making progress. _[**Democrats aren’t finished winning elections yet, Derek. Rush in a contribution now to reelect Senator Warnock and expand our majority >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54777441/379633956/745000014?refcode=mw_em_221118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDNiOTIxYi01ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVPWy4jx2F2n7bLOxYTfX4yvmnYoupYU6weFtc5ZyQE=)_ What would that 51st vote mean to our Democratic majority? We’ll finally be able to put good legislation on a fast track for approval and confirm judges for lifetime appointments on the federal bench. We will have a solid defense against chaos and nonsense from the newly-Republican House. And we’ll be able to keep moving forward on supporting working families, defending our democracy, fighting climate change, and much more. _[**During his time in office, Senator Warnock has proven himself to be a champion for folks in Georgia and all across the country. We need him back in D.C. and you can help make it happen. Donate whatever you can to keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54777444/379633957/745000014?refcode=mw_em_221118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDNiOTIxYi01ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVPWy4jx2F2n7bLOxYTfX4yvmnYoupYU6weFtc5ZyQE=)_ Thank you for your support, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54777445/379633985/745000014?refcode=mw_em_221118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDNiOTIxYi01ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVPWy4jx2F2n7bLOxYTfX4yvmnYoupYU6weFtc5ZyQE=)**

clean_body: Let’s help Sen. Warnock across the finish line. | | | Derek, Thanks to supporters like you, Democrats held the Senate this year. Now, if we can help my friend Senator Raphael Warnock across the finish line of the December 6 runoff, we will end this election cycle with one more Democratic Senator than we started with — and that’s incredible. That 51st vote will be even more important after Republicans narrowly took the House majority. More than ever, we need clear control of the Senate to keep making progress. = What would that 51st vote mean to our Democratic majority? We’ll finally be able to put good legislation on a fast track for approval and confirm judges for lifetime appointments on the federal bench. We will have a solid defense against chaos and nonsense from the newly-Republican House. And we’ll be able to keep moving forward on supporting working families, defending our democracy, fighting climate change, and much more. = Thank you for your support, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:

| **[TOP DEMOCRATS' FUNDRAISING IN 2022](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906551:6mGvv1GNz:m:1:3345639852:91965461A61CD37BD87508D6264A706E:r "TOP DEMOCRATS’
FUNDRAISING IN 2022")**

for 2022 midterms")
---

You're reading that right, Peter. **Three Democrats in Senate races were able to raise over $220 MILLION. These are record breaking numbers and we're starting to get worried because the Left are only going to get more and more resources as time goes on.**

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are constantly calling their billionaire coastal elite friends to bankroll Democrat campaigns and we'll be honest... their plan has worked. **Just look at how they were able to stop our red wave.**

And that's exactly why it's so important we don't make the same mistake twice. **We need to start preparing NOW and build the strongest foundation Republicans have ever seen** because there is too much at stake to lose.

**[If you're committed to lower taxes, limited government, and a strong national defense, then we need you to chip in whatever you can afford to help us DEFEAT the Left and SAVE America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906551:6mGvv1GNz:m:1:3345639852:91965461A61CD37BD87508D6264A706E:r "If you’re
committed to lower taxes, limited government, and a strong national defense, then we need you to chip in whatever you can afford to help us DEFEAT the
Left and SAVE America.")**

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906552:6mGvv1GNz:m:1:3345639852:91965461A61CD37BD87508D6264A706E:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906552:6mGvv1GNz:m:1:3345639852:91965461A61CD37BD87508D6264A706E:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")

Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906553:6mGvv1GNz:m:1:3345639852:91965461A61CD37BD87508D6264A706E:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need

name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: Your rights are being threatened
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._1a6uHS9ejsX8ggQA)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,I'm writing to you today because your right to protect yourself through self-manufacturing firearms is under assault. And I want to tell you about a couple of courageous clients who are fighting for these natural rights in court. Mike Andren is a retired aerospace engineer and firearms instructor. Jennifer VanDerStok is a writer for a small local magazine who also happens to be a former law enforcement officer. Both Mike and Jennifer have embraced the American spirit of independence and the practice of crafting their own tools of self-defense-a proud tradition that predates the founding of our Nation. But the Biden administration hates this. And it is now attempting to use the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) to sidestep Congress and rewrite the law to severely burden this time-honored tradition.On top of this, gun control advocates have become focused on suppressing this right-especially through use of the misleading term "ghost guns." Their intent is to tarnish the good reputation of peaceable citizens like Mike, who have dedicated themselves to helping others be self-sufficient and confident in their abilities to defend themselves, or Jennifer, who protected our community for eight years in law enforcement. Mountain States Legal Foundation filed a lawsuit in August on behalf of Mike and Jennifer to defend their rights-and yours-in court. **[And I'm asking you to support their fight by signing our petition and making a donation to our legal foundation today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** This case really has two components that are concerning.First, even if you don't self-manufacture your own firearms, your natural rights could be greatly impacted. And that could hinder your ability to protect yourself and your loved ones.Second, if the federal government is allowed to bypass Congress and the United States Constitution in this case, there's no telling what they'll get away with next.But your voice today will tell the government that enough is enough. This blatant government overreach must be stopped. Please sign the petition right now to stand with Mike and Jennifer-and for your right to bear arms using this secure link: **[https://mslegal.org/subscribe/vanderstok-petition/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-Y8Qcf8yKg)** By doing so, you'll show unelected bureaucracies that they need to stop threatening the rights of individual citizens. For Liberty!Cristen WohlgemuthPresident & CEOMountain States Legal Foundation
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzIyLWM5MDUyY2ZlNTE3ZTQ5MjY4MDU4YWNjNjY5OGU4NzA0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/US9smUnVJR70LcdYmqTf6Q) to unsubscribe.
---

* They’re failing to protect our families.
* They’re failing to protect our religious liberty.
* They’re failing to protect our Constitution.
* And the attacks on our most basic fundamental right, the right to life, are the worst we've seen in our history.

_America simply cannot afford to go much longer in this direction, Peter. _ **We must embrace that we are a Christian nation. We must defend what is right. And we must save the very soul of this nation, before it is too late.****_[I AGREE>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d2bca61be4c5408396d178f7bfa4f600&_e=LY6zATc6t_2QO9L3EkVyPnqguHHtA00eyC2EipBOyp-DARPb8uPfcV4obqJcU-fiQ2n2PgXSIbJICBAxTatnCjUxBdPftYZUV_CwHWpr-GXQSjjstOly5OaSOUGDGLqge85P3_aiOpwX5VlgAQvoN6ZmTRyJq2LqqBK6JNG90U2M8ioJdKU0atwfgtdtY_go7blLsqIoUARiX8sTiF3uQWWcUitGz4UxynLNOnzhS9iLGIZO1Zu711c980dlmUSgJmZdotS9yOL86TPoDTTE_JJ4dAkyrRzdWHIJXJbIGgzC4myRBrt1-epOseWhHOLSSjRDbIG6NnPfo5Bf6YKqul2r6mp-d3zEtMlVZ-I3qMqUIN57sAcQWLIdTJ13XYd1WksnDqXgg4J3dGjtBvj7-Q%3D%3D)_ ** Our commitment to the policies and leaders who make that possible is vital.

Can you help Raphael Warnock defeat Herschel Walker on December 6?
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54781958/379639188/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdlN2I2ZS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ihW87UBZzNtil9U-oke0wCna1vB9BFKV12U1O5qNMPs=) | The midterms aren't over yet, team.

On Tuesday, December 6, Senator Raphael Warnock and MAGA Republican Herschel Walker will be facing off in a Georgia runoff election to decide the last U.S. Senate seat.

Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP are throwing all of their support behind Herschel Walker to try and oust Senator Warnock from his seat. The Senate Leadership Fund, a Mitch McConnell-affiliated PAC, just announced $14.2 million in spending to run television, digital, and radio ads before the runoff.

We can’t afford to lose a single seat in the Senate. Winning **one more seat** for the Democrats will be crucial, especially now that we know the Republicans are taking control of the House. And expanding our majority now is critical to making sure we don’t lose it in 2024.

**We’re rallying support to ensure Senator Warnock has the resources he needs to win re-election and secure this important seat for Democrats, and reject extremism once again.**
