subject: Who do you want in the White House?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906266:6ji4v1GLN:m:1:3253819041:128BE0985343BD4BB90C4BE4835E7C4F:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

[_**If you want Ron DeSantis in the White House, then we need your help today. Please click here to help us recruit Ron to run against Biden >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906266:6ji4v1GLN:m:1:3253819041:128BE0985343BD4BB90C4BE4835E7C4F:r)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Pop quiz: Who will be the next Speaker of the House?
body:
| | |
---
_HINT: It's still being decided._ You may have seen that Mitch McConnell received the majority of votes to be the Minority Leader in the Senate yesterday. You may have seen that, on Tuesday, House Republicans voted 188-31 for Kevin McCarthy to be their nominee to be the next Speaker of the House. With the way the media reports it, you may think that is the final vote. **That vote, however, is not the final vote.** The selection of the Speaker is conducted by a majority vote in a formal session of the House, not in a Republican Conference meeting. What Tuesday’s vote in the House Republican Conference revealed is that right now, Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the votes to be Speaker. Whoever becomes the next Speaker must receive 218 votes. On Tuesday, we saw McCarthy only had 188 votes, 30 votes short of the number he will need. With such a slim majority in the House of Representatives – though it still hasn’t been finalized, the Republican majority in the House could be as small as 221-214 – it could just take as few as four Republicans to block McCarthy from being Speaker. Is that likely to happen? There are Members of Congress who have said they will NOT vote for McCarthy for Speaker as of right now. Many Members of Congress want to have structural reform to change the way Congress operates so that Congress is a more representative body, driven more by the members than by the leadership. They want to change some of the Rules of the House, and some of the chairmen of the key committees, and they want to add more conservative voices to the powerful committee that makes recommendations on who should sit on which committees. **These Representatives do NOT want the next Congress to be the same as previous Congresses. They want serious change. ** Regardless of who is the next Speaker of the House, **a possible rules change I personally would like to see would be once again to allow any individual Member of the House to file a Motion to Vacate the Chair**. The Motion to Vacate is used to vacate the Speakership in the middle of a Congressional Session. After this motion was filed against then-Speaker John Boehner (thanks to the work of Congressman Mark Meadows and so many of you who melted the phone lines), the House of Representatives changed the rule so that only a member of either party’s official House leadership could file such a motion. I think the Motion to Vacate helps put a check and balance on the Speaker, and no Speaker should be above such a possibility of a challenge if her or she is not operating the House in a proper, representative manner. Negotiations about such seemingly mundane rules are the ones that are happening in Congress right now. While that one particular rules change is important to me, conservative Members of Congress want other kinds of changes. For example:
* Scott Perry’s amendment number 13 changes the rules so that the members of the Appropriations Committee would be chosen by all the members of the Republican Conference, and not just the members of the Steering Committee, which is packed with the Speaker’s allies (and which is a group that is, on the whole, less conservative than the entire GOP Conference).

* Chip Roy’s amendment #14 establishes a 10-day notice period before a bill is placed on the Suspension Calendar, which allows the leadership to bypass the rules and bring a bill directly to the floor.

* Scott Perry’s amendment #21 requires that all legislation going to the floor for a vote should first have the support of the majority of the (Republican) majority.

* Chip Roy’s amendment #24 would require new rules be written to allow for a more open amendment process. Previous leadership teams have made promises to open the process for floor amendments in the past, but have not followed through. Roy’s amendment would require the Republican members of the Rules Committee to report all special rules to accompany legislation considered on the floor as “open” or “structured” rules to allow for amendments to be offered, and would make in order all amendments offered by a Member of the Republican Conference cosponsored by at least 10 percent of the Republican Conference.

The House Freedom Caucus recently published a document on its members’ vision for the next Congress, including how to change the rules to get there. **[You can read it here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-IAKA)** [**You can also read more**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._sSJvr4SdaZQ) on the backgrounds of the key rules changes the members of the House Freedom Caucus are proposing. As of right now, Kevin McCarthy does not have the votes to be Speaker, and we do not know who will be the next Speaker. It could be him with a significant commitment to reform Congress to operate in a more representative manner, or it could be another person who will offer a vision for leadership that will win 218 votes. **So, what can you do about it?**
1. First, tell us what you think. [**Please fill out this short survey**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2MDg3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/YBbvufg-CCE-xLFl4w-sIA) so we know where you stand on the House Speaker Race.

2. **[Read this document](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Gp9yHo2o3fDqg)** from the House Freedom Caucus to understand better how Congress operates. After you read it, please reply to this email and let us know what you think about it.

3. Call your Congressman (or Congressman-elect) to tell them what you think about the how Congress operates and the need for it to function in a manner that better allows for representative governing.

4. We still need volunteers who will come to Georgia to help with election integrity efforts. If you can do that, [**please fill out this form.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---

clean_body: | | | HINT: It's still being decided. You may have seen that Mitch McConnell received the majority of votes to be the Minority Leader in the Senate yesterday. You may have seen that, on Tuesday, House Republicans voted 188-31 for Kevin McCarthy to be their nominee to be the next Speaker of the House. With the way the media reports it, you may think that is the final vote. That vote, however, is not the final vote. The selection of the Speaker is conducted by a majority vote in a formal session of the House, not in a Republican Conference meeting. What Tuesday’s vote in the House Republican Conference revealed is that right now, Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the votes to be Speaker. Whoever becomes the next Speaker must receive 218 votes. On Tuesday, we saw McCarthy only had 188 votes, 30 votes short of the number he will need. With such a slim majority in the House of Representatives – though it still hasn’t been finalized, the Republican majority in the House could be as small as 221-214 – it could just take as few as four Republicans to block McCarthy from being Speaker. Is that likely to happen? There are Members of Congress who have said they will NOT vote for McCarthy for Speaker as of right now. Many Members of Congress want to have structural reform to change the way Congress operates so that Congress is a more representative body, driven more by the members than by the leadership. They want to change some of the Rules of the House, and some of the chairmen of the key committees, and they want to add more conservative voices to the powerful committee that makes recommendations on who should sit on which committees. These Representatives do NOT want the next Congress to be the same as previous Congresses. They want serious change. Regardless of who is the next Speaker of the House, a possible rules change I personally would like to see would be once again to allow any individual Member of the House to file a Motion to Vacate the Chair. The Motion to Vacate is used to vacate the Speakership in the middle of a Congressional Session. After this motion was filed against then-Speaker John Boehner (thanks to the work of Congressman Mark Meadows and so many of you who melted the phone lines), the House of Representatives changed the rule so that only a member of either party’s official House leadership could file such a motion. I think the Motion to Vacate helps put a check and balance on the Speaker, and no Speaker should be above such a possibility of a challenge if her or she is not operating the House in a proper, representative manner. Negotiations about such seemingly mundane rules are the ones that are happening in Congress right now. While that one particular rules change is important to me, conservative Members of Congress want other kinds of changes. For example: Scott Perry’s amendment number 13 changes the rules so that the members of the Appropriations Committee would be chosen by all the members of the Republican Conference, and not just the members of the Steering Committee, which is packed with the Speaker’s allies (and which is a group that is, on the whole, less conservative than the entire GOP Conference). Chip Roy’s amendment #14 establishes a 10-day notice period before a bill is placed on the Suspension Calendar, which allows the leadership to bypass the rules and bring a bill directly to the floor. Scott Perry’s amendment #21 requires that all legislation going to the floor for a vote should first have the support of the majority of the (Republican) majority. Chip Roy’s amendment #24 would require new rules be written to allow for a more open amendment process. Previous leadership teams have made promises to open the process for floor amendments in the past, but have not followed through. Roy’s amendment would require the Republican members of the Rules Committee to report all special rules to accompany legislation considered on the floor as “open” or “structured” rules to allow for amendments to be offered, and would make in order all amendments offered by a Member of the Republican Conference cosponsored by at least 10 percent of the Republican Conference. The House Freedom Caucus recently published a document on its members’ vision for the next Congress, including how to change the rules to get there. on the backgrounds of the key rules changes the members of the House Freedom Caucus are proposing. As of right now, Kevin McCarthy does not have the votes to be Speaker, and we do not know who will be the next Speaker. It could be him with a significant commitment to reform Congress to operate in a more representative manner, or it could be another person who will offer a vision for leadership that will win 218 votes. So, what can you do about it? 1. First, tell us what you think. so we know where you stand on the House Speaker Race. 2. from the House Freedom Caucus to understand better how Congress operates. After you read it, please reply to this email and let us know what you think about it. 3. Call your Congressman (or Congressman-elect) to tell them what you think about the how Congress operates and the need for it to function in a manner that better allows for representative governing. 4. We still need volunteers who will come to Georgia to help with election integrity efforts. If you can do that, Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2022 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908502:J2nTK1GDN:m:1:3369487795:D2D0BB058B89307EF7A37FEDBF4995C7:r)**

We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908502:J2nTK1GDN:m:1:3369487795:D2D0BB058B89307EF7A37FEDBF4995C7:r)**

name: Secretary Pompeo
subject: Taking Out a Terrorist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df31ecd262784fc48a0e80c0900c311f&_e=ZXCe8g9YW0crMOV0E7YpcMl3uOkCScvN7vH3HwU8VgOr-vKUy7mWxLr9mPUMKp3pX9NTys4PnFCD4VBgVEe2pfWOODZ8crQZAExigh1HKnLV2pzpycrrLdwhsBWU_fLPbXF8S0HYJZcsnxtJr6rEv_1zOfBJr8RV2gF1gRGXwZ9xcVPQ0orL4y47pXcqDEZtNdU-dzRnoZ3Nf3DKo0C39BbSWGt6-D_KntmnBz_yipFc4eOMD-GNhEEoer65OEDO3uilaQek9p1s-_Abs4liJIeEX0BmClXIJS_IX_NeZHz78PX1ZGm88bQx10FO1a1pfAAGsHEkxNjD9pyYN3lTNdYqr2jJ7uCQfTgE8YxR_1seiA1oMZEXv6rEO9Als8PzVzRYlKZJCF2vxpYdLW8QJfD1jF2GEEDrteFAHDSeKe4%3D)
---

There was this really bad guy - **a terrorist who was responsible for the deaths of over _600_ Americans.**

Some of them were from Florida, some of them were from Kansas, and some of them were my friends. Maybe some of them were yours. He harmed hundreds and hundreds more.

**This terrorist was continuing to plot against America._We could see it._**

He traveled from Lebanon to Syria, and then to Iraq to plot with terrorist groups to murder Americans.

But just before he could leave Baghdad's airport, we executed a strike that ended the life of this notorious terrorist - **Qasem Soleimani.**

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df31ecd262784fc48a0e80c0900c311f&_e=ZXCe8g9YW0crMOV0E7YpcMl3uOkCScvN7vH3HwU8VgOr-vKUy7mWxLr9mPUMKp3pX9NTys4PnFCD4VBgVEe2pfWOODZ8crQZAExigh1HKnLV2pzpycrrLdwhsBWU_fLPbXF8S0HYJZcsnxtJr6rEv_1zOfBJr8RV2gF1gRGXwZ9xcVPQ0orL4y47pXcqDEZtNdU-dzRnoZ3Nf3DKo0C39BbSWGt6-D_KntmnBz_yipFc4eOMD-GNhEEoer65OEDO9PWGbDvQHKmUmIUChQ6YYuwGph9AFljXw-6KiuFQPvZSogfgAVlXKloXsarvYIawvnQ_4mT-aWwBbMcG4OfHIDab_K7Vu1hAkJb4yLeoofYDihuLKbQO2GF9eF6NjCjPmV0eHbMj3SVS_FFiJgmy3mv5BXkDkHWU8sLcqrdzlHM%3D)
---

The assassination of Soleimani struck a blow to Iran that they still have not fully recovered from to this day. **But thanks to Joe Biden, the Iranian regime is rebounding.**

Iran is now flush with cash because Biden stopped enforcing the sanctions we imposed on them in the Trump Administration.

**We cannot allow the Biden Administration to continue aiding the Iranian regime one second longer.**

---
| | [STOP IRAN & JOE BIDEN](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df31ecd262784fc48a0e80c0900c311f&_e=ZXCe8g9YW0crMOV0E7YpcMl3uOkCScvN7vH3HwU8VgOr-vKUy7mWxLr9mPUMKp3pX9NTys4PnFCD4VBgVEe2pfWOODZ8crQZAExigh1HKnLV2pzpycrrLdwhsBWU_fLPbXF8S0HYJZcsnxtJr6rEv_1zOfBJr8RV2gF1gRGXwZ9xcVPQ0orL4y47pXcqDEZtNdU-dzRnoZ3Nf3DKo0C39BbSWGt6-D_KntmnBz_yipFc4eOMD-GNhEEoer65OEDOPXCzb_Baa_PvUAwLr80mYVuBJWVxW0HwjhER-1LPlj0KSxlPigAmGtquAwlmgvnXsVMl5blYSBhZJtq4DX-XnG4JXskC5FmEBC-skxayHc20YIOL2mDhr9lXWcGO_BdUsv4F_4nzons0hbDflnMLq-SCezTPLiza_UxpTevkurc%3D)
---

That is why I'm asking you to **_[help me in my fight against Iran with a contribution today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df31ecd262784fc48a0e80c0900c311f&_e=ZXCe8g9YW0crMOV0E7YpcMl3uOkCScvN7vH3HwU8VgOr-vKUy7mWxLr9mPUMKp3pX9NTys4PnFCD4VBgVEe2pfWOODZ8crQZAExigh1HKnLV2pzpycrrLdwhsBWU_fLPbXF8S0HYJZcsnxtJr6rEv_1zOfBJr8RV2gF1gRGXwZ9xcVPQ0orL4y47pXcqDEZtNdU-dzRnoZ3Nf3DKo0C39BbSWGt6-D_KntmnBz_yipFc4eOMD-GNhEEoer65OEDOoOd4VdmbdY0nhwMPzGM4Nc5mI4CjzykrAhl7XzXpDemGUdaAaejs6xbp7roK2_d1fv8c5q8vZqUeZufbeGGc4o-ABpmmPv0pgf_W31LIYzLewgNBEPsCCPbWF9rWu7AJcHNiSGQK4Y5e6YRSOu2K2GNIspH7C3LGWY77HUyrk_w%3D "help me in my fight against Iran with a contribution today.")_**

I'm working tirelessly to hold Joe Biden accountable for his reckless appeasement of Iran and bring this blood thirsty regime to heel.

---
| | [NEVER CAVE TO IRAN](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df31ecd262784fc48a0e80c0900c311f&_e=ZXCe8g9YW0crMOV0E7YpcMl3uOkCScvN7vH3HwU8VgOr-vKUy7mWxLr9mPUMKp3pX9NTys4PnFCD4VBgVEe2pfWOODZ8crQZAExigh1HKnLV2pzpycrrLdwhsBWU_fLPbXF8S0HYJZcsnxtJr6rEv_1zOfBJr8RV2gF1gRGXwZ9xcVPQ0orL4y47pXcqDEZtNdU-dzRnoZ3Nf3DKo0C39BbSWGt6-D_KntmnBz_yipFc4eOMD-GNhEEoer65OEDOEwoYqC6ygpZF5uxG-xHZj-kcnatIdYYN55Oz_9QWYygygdW-WqUoOfJq-PAB3mXjj16J1bKEHw25w52NsVFPd6r2ITZR0b9OUPtCO4Sy-odadK58zzWoZzx4LcuveJL1W3X3qR86dimc01jIpqkhJDglDhL9MMrE6pIxgxs1Rnc%3D)

Never Give An Inch,

subject: I’m personally asking you for a favor Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61905938:67uCK1GNv:m:1:3317145305:0AC6D8172446A1993FFB335904A8E20C:r)**

Peter – I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me. **

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**** **

[**So please, Peter, will you split $5 between me and Letitia James – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54793459/379651024/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk917-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTljNTVkMy02YTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-rFKOYRyjOXyp8Zx68-q9gjJLKxVmhYzasbVjuFQiE=)

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
Be the first Republican to respond to our 2023 GOP Audit >>>
**We SAVED our America First movement, SAVED our Conservative Supreme Court Majority, SAVED energy independence, AND SAVED our Pro-Life movement!**
Now House Republican Leadership is scheduling their very first meetings for the upcoming Congress and we need to get some basic information from our greatest supporters like you.
**[COMPLETE YOUR 2023 GOP AUDIT NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908394:65Cxd1GkN:m:1:3360412034:E7470C1604586F9C44C402BC174CCA7A:r)**

We can't thank you enough for your input,
House Conservatives

|

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901394:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901394:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901395:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901394:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901395:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901394:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901394:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901394:JLBNH1GNF:m:1:3368395361:4A0919D41A4C0EA810F27215EB5A77D9:r)

name: Candace Owens
subject: I’m tired of criminal idols
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906459:J9RTH1GNF:m:1:3350876382:DF1C9678CFA5F51A0D8581C75B366412:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906459:J9RTH1GNF:m:1:3350876382:DF1C9678CFA5F51A0D8581C75B366412:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906459:J9RTH1GNF:m:1:3350876382:DF1C9678CFA5F51A0D8581C75B366412:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906459:J9RTH1GNF:m:1:3350876382:DF1C9678CFA5F51A0D8581C75B366412:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906460:J9RTH1GNF:m:1:3350876382:DF1C9678CFA5F51A0D8581C75B366412:r)

As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and determination, I became the first in my family to graduate from college – and then, the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze3n5m048v7am3edva48nqm25c7plf31dovgb5io_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0p3nm9oj2cllc5h78tpmmaq72t7669qj8d74siqm1d1jmmpb3dj4c5i68t5jmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojed9l61rm8phlcipm4ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm1pr4s5gm8ob24no)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9mefkhjv26t691jcg47lo6h5cco26tgg4npudjo_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob4c5h2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn5hto363fmspahh6nqjf6712eq73pa6g20njc28_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob4c5h2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbgscfg9jqq1uhljd6c48slos5sjae20o3jvuta0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob4c5h2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---

name: Vince Speranza, American Veterans Center
subject: I fought at the Battle of the Bulge
body:
I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II.
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4b18bhvpjlacalbnthl8dp4bnp1q8gtaoajh1h0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. _And I didn’t talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that._ **But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year-old, I returned to Bastogne, Belgium to pay my respects to my fallen comrades.** On my first day, a local man hugged me and thanked me for my service. Then he took my daughter and me to the area that my division – the 101st Airborne, also known as the “Screaming Eagles” – had held. I even identified the _exact_ location of my foxhole.
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqsqkt40s0qub5mebj58ros32jfltcee0g0jlkt0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center released a video documentary about my World War II service in July 2021._
---
Today, I’ve shared my story with thousands of Americans, and my 56-minute video documentary with the American Veterans Center (AVC) has been seen nearly 1 million times online. **So when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they were launching an urgent campaign to honor even more veterans’ legacies, I knew that I had to act.** I know how powerful – and critically important – the American Veterans Center’s work is to honor servicemen and women like me. [**Can I count on you to help AVC continue their important mission with your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zng36ovsljtkg9kgt1b3b23mdj3bonetjot9c3b0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvlbgvsfaci605b1a495u9ju3adi770816k5tf38_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
**When I visited Bastogne for the first time since the Battle of the Bulge, I was stunned to learn that I had become a local legend.** More than 65 years ago, I’d brought back beer for wounded soldiers in my unit – and, since there were few taverns open and no glasses to be found, I’d poured it all into my helmet. I told this story to a few locals on my trip to Bastogne ... and I couldn’t believe it when they led me to a bar that served “Airborne Beer” in honor of the event. **I never imagined that a Belgian beer would be part of my legacy, but thanks to American Veterans Center supporters like you, it’s now part of our shared American history, too.**
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq8sjhm6md16nqaq11bmvif29gf6raj9nu10und0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
No other organization does as many programs – or as deeply thorough work – to preserve and honor our veterans’ legacies like the American Veterans Center. The many important programs of the American Veterans Center include:
* **The Annual Veterans Conference in Washington, D.C.,** where I was honored to speak on a panel of fellow veterans and share our hard-won lessons with the students and military cadets in attendance.

* **The powerful oral history and video documentary project.** These videos are recorded at _no cost_ to veterans; in fact, AVC usually sends their video team to veterans’ homes and, after the production is complete, gives veterans and their families a keepsake copy.

* **The National Memorial Day Parade** , which AVC brought back to its full glory after it hadn’t been held for many decades. Today, it’s the largest Memorial Day commemoration in the country, and thousands of servicemen and women, from World War II to active-duty forces, march in it.

But the American Veterans Center is only able to offer these programs with the generous support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more to help support the American Veterans Center today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z87e0jolhfnu46nrcqemqubo36kvs80fb2m0spho_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z56fovujbvu3i3527al60skfdvst0up3jn0u5j6o_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs)
---
I didn’t tell the story of my World War II experience for 65 years. I didn’t even watch movies about the military – I just couldn’t. But once I returned to Bastogne and met men and women who remembered the war, everything changed. **Sharing my experience as a World War II veteran – at AVC’s Annual Conference, in AVC’s video documentary, at special events, and in my own memoir – changed my life tremendously and for the better.** Now you have the opportunity to help veterans like me share their stories and know that their legacies will be recorded, preserved, and honored – today and in future generations. [**Please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center right now.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf9i455377kd8pu4st99pvja39opvrm3na6007io_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob2cph2bs) Thank you,

name: Vince Speranza, American Veterans Center
subject: I fought at the Battle of the Bulge
body:
And I didn’t talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that. But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zebqf4ie2ek7l756bc2ti1563faq2cmrhujhp53g_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob4cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American, I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. _And I didn’t talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that._ **But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year-old, I returned to Bastogne, Belgium to pay my respects to my fallen comrades.** On my first day, a local man hugged me and thanked me for my service. Then he took my daughter and me to the area that my division – the 101st Airborne, also known as the “Screaming Eagles” – had held. I even identified the _exact_ location of my foxhole.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv89k0p1idb131c6p0p8dvpk69ds2c6p3bhubv7g_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie2ob4cdh2bs)

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: There is power in community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4C756B574B30766743674E7939556853365552654932795045746F706961736A77652B6476414A4E354B6D37574C54542B35334E6C7042534B564C534C2F7A53/editor_images/Image%20%284%29.jpeg] We did it! Pennsylvanians understood the assignment, !
The New Pennsylvania Project registered 20,000 Pennsylvanians to vote this year, but we couldn't have done it without you.
Thank you to the election workers and grassroots progressive organizers for safeguarding our elections and showing up for democracy.
We couldn't have done it without our dedicated NPP staff who worked tirelessly year-round, and our donors who supported and invested in this mission.
We've had a lot of firsts this year, and a wave of monumental wins across the
Commonwealth. Making a representative democracy more of a reality; the Pennsylvania legislature will be its most diverse in history. This election added seven people of color: four Black, two Asian Americans, and one Latino.
This year's historic wins:
*
Joanna
McClinton
is
now
officially
the
first
woman
and
Black
woman
to
serve
as
Speaker
of
the
House
in
Pennsylvania.
*
State
Rep.
Summer
Lee
will
become
the
first
Black
woman
elected
to
Congress
from
Pennsylvania.
*
Arvind
Venkat,
the
first
Indian
American
elected
to
the
PA
House.
*
Latasha
D
Mayes,
the
first
Black
lesbian
elected
to
legislature
in
the
Pennsylvania
State
House
*
Austin
Davis,
first
Black
lieutenant
governor.
This year is living proof that voting your values, investing in democracy, and advocating for your community, makes a difference! Shout out to you, democracy defenders.
NPP In The News
In Pennsylvania Senate race, Fetterman, Oz make last-minute push for Black voters ( [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/pennsylvania-senate-race-fetterman-oz-make-minute-push/story?id=92685846] ABC News [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/pennsylvania-senate-race-fetterman-oz-make-minute-push/story?id=92685846] ) [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/pennsylvania-senate-race-fetterman-oz-make-minute-push/story?id=92685846]
Kadida Kenner, CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, a voting rights organization that has registered 20,000 people across the state this year, stressed the importance of Fetterman turning out Black voters. "No Democrat is going to win a statewide election in Pennsylvania without the Black vote," Kenner told ABC News.
New voting rights organization targets Pa. communities [https://www.abc27.com/local-news/new-voting-rights-organization-targets-pa-communities/] ( ABC 27 [https://www.abc27.com/local-news/new-voting-rights-organization-targets-pa-communities/] )
The New Pennsylvania Project’s efforts, which have registered over 20,000 voters in Pennsylvania in just last year, are modeled after the successful New Georgia Project. Kadida Kenner, the CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, says outreach has made a huge difference.

reports.

clean_body: [] [] We did it! Pennsylvanians understood the assignment, ! The New Pennsylvania Project registered 20,000 Pennsylvanians to vote this year, but we couldn't have done it without you. Thank you to the election workers and grassroots progressive organizers for safeguarding our elections and showing up for democracy. We couldn't have done it without our dedicated NPP staff who worked tirelessly year-round, and our donors who supported and invested in this mission. We've had a lot of firsts this year, and a wave of monumental wins across the Commonwealth. Making a representative democracy more of a reality; the Pennsylvania legislature will be its most diverse in history. This election added seven people of color: four Black, two Asian Americans, and one Latino. This year's historic wins: Joanna McClinton is now officially the first woman and Black woman to serve as Speaker of the House in Pennsylvania. State Rep. Summer Lee will become the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania. Arvind Venkat, the first Indian American elected to the PA House. Latasha D Mayes, the first Black lesbian elected to legislature in the Pennsylvania State House Austin Davis, first Black lieutenant governor. This year is living proof that voting your values, investing in democracy, and advocating for your community, makes a difference! Shout out to you, democracy defenders. NPP In The News In Pennsylvania Senate race, Fetterman, Oz make last-minute push for Black voters ( [] ABC News [] ) [] Kadida Kenner, CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, a voting rights organization that has registered 20,000 people across the state this year, stressed the importance of Fetterman turning out Black voters. "No Democrat is going to win a statewide election in Pennsylvania without the Black vote," Kenner told ABC News. New voting rights organization targets Pa. communities [] ( ABC 27 [] ) The New Pennsylvania Project’s efforts, which have registered over 20,000 voters in Pennsylvania in just last year, are modeled after the successful New Georgia Project. Kadida Kenner, the CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, says outreach has made a huge difference. More featured NPP In the News articles: Check out this op-ed written by NPP CEO Kadida Kenner for the Pennsylvania Capital Star [] How Summer Lee's historic win in Pa.'s 12th Congressional District reverberates beyond politics [] ( Pittsburgh Post-Gazette [] ) Davis makes history as PA's first Black Lieutenant Governor [] ( Local 21 News [] ) NPP CEO Kadida Kenner's joins the latest episode of The Confluence discussing PA voter turnout. [] Pa. lieutenant governor to-be Austin Davis joins historic class of Black people elected to high office ( [] Penn Live [] ) [] News Roundup It's Official: Democrats win control of PA state House after picking up 12 seats, Spotlight PA reports. [] At a time when control of the House of Representatives has come down to just a few seats, it’s a good time to reexamine the Voting Rights Act case pending before the Supreme Court, Washington Post reports [] . PA Democrats won a razor-thin majority of seats in the state House of Representatives for the first time in 12 years, an unexpected victory for the party that will have a major impact on how legislation moves through Harrisburg for the next two years, Philadelphia Inquirer reports [] . Austin Davis, set to become the first Black lieutenant governor of Pennsylvania on Jan. 17, said he is “extremely humbled by the opportunity” made possible by Black leaders who came before him. Lancaster Online reports. [] We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expanding the electorate. Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023! INVEST IN OUR DEMOCRACY [] P.O. name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: The Biden administration hates this
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-h_Fg)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,I'm writing to you today because your right to protect yourself through self-manufacturing firearms is under assault. And I want to tell you about a couple of courageous clients who are fighting for these natural rights in court. Mike Andren is a retired aerospace engineer and firearms instructor. Jennifer VanDerStok is a writer for a small local magazine who also happens to be a former law enforcement officer. Both Mike and Jennifer have embraced the American spirit of independence and the practice of crafting their own tools of self-defense-a proud tradition that predates the founding of our Nation. But the Biden administration hates this. And it is now attempting to use the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) to sidestep Congress and rewrite the law to severely burden this time-honored tradition.On top of this, gun control advocates have become focused on suppressing this right-especially through use of the misleading term "ghost guns." Their intent is to tarnish the good reputation of peaceable citizens like Mike, who have dedicated themselves to helping others be self-sufficient and confident in their abilities to defend themselves, or Jennifer, who protected our community for eight years in law enforcement. Mountain States Legal Foundation filed a lawsuit in August on behalf of Mike and Jennifer to defend their rights-and yours-in court. **[And I'm asking you to support their fight by signing our petition today.](http://trk.readactnews._HAqQJw)** This case really has two components that are concerning.First, even if you don't self-manufacture your own firearms, your natural rights could be greatly impacted. And that could hinder your ability to protect yourself and your loved ones.Second, if the federal government is allowed to bypass Congress and the United States Constitution in this case, there's no telling what they'll get away with next.But your voice today will tell the government that enough is enough. This blatant government overreach must be stopped. Please sign the petition right now to stand with Mike and Jennifer-and for your right to bear arms using this secure link: **[https://mslegal.org/subscribe/vanderstok-petition/](http://trk.readactnews.)** By doing so, you'll show unelected bureaucracies that they need to stop threatening the rights of individual citizens. For Liberty!Cristen WohlgemuthPresident & CEOMountain States Legal Foundation

name: Vince Speranza, American Veterans Center
subject: I fought at the Battle of the Bulge
body:
And I didn’t talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that. But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z642k3n0qv0limpfft7hg0t0tpmds0s1fev2ajn0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
Fellow American, I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. _And I didn’t talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that._ **But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year-old, I returned to Bastogne, Belgium to pay my respects to my fallen comrades.** On my first day, a local man hugged me and thanked me for my service. Then he took my daughter and me to the area that my division – the 101st Airborne, also known as the “Screaming Eagles” – had held. I even identified the _exact_ location of my foxhole.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6707l1ch3a78bjq1a8r1tjq7qdgfr9jt95oq4q0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center released a video documentary about my World War II service in July 2021._
---
Today, I’ve shared my story with thousands of Americans, and my 56-minute video documentary with the American Veterans Center (AVC) has been seen nearly 1 million times online. **So when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they were launching an urgent campaign to honor even more veterans’ legacies, I knew that I had to act.** I know how powerful – and critically important – the American Veterans Center’s work is to honor servicemen and women like me. [**Can I count on you to help AVC continue their important mission with your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zai6avraq8q36e7d3uieltvreacj49g5c3o91pd0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabj4p18hh0psmfmbv2ge94iksnj866gt85ldvn8_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
**When I visited Bastogne for the first time since the Battle of the Bulge, I was stunned to learn that I had become a local legend.** More than 65 years ago, I’d brought back beer for wounded soldiers in my unit – and, since there were few taverns open and no glasses to be found, I’d poured it all into my helmet. I told this story to a few locals on my trip to Bastogne ... and I couldn’t believe it when they led me to a bar that served “Airborne Beer” in honor of the event. **I never imagined that a Belgian beer would be part of my legacy, but thanks to American Veterans Center supporters like you, it’s now part of our shared American history, too.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zblvef2d1o89r4e8irkktjqd7655ssf1d10hturo_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
No other organization does as many programs – or as deeply thorough work – to preserve and honor our veterans’ legacies like the American Veterans Center. The many important programs of the American Veterans Center include:
* **The Annual Veterans Conference in Washington, D.C.,** where I was honored to speak on a panel of fellow veterans and share our hard-won lessons with the students and military cadets in attendance.

* **The powerful oral history and video documentary project.** These videos are recorded at _no cost_ to veterans; in fact, AVC usually sends their video team to veterans’ homes and, after the production is complete, gives veterans and their families a keepsake copy.

* **The National Memorial Day Parade** , which AVC brought back to its full glory after it hadn’t been held for many decades. Today, it’s the largest Memorial Day commemoration in the country, and thousands of servicemen and women, from World War II to active-duty forces, march in it.

But the American Veterans Center is only able to offer these programs with the generous support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more to help support the American Veterans Center today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zakfot8lqc92us2iokkfvifjhdfrguknhmrdeh3g_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4rm00ud12vjmje2f2sgdgbbffbub1qvaka80ko_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
I didn’t tell the story of my World War II experience for 65 years. I didn’t even watch movies about the military – I just couldn’t. But once I returned to Bastogne and met men and women who remembered the war, everything changed. **Sharing my experience as a World War II veteran – at AVC’s Annual Conference, in AVC’s video documentary, at special events, and in my own memoir – changed my life tremendously and for the better.** Now you have the opportunity to help veterans like me share their stories and know that their legacies will be recorded, preserved, and honored – today and in future generations. [**Please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvo2p9gvcl8otags6qkcd29u4jr8f60410ub7ek0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs) Thank you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zka4sqtmug90h0fu52p62s9kmolf2g2inujqdt68_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
Vince Speranza World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztq55lpdf1n0cj5k94nkgg8fud7okj0h8873ac4o_rp22sh2s8i66or0stie6oj1cth2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpm4n56eujcic03h1fi6un7v7hfvtjt81bb6s0vo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3c3jm9or2c5jm49fg)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf080aedb4b445368b6da6daf00bf26c&_e=9CEtYkri0mwLBzxbcpg7XAYIahT5XHFdVrxdGUbfFPTQ8iZcWCrf1QWmOXh23JU0HIbEgr8tTehyYgbq9iTqBG43ITqmVrchTBlLNijiFmqJDZQIzQjUjbwxMOD396jhihd_8CdYVKR1h9C5yQpNJIJ-MQqNC_I6NGOpwN23e9PXsMuWN71tbgm5yDkCTdhuxR_6fFbmTadOFBIpJhPVZVrnUtuGFCX66U_cNMlhH-Ar1aQ-aBRdiVCGUPnmRtJn9Fukflydus6TPWbD_pakpfPELg_hFluHelAyKA8GmOPKCUVKfmqGXqGljvsZVsUX0x4VoYEyPuHAJMzrYZPRX9nbiLmg50IRimPKC26LZSmafOsGJ5766zAZp7YjIhyyf6oXt7heFQTyIdoTzYsf0Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf080aedb4b445368b6da6daf00bf26c&_e=9CEtYkri0mwLBzxbcpg7XAYIahT5XHFdVrxdGUbfFPTQ8iZcWCrf1QWmOXh23JU0HIbEgr8tTehyYgbq9iTqBG43ITqmVrchTBlLNijiFmqJDZQIzQjUjbwxMOD396jhihd_8CdYVKR1h9C5yQpNJIJ-MQqNC_I6NGOpwN23e9PXsMuWN71tbgm5yDkCTdhuxR_6fFbmTadOFBIpJhPVZVrnUtuGFCX66U_cNMlhH-C3QaVN9ZRIElGMWZhJ-PG6nkJNxAj5jXsZl5EpzPUq6CIHR21i1ph5JUIJe8CDXnyT-MMjjMaZ6fweu5D-mUKhF5O1krbvmi8uGY4iJguVxUJsC2I79GRIu5ZbvHYaUQYH6QsQUvXcv0VBZus4S3gG7MY7rieKiLutuie769qLlg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf080aedb4b445368b6da6daf00bf26c&_e=9CEtYkri0mwLBzxbcpg7XAYIahT5XHFdVrxdGUbfFPTQ8iZcWCrf1QWmOXh23JU0HIbEgr8tTehyYgbq9iTqBG43ITqmVrchTBlLNijiFmqJDZQIzQjUjbwxMOD396jhihd_8CdYVKR1h9C5yQpNJIJ-MQqNC_I6NGOpwN23e9PXsMuWN71tbgm5yDkCTdhuxR_6fFbmTadOFBIpJhPVZVrnUtuGFCX66U_cNMlhH-BNAWjLvS2Pwk4xV8Wv80s3BMUkx-KkpW95mzOKn8eLJHRfPxBNVoQj-CuuwYbdxZtu-NzIkcuLwSxHkefWsGPlIUi36iwKY1iVEU6fOAj4hgJ87Mx8XsAcu9vyrE1ZKHNK1Ush8GrjUHjwSuX14abzeC4oNQnBrvgnbohU2Yy0cg%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Grace Jo
subject: What happens when your government starves you to death?
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908398:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
Peter,

I grew up in North Korea in the 90s, during one of the world's worst famines.

During that time, I only ate about 1 meal a week--a little rice, mostly wild vegetables like green veggies from mountains, tree leaves, and tree barks. Sometimes even mice that we caught.

In 1998, **my grandmother and younger brothers all passed away because of starvation**. My youngest brother starved to death when he was only 2 months old. . . The food situation was very bad.

My younger brother and I were starved for 10 days straight. We only drank cold water because there was no food we could find.

My father was tortured and starved to death, he passed away when North Korean agents transferred him from a countryside detention center to a city detention center for court trial. His "crime" was only that he left his country in search of food for his family.

Have you ever felt your stomach be empty and hurt for days at a time?

That's normal for regular citizens in North Korea.

I lived through the true horrors of communism, of seeing my family starve to death. And I want to make sure that never happens in America.

I want to share my story through the Dissident Project and show high school students how lucky they are to live in a free country and how dangerous authoritarianism can be.

**I am a speaker with the Dissident Project.** The Dissident Project brings survivors of authoritarian socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell them about our experiences.

I've set a goal to reach 10,000 students with the stories of communism told by survivors.

[_**Peter, can you donate $25, $35, $50, or any amount to help me speak to high school students?**__**Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908398:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)

Here's just a sample of what these students will hear:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908398:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)

_" Grace Jo's presentation was both moving and thought-provoking. When she was finished speaking, a group of juniors and seniors surrounded her, asking her questions for so long we had to (reluctantly) send them off to their next class." _
-- Bruce Rottman from Brookfield Academy

[_**Can you help students hear what over 25 MILLION people who are still trapped inside North Korea are living through? Click here to send a gift of $25, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908398:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)

But I'm still one of the lucky ones.

I tried to escape many times, but each time, my family and I were repatriated to North Korea by the Chinese government and imprisoned upon our return.

I finally escaped for good in 2006, but not without help._Pastor Philip Buck bribed North Korean agents with $10,000_ to let me, my mother, and my sister (my only remaining family members) leave for China.

The Dissident Project has already told the horrors of communism in several schools since our founding this year.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908398:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)

Very few Americans have probably had the chance to meet someone from North Korea, much less have the opportunity to talk with them and ask questions.

**The Dissident Project gives high school students a rare, first-hand account of what happens inside an actual oppressive state like North Korea. **

And I'm not the only speaker. We have speakers from Venezuela, Hong Kong, and Eritrea.

Your generous donation can give high school students a new perspective and teach them to respect, protect, and enjoy the freedom we have in this country.

Can you give a gift to the Dissident Program and help speakers like me share our stories with over 10,000 students? **Click any button to send your donation.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908399:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908400:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908401:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908402:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908403:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908404:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908405:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908398:6P5si1GN6:m:1:3361486117:0FB74C6E23694AF03E1B2768CDDE11B5:r)

Thank you,

Grace Jo

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908077:JLDhi1GNn:m:1:3346849603:3552D7891738068E2518B2E9A8F85344:r)**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend, I just want to say _thank you_.
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: [**Will you split $3 between me and Mark Kelly right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=1&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $3 or more right now between me and Mark Kelly to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue? **](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.25ZQ_V&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=2&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.6HFoUl&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=21&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.IqAcFB&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=22&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.DSPOSv&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=23&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.QWyCg5&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=24&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.S1P4uy&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=25&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-warnock-runoff22.mryFMf&refcode=em221118-1-7&t=26&akid=4783%2E6688874%2EB_Lu7T)**
---
****
Thank you for your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

**And as the final votes are counted across America, we could have almost 100 VETERANS in the 118th Congress.**

This is the biggest increase in veterans in Washington our country has seen in years, Peter: and it’s all thanks to YOU.

You have sone so much incredible work sending veterans to the capitol in this last year - but now, it’s time to get down to business and pave forward the conservative future hardworking Americans like YOU deserve.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I’ve said it before and I’ve said it again: veterans make the best leaders. And as the final votes are counted across America, we could have almost 100 VETERANS in the 118th Congress. This is the biggest increase in veterans in Washington our country has seen in years, Peter: and it’s all thanks to YOU. You have sone so much incredible work sending veterans to the capitol in this last year - but now, it’s time to get down to business and pave forward the conservative future hardworking Americans like YOU deserve. On the battlefield, we never backed away because of fear, Peter. And now in Congress, we’re CERTAINLY not going to back down to pressure from the radical Left. America’s new Republican veterans are some of the toughest leaders I know, and I’m so excited to get to work with them. But we can’t finish our mission without you, Peter. In Service, Col. name: =?utf-8?Q?Josh=20Quill?=
subject: I'm Announcing My Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Quill for Virginia_
body:
Rising costs & rampant inflation are tightening our finances. Our schools are failing to give our children the quality of education that they deserve. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f829ae64a53f/today-im-announcing-my-campaign-15060561?e=8787be5d90)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=a2470636e7&e=8787be5d90 "Donate")
---
| | | , Over the last few years, I’ve watched as the American Dream has slipped out of reach for many of the families around me. Rising costs and rampant inflation are tightening our finances. Our schools are failing to give our children the quality of education that they deserve. And an all-out assault on our law enforcement and a failure at our southern border are causing our communities to be less safe. Community is important to me. My desire to serve began as an Eagle Scout in high school, and has continued today through coaching my son’s soccer team and leading his Cub Scout den. Now I’ve realized that’s not enough. If we want to change the direction our country is headed, we need to elect leaders who will fight to do what’s best for our community. That’s why I’m announcing my candidacy for the Virginia House of Delegates to represent District 21. Let me introduce myself. My name is Josh Quill. I’m a second generation Hispanic immigrant, born in rural upstate New York. Growing up, my family often struggled to put food on the table. Coming from humble beginnings I’ve experienced first-hand what it means to achieve the American Dream, and it pains me to see it being ripped away from our children by reckless Democrat policies. After graduating high school, I enlisted in the Marine Corps, where I spent a decade in service to our country. After getting out the Marines, I earned a bachelor’s degree and two master’s degrees while working to improve our country’s Veteran Policy. In 2018, I was appointed to serve in the Department of Veteran Affairs under the Trump Administration. Serving our Veterans and their families was an honor, and since leaving the administration I’ve continued to work to ensure that the men and women who have risked their lives in service to our country receive the benefits they deserve.
---
|
---

I live in Gainesville with my beautiful wife, Jessica, our seven year old son and our two year old daughter.

I’m running for Delegate because I see the direction we’re heading, and I don’t want that future for my children.
---
|
* I don’t want our children to live in a country where they don’t feel safe walking down the street.
* I don’t want our children to worry about being able to both fill up their gas tank and put food on the table.
* I don’t want our children to go to a school that doesn’t incentivize them to learn.

We have to do better. As Delegate, I will do everything that I can at the state level to bring down the cost of living for hard-working Virginia families, fix our education system by requiring schools to teach our children how to think – instead of what to think, and give our law enforcement the support that they need to combat crime and keep our community safe. I’m excited to kick off my campaign and to enact real change to benefit our community – but I’m going to need your help to do it. The 21st District is extremely competitive, and we already know that the Democrats will spend hundreds of thousands of dollars to stop me from winning. [Can I count on you today to chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or as much as you are able to help me kick off my campaign and start spreading my message to the voters of the 21st District?](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=0e3e604c82&e=8787be5d90)
---
| [Contribute $10](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=c69995dffe&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=3e8aa12662&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=e15f9cd581&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=06446a63a3&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=0a9942a6ac&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute any amount")
---
| I’m tired of watching our country go down a path that makes life harder for my friends and neighbors. I’m scared that the American Dream won’t be achievable for our children the way it was for me. Together, we can work to combat the Democrats’ dangerous policies and ensure that our children have the future they deserve. I hope I can count on your support this year! For Virginia,
---
|
---
| Josh Quill
---
|
---
Republican Candidate
Virginia House of Delegates
District 21

[www.QuillforVirginia.com](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=16f06d55bf&e=8787be5d90)
---
