clean_body: Rising costs & rampant inflation are tightening our finances. Our schools are failing to give our children the quality of education that they deserve. | | | | | | | | | "Donate" | | | , Over the last few years, I’ve watched as the American Dream has slipped out of reach for many of the families around me. Rising costs and rampant inflation are tightening our finances. Our schools are failing to give our children the quality of education that they deserve. And an all-out assault on our law enforcement and a failure at our southern border are causing our communities to be less safe. Community is important to me. My desire to serve began as an Eagle Scout in high school, and has continued today through coaching my son’s soccer team and leading his Cub Scout den. Now I’ve realized that’s not enough. If we want to change the direction our country is headed, we need to elect leaders who will fight to do what’s best for our community. That’s why I’m announcing my candidacy for the Virginia House of Delegates to represent District 21. Let me introduce myself. My name is Josh Quill. I’m a second generation Hispanic immigrant, born in rural upstate New York. Growing up, my family often struggled to put food on the table. Coming from humble beginnings I’ve experienced first-hand what it means to achieve the American Dream, and it pains me to see it being ripped away from our children by reckless Democrat policies. After graduating high school, I enlisted in the Marine Corps, where I spent a decade in service to our country. After getting out the Marines, I earned a bachelor’s degree and two master’s degrees while working to improve our country’s Veteran Policy. In 2018, I was appointed to serve in the Department of Veteran Affairs under the Trump Administration. Serving our Veterans and their families was an honor, and since leaving the administration I’ve continued to work to ensure that the men and women who have risked their lives in service to our country receive the benefits they deserve. | I live in Gainesville with my beautiful wife, Jessica, our seven year old son and our two year old daughter. I’m running for Delegate because I see the direction we’re heading, and I don’t want that future for my children. | I don’t want our children to live in a country where they don’t feel safe walking down the street. I don’t want our children to worry about being able to both fill up their gas tank and put food on the table. * I don’t want our children to go to a school that doesn’t incentivize them to learn. We have to do better. As Delegate, I will do everything that I can at the state level to bring down the cost of living for hard-working Virginia families, fix our education system by requiring schools to teach our children how to think – instead of what to think, and give our law enforcement the support that they need to combat crime and keep our community safe. I’m excited to kick off my campaign and to enact real change to benefit our community – but I’m going to need your help to do it. The 21st District is extremely competitive, and we already know that the Democrats will spend hundreds of thousands of dollars to stop me from winning. | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | I’m tired of watching our country go down a path that makes life harder for my friends and neighbors. I’m scared that the American Dream won’t be achievable for our children the way it was for me. Together, we can work to combat the Democrats’ dangerous policies and ensure that our children have the future they deserve. I hope I can count on your support this year! For Virginia, | | Josh Quill | Republican Candidate Virginia House of Delegates District 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | www.QuillforVirginia.com | | Paid for and authorized by Quill for Virginia Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

| | | Dear Peter --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906779:JFXOi1GNV:m:1:3331703221:BE1E964DE8D72B741BFED045E83B78FD:r)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906779:JFXOi1GNV:m:1:3331703221:BE1E964DE8D72B741BFED045E83B78FD:r) like you, Peter, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906779:JFXOi1GNV:m:1:3331703221:BE1E964DE8D72B741BFED045E83B78FD:r). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Peter, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906779:JFXOi1GNV:m:1:3331703221:BE1E964DE8D72B741BFED045E83B78FD:r).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906779:JFXOi1GNV:m:1:3331703221:BE1E964DE8D72B741BFED045E83B78FD:r) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906779:JFXOi1GNV:m:1:3331703221:BE1E964DE8D72B741BFED045E83B78FD:r)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert

Peter,

**The Senate runoff in Georgia on December 6th will impact every single American.**

Inflation, recession, crime, unsecure borders, woke policies...and all the other lovely gifts from the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer cabal are only going to get worse unless we break the liberal chokehold on power.

Unless you want to see more one-party Democrat rule in Washington, **[I need you to stop what you are doing and make the largest possible donation you can directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign RIGHT NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908984:6Z-gi1GeN:m:1:3317145305:23E7A3CDDD77C4769CE01351347412AC:r)**

Senator Warnock represents the failed values and policies of Big Government Socialism. Herschel wants to restore America with common sense values and policies that work.

That leads me to the heart of this email.

_Who would you like to see in the Senate from Georgia, Peter?_

Do you want to continue down the destructive path of Big Government Socialism with Warnock - or get back to an America that works for all Americans with Herschel?

**[Please go here to make an emergency donation directly to Herschel's campaign.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908984:6Z-gi1GeN:m:1:3317145305:23E7A3CDDD77C4769CE01351347412AC:r)**

Unless you want to see more one-party Democrat rule in Washington, We cannot allow Warnock to win. Peter, that means we must help fund Herschel's runoff efforts against Warnock's multi-million-dollar war chest. | RUNOFF DONOR FILE SUPPORTER: Peter Willis RUNOFF EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION: DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT We are at a crucial decision point. Either we help Herschel win...or we will watch the woke mob torch our nation's history. Senator Warnock represents the failed values and policies of Big Government Socialism. Herschel wants to restore America with common sense values and policies that work. That leads me to the heart of this email. Who would you like to see in the Senate from Georgia, Peter? Do you want to continue down the destructive path of Big Government Socialism with Warnock - or get back to an America that works for all Americans with Herschel? name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3288029726a476b944e3526a9e3effc&_e=MXODauD-n4ohy8TN3K2-i3THVo6j7trYHSPm-iMph_SJiZRVnmHJf2BHnrDS8GeHAaWHXxiXCq_6uRctAqIS2jMAT-_AMU77aOOGdMBpxDYsAsoSX26RvdLV0T_8lL1sMldclE5wJ61dhE238-4dCF--R6s4-J9f0vPDPi6kVO2ZkJYho2RnUA23XRLS0DvO2Z4fwD6wb7b3wDA8KLv6KPohLMeaZhjGny8Pcw3W03Iq5H5_NRNaaLdDQwkURDFy)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3288029726a476b944e3526a9e3effc&_e=MXODauD-n4ohy8TN3K2-i3THVo6j7trYHSPm-iMph_SJiZRVnmHJf2BHnrDS8GeHAaWHXxiXCq_6uRctAqIS2jMAT-_AMU77aOOGdMBpxDbAhITF16jj_bwcfQBxWdO5GrK0GuFrHXux7_7bwxlX4iSt7dvmnyk2XmEd-YF7FJ7zYKitd1q6UCwCpn9obhgGVXSUoC7l79YPT4yNOxkFTmItC88hy06IeVj4Wwg3oWB9Jq5eAMe0tXCZLQTuWeDS)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3288029726a476b944e3526a9e3effc&_e=MXODauD-n4ohy8TN3K2-i3THVo6j7trYHSPm-iMph_SJiZRVnmHJf2BHnrDS8GeHAaWHXxiXCq_6uRctAqIS2jMAT-_AMU77aOOGdMBpxDahgWgAgBgJPkmAB6ctucb8QR0Tz0gR877VfxmVNLGpbtJugNtslngEmsLzx6iZbUh9BKp-2W50znrxaRltPK44jRe1pj-ILRPMgAhHBMNZuK5k4Z7OQYBt04pDdl4HIIejdOefVAEVPCqnG8irV_TQ)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund

subject: There's one thing left to do

body:
Dear Peter:

Nancy Pelosi made it official - she is out as Speaker of the House.

_There is only one thing left to do_...

The new Republican majority needs to LINE UP the investigations.

The Biden crime family, the invasion at the southern border, the January 6 FEDSURRECTION, and weaponizing the FBI to employ Gestapo tactics targeting President Trump.

**It's time to dig under the hood, expose the regime's crimes and IMPEACH Joe Biden.**

But I need your help to send a message to the weak-kneed RINOs that threw away the red wave that the America First base DEMANDS action.

**[That's why I'm asking you to help me investigate the Biden regime by singing your"Impeach Joe Biden" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) [**Sign Your Petition to Impeach Biden**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r). Adding your name will help prove that the MAGA movement is not going anywhere and refuses to back down in the face of Joe Biden's corruption.

**Once you sign your petition, I'm asking you[to chip in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) to help support me in investigating Joe Biden's scandals.**

Joe Biden's lawlessness makes Barack Obama and Bill Clinton look like choir boys.

And I promise I will leave no stone unturned in unearthing the wrongdoing Joe Biden and his henchmen committed.

But there are voices in the Republican Party already warning that the message of the midterms is that the GOP must pivot to the middle and "compromise" with the regime.

**_I say hell no to that._**

Resign or face impeachment is my idea of compromise.

**[If you agree, I hope you will sign your"Impeach Joe Biden" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r).**

**And after you sign your petition, help me expose the regime's corruption[by chipping in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r).** [**JOIN THE FIGHT TO IMPEACH BIDEN
ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) [** CHIP IN $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) [** CHIP IN $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) [** CHIP IN $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) [** CHIP IN $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) [** CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61143904:W1BtikDHN:m:1:2365227053:4349D715C472F76907B371A6AE453CDB:r) Matt Gaetz

name: Wayne LaPierre
subject: Take the Official Gun Registration Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Take the survey before it's too late | The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908237:J1Zw71GSN:m:1:3373497171:FC0407286D730898C70F35F4BD0CE768:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908237:J1Zw71GSN:m:1:3373497171:FC0407286D730898C70F35F4BD0CE768:r)

Peter,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908237:J1Zw71GSN:m:1:3373497171:FC0407286D730898C70F35F4BD0CE768:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908237:J1Zw71GSN:m:1:3373497171:FC0407286D730898C70F35F4BD0CE768:r)

Peter, filling out the **Official Gun Registration Survey** only takes a few minutes. **It 's the best way to help the NRA protect your gun rights and stop government overreach.**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908237:J1Zw71GSN:m:1:3373497171:FC0407286D730898C70F35F4BD0CE768:r)**

Thank you,

Wayne LaPierre
CEO, National Rifle Association

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908237:J1Zw71GSN:m:1:3373497171:FC0407286D730898C70F35F4BD0CE768:r)**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter. Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election.

| Peter,

I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.

We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: = Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat. Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red. We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Raphael Warnock and Martin Heinrich: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for stepping up in this critical moment, Team Warnock | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

subject: If Raphael Warnock has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not.)
body:
He knows how to win

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f875ed4-683a-4337-af8f-0e0f24334b0d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |

| | | | | Peter, | [**_If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7bcd0a3b-035f-4195-8e1f-a67f0b511a4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The special election in November of 2020, the runoff January 5th, 2021 and last week. And now we know if he has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not. I guess he cherished "The Twilight Saga")._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a71b471-cadf-4fb7-80dd-3ca98d1bd72c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Still, Senator Warnock has been falling behind in fundraising every day, and a Republican campaign group just announced another $14 million to run ads against him._** **We must do all we can to help him make up the ground. Or instead of Georgia's Senator being a scholar who bestrides a pulpit once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr., it may become someone who's brain is occupied by werewolf vs vampire battles.** Raphael Warnock’s campaign needs your support to get their message out on television, on the radio, and online, as well as to keep contacting voters on the phone and at the door. **[Can you please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Raphael Warnock, so he can make up his fundraising shortfall today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49299046-a01a-47cb-9df4-74f46b1e28c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you, Blue Amp Action Community!**
---
Cliff

With less than 18 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. | |

**$10** \-- that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, Derek. Your $10 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority nationwide. And your support has never been more urgent. Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 18 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. **I mean it when I say your $10 donation could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, Derek: Will you split $10 now between my campaign and the DNC to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia and elect Democrats nationwide?**

clean_body: With less than 18 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. | | $10 \-- that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, Derek. Your $10 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and defend our Senate majority nationwide. And your support has never been more urgent. Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 18 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch. I mean it when I say your $10 donation could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, Derek: Will you split $10 now between my campaign and the DNC to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia and elect Democrats nationwide? Thank you for pitching in, Derek. I truly appreciate your support. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. Sandy Smith has officially filed her paperwork to run against us, but we’re ready to defend this seat, and here’s why:
**Don won by more than 10,000 votes; t** he voters of eastern North Carolina chose democracy and a champion with a proven record to fight for the East. Don's ready to work hard in Congress and deliver to the communities he will serve.
Our grassroots campaign reached out to voters across NC-01, and our victory came from this hard work. We can't thank you enough for your support.
That's why it's hard for me to ask you for one more favor. We have several unpaid invoices and remaining expenditures.

Sandy Smith sent out a Tweet congratulating Don on his victory and advised him not to get “too comfortable:” | = Sandy Smith has officially filed her paperwork to run against us, but we’re ready to defend this seat, and here’s why: Don won by more than 10,000 votes; t he voters of eastern North Carolina chose democracy and a champion with a proven record to fight for the East. Don's ready to work hard in Congress and deliver to the communities he will serve. Our grassroots campaign reached out to voters across NC-01, and our victory came from this hard work. We can't thank you enough for your support. That's why it's hard for me to ask you for one more favor. body:
Here’s what we know.
|
---

Team,

We know that thanks to All On The Line's grassroots effort for fair maps, voters in [**Colorado's new 8th congressional district were able to elect the first Latina representative to from Colorado to Congress in 2022.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54798309/379672807/-1411470677?refcode=20221118_AOTL_F_cohighlight_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNGU0ZWFkLTdkNjctZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YHHzzu4zaUMmKJFCpcD5HIKlWX0uELh8fg2YxsXB_Hg=)

Last fall, Colorado's Supreme Court accepted the congressional plan proposed by the state's Independent Congressional Redistricting Commission. **It was a significant victory for our movement and Coloradans.** This fall, voters in Colorado cast their ballots on a fair congressional map.

_There is a direct line between fair maps and representation that reflects our communities._ When voters in Colorado approved initiatives that established independent redistricting commissions, they established provisions for significant public engagement as part of the redistricting process.

Our organizing efforts in the 2020 redistricting cycle resulted in a Colorado congressional map that ensures the growing Latino community can elect a candidate of their choice -- by keeping communities together, the new 8th congressional district has the highest percentage of Latinos of any congressional district in the state. So when we saw that CO-08 was sending the first Latina to represent Colorado to Congress, it felt like we were watching the direct impact of our grassroots advocacy work.

From the beginning, A.G.Holder has expressed his support of why fair maps are essential for voting accessibility and protecting the rights of diverse communities: **"I have long said that well-designed and well-run independent commissions are the gold standard in the redistricting process... Fair redistricting relies heavily on the individual voices that make up our communities."**

Fair redistricting processes, such as Colorado's independent commission, are necessary for growth and diversity.

Team -- we hope that Colorado's victory serves as an example for the rest of the nation in terms of how fairness and transparency in the redistricting process result in maps that genuinely represent the will of the people.

**[Pitch in today to continue to protect fair maps in states such as Colorado so voters will continue to be fairly represented for generations to come.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54798317/379672815/-1411470677?refcode=20221118_AOTL_F_cohighlight_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkNGU0ZWFkLTdkNjctZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YHHzzu4zaUMmKJFCpcD5HIKlWX0uELh8fg2YxsXB_Hg=)**

\-- All On The Line

name: Team Brown
subject: Ohio Dems delivered for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Meet our new House delegation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54798336/379672919/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_221118OHDems_N_TEAM_90DO_G_5_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ4NTAwMC03ZTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KuxTk3sMSmawf0dpXCZE78Jxrp5BSQ2VhclBCnwTRlU=) We’ve done the unthinkable in Ohio, Peter.

No one expected us to put up the kind of performances that we did on election night in Ohio’s most competitive House districts. The GOP had been eyeing the newly gerrymandered Ohio maps and expected to pick up key swing seats in our state. Well, Peter, they tried as hard as they could, but Democrats showed out big time, even expanding Ohio’s Democratic Congressional delegation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54798337/379672920/-786147055?refcode=EM_PET_221118OHDems_N_TEAM_90DO_G_5_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ4NTAwMC03ZTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KuxTk3sMSmawf0dpXCZE78Jxrp5BSQ2VhclBCnwTRlU=&emci=eb8d56f9-7d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=cc485000-7e67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=23746811) [**_We’ve shown there’s truly nothing we can’t accomplish together! clean_body: Meet our new House delegation. = We’ve done the unthinkable in Ohio, Peter. No one expected us to put up the kind of performances that we did on election night in Ohio’s most competitive House districts. The GOP had been eyeing the newly gerrymandered Ohio maps and expected to pick up key swing seats in our state. Well, Peter, they tried as hard as they could, but Democrats showed out big time, even expanding Ohio’s Democratic Congressional delegation. Not only did the GOP lose every single swing district that they targeted in Ohio, but Congressman-elect Greg Landsman knocked out longtime GOP incumbent Steve Chabot in OH-01. Emilia Sykes won a swing district against an unqualified Trump campaign operative, and Joyce Beatty and Shontel both cruised to victory. Even better, the GOP’s brazen attempts at gerrymandering Marcy Kaptur’s district failed miserably. You would think, given Kaptur’s track record, they would’ve been careful about messing with the longest-serving woman in the House, but they got what they deserved in a 13-point blowout. We’re in this together, Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. name: Peter Ambler, Giffords.org
subject: It’s not 1994 anymore
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The politics of gun safety have shifted drastically.
#

We’re asking you to make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today. Our work has not only shifted the politics of gun safety, but we have saved lives. None of that happens without support from people like you. [**But we can’t stop now, especially now: so please, contribute $3 or whatever you can afford today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221118-1-15&t=1&akid=2763%2E3935704%2EBb1v3X)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221118-1-15&t=2&akid=2763%2E3935704%2EBb1v3X)**
* * *
Friends -
This summer, devastating mass shootings in Buffalo and Uvalde led to federal action for the first time in nearly 30 years. The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act is proof that we CAN see progress on this issue.
We broke through a historically polarized Congress to pass the most meaningful gun safety law in decades—and even had 15 Republican Senators vote in favor.
Republicans had hoped the 2022 midterms would be similar to the outcome of the 1994 midterm election when then-President Bill Clinton lost control of Congress after backlash over passed gun safety legislation.
What was the difference?
The politics of gun safety have shifted drastically.
For the first time in at least 25 years, no Democrats have an "A" rating from the NRA.
After years of federal inaction on gun violence, the gun lobby is losing power in Washington and the general public is seeing who they truly are: overpaid political hacks resting in America's wealthiest zip codes, far removed from everyday Americans and even gun owners.
Pre-election polls and exit polls showed gun safety is now a top priority for Americans, including nearly half of Republicans and a majority of gun owners.
This level of support was not a reality in 1994.
America increased their support for the NRA in the years after 1995. Now the NRA and the gun lobby are at its lowest point where half of Americans view them unfavorably.
And unlike in 1994, in this election cycle Democrats are running on their gun safety records, not running away from them.
That is why at Giffords, we leaned in:
* **$10 million** invested in support of gun safety candidates across the country, including:
* **$1 million** for our Giffords Florida program
* **$5 million** in ad buys in the Colorado and Pennsylvania Senate races
* Over **$350,000** in direct donations to campaigns and state parties
* **288** candidates endorsed in races across the country
* **67** events held virtually and in-person across the US
* **Six-day gun safety bus tour** across Florida with **21 events**

Gun safety was a winning issue for candidates, and in some of the closest races, gun safety voters cast the deciding ballots.
That is only possible because the politics have changed dramatically on this issue—and a huge part of that is the work we’ve done together to build a moment of Americans committed to making our communities safer from gun violence.
Peter Ambler
Executive Director, Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221118-1-15&t=3&akid=2763%2E3935704%2EBb1v3X)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2763%2E3935704%2EBb1v3X) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Make Pelosi Lame
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Pelosi still holds the gavel for the next 6 weeks!

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909040:6swac1GN3:m:1:3317145305:B29B015A4D210F3D2B1DAAF57CD86D41:r "Headline") Peter: We've done it! We've officially taken back Congress from Nancy Pelosi. Only one problem. She still holds the gavel for the next 6 weeks and plans to ram through last-minute Marxist legislation while she and the radical left are still in power. I'm ready to hold Pelosi's feet to the fire in her last grasp of Leftist lunacy. But I need you right by my side if we're going to stop her from completely ruining this country in this final lame-duck session. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me fend off Pelosi's final attempt at passing her Marxist programs?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909040:6swac1GN3:m:1:3317145305:B29B015A4D210F3D2B1DAAF57CD86D41:r "Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me
fend off Pelosi’s final attempt at passing her Marxist programs?")** Now more than ever we MUST fight to stop Pelosi from pushing Biden's Marxist agenda in the final days of her reign:
* That's why I'm fighting to stop their spending bills.
* That's why I'm fighting to audit each and every one of the left's socialist spending programs and root out the corruption!
* That's why I'm fighting to investigate Hunter's Laptop.
* That's why I'm fighting to impeach Brandon.
* That's why I'm fighting to secure our border, our 2A rights, and our right to live freely.

**[I can only make this happen if you stand with me. Will you make a $50, $100, or $500 donation and help me show Pelosi that we refuse to let her ramrod her Marxist wish list in the waning days of her rule?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909040:6swac1GN3:m:1:3317145305:B29B015A4D210F3D2B1DAAF57CD86D41:r "I can only make this happen if you stand with me. Will you make a
$50, $100, or $500 donation and help me show Pelosi that we refuse to let her ramrod her Marxist wish list in the waning days of her rule?")** Even with the election still fresh and the holidays upon us, now is not the time to give up. **You can be assured Pelosi and the Left HOPE you will be too depressed or too distracted to care!** Instead, we've got to stay extra vigilant. We've got to show Pelosi that the people of this great country FLATLY reject her Marxist dream for this country. And you can do that by making your voice heard. **[The bigger the donation, the louder the noise we America First Patriots make.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909040:6swac1GN3:m:1:3317145305:B29B015A4D210F3D2B1DAAF57CD86D41:r "The bigger the donation, the louder the noise we America First
Patriots make.")** And while you and I know Pelosi has done a masterful job of making a mess of our nation, she can cause even more damage in her final days. I promise. **That 's why I need your help to stop her before she wrecks this country for good.** It's time to stand up for America by helping me fight back and protect our country from Pelosi and her Leftist allies. **[Please donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909040:6swac1GN3:m:1:3317145305:B29B015A4D210F3D2B1DAAF57CD86D41:r "Please donate
today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. As we get ready to celebrate Thanksgiving and the holiday season, I want you to know how thankful I am that there are still so many freedom-loving patriots willing to stand by me and fight against the radical left. Your support has made a real difference this year and I apologize for having to deliver this news, **[but it's been a grueling year of legal and political battles which is why I need your donation of $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT to help me keep up the fight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909040:6swac1GN3:m:1:3317145305:B29B015A4D210F3D2B1DAAF57CD86D41:r "but it’s been a grueling year of legal and
political battles which is why I need your donation of $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT to help me keep up the fight!")**

name: Team Sinema
subject: We’re protecting marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, Just one week after the midterms, our team immediately returned to work on passing a critical piece of legislation that will codify marriage equality into law. **Kyrsten teamed up with Wisconsin Senator Tammy Baldwin to protect same-sex couples at the federal level by securing the votes for the _Respect for Marriage Act_ in the Senate.** This issue is personal to Kyrsten, Tammy, and millions of LGBTQ Americans across the country. They’ve been working tirelessly to ensure we take this important step so all married couples can continue to enjoy the rights and freedoms they have now. **Thanks to Kyrsten and Tammy’s tireless efforts, our bill advanced in the Senate with broad, bipartisan support. Now, we need everyone on this team to support our work to get it across the finish line.** [**Will you split a contribution between Senator Baldwin and Kyrsten to help us get this critical bill passed into law? name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Outraised, outspent, but not outrun
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Herschel Walker won't be outrun - but he's been outraised and outspent by millions. |

---
---
Fellow American,

Herschel Walker is being outraised and outspent 3 to 1, **but he won't be outrun.**

Democrats are using the MILLIONS they are raising for the Georgia runoff to flood the airwaves with vicious attack ads against Herschel. In total, the Radical Left has already spent **_$10 million in just two weeks!_**

[**Fellow American, Herschel needs cash to combat their attacks.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61144683:WcORckDaN:m:1:877327319:BB8D648C661BFE084D11F5FB9EF1514C:r)

Senator Warnock and the Democrats are afraid of the momentum Herschel has built since the General Election. Herschel had over 2,000 people attend his first rally of the runoff, while Senator Warnock is only drawing dozens at his rallies. That's why Democrats are rushing in to protect Senator Warnock.

Herschel is a professional athlete; he will continue to run hard until polls close on Tuesday, December 6th. Fellow American - we need to do our part to make sure he has the resources to keep running.

[**I need you to make a rush contribution now to help Herschel keep pace with Raphael Warnock and the Democrats.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61144683:WcORckDaN:m:1:877327319:BB8D648C661BFE084D11F5FB9EF1514C:r)

Unlike a normal campaign, this race is a 4-week sprint - not a 2-year marathon. We have no time to waste. [**Please Fellow American, chip in $5 or $10 now to help Herschel FLIP THIS SEAT from BLUE TO RED.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61144683:WcORckDaN:m:1:877327319:BB8D648C661BFE084D11F5FB9EF1514C:r)

Thank you,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61144683:WcORckDaN:m:1:877327319:BB8D648C661BFE084D11F5FB9EF1514C:r)

Lindsey Graham

subject: Fill your home with joy this Christmas
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baeed45918344d58abf7b5fd82e87813&_e=O7TNivatvFB2NoRxQFeyegUJH6nJI6Aj-8iKnbock1q9W756BDoSRTThqm09mIX0yGyx4EYZT6WXuNax6GP0PqXaSUjxd6t_A7IjfOYXvUa7RnV9PUEcCYwDnl2nDnAPWhazBb4veycQg9NvUv4n7cresQN5CYf4aA7H1A5xdm5tmwX9vYIzVyv7JUNPSXMG1xPjTb3hA2LAqrxSOoaF6JBbkLyHEVzSF_rZLA9r9SCIcznvDL86s1ilXMtbMKIOVoMaQjTBq_U0W66mmFaoZraqk8HdYVAu6w_-FQZ39NGa04Edi59x3V1z6HCZJkZNwARGsc956QiU9FtjdLTthtFBP2muEE8aXbYRVGK3HQIlJg0lsyvBd-xaxk6b_LgybrUMprA_IBko9daMQ-fAgCsRGFhd9KXQL8K84yplrxY%3D)

| Friend, I have exciting news to share and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

Over the years, I have heard from so many viewers and listeners of _Pathway to Victory_ about our wonderful First Baptist Dallas choir and orchestra worship music. And the question we always hear is, "Can I get a copy of that performance to listen to and share with my family?"

Now, this holiday season, I can finally answer, "Yes!"

For the first time, _Pathway to Victory_ has a Christmas music CD available featuring the best performances from the First Baptist Dallas Choir & Orchestra. Let me send you a copy as my thanks for your support of the broadcast ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

This uplifting music CD, called [**_Celebrate The Savior_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baeed45918344d58abf7b5fd82e87813&_e=O7TNivatvFB2NoRxQFeyegUJH6nJI6Aj-8iKnbock1q9W756BDoSRTThqm09mIX0yGyx4EYZT6WXuNax6GP0PqXaSUjxd6t_A7IjfOYXvUa7RnV9PUEcCYwDnl2nDnAPWhazBb4veycQg9NvUv4n7cresQN5CYf4aA7H1A5xdm5tmwX9vYIzVyv7JUNPSXMG1xPjTb3hA2LAqrxSOoaF6JBbkLyHEVzSF_rZLA9r9SCIcznvDL86s1ilXMtbMKIOVoMaQjTBq_U0W66mmFaoZijkzh7lQdnsToP4IqZy7_Fl2de1h-i2qELyoSzgyOW6c4ANuv_47r4iEeE6748i7CXSvHjOTG2mSWFktlRwtcdPlw1pRAlUnzDMNeIn9tSE6ATJXK-dk9GDVh1qckBTlC1oXCPMHan1v6hlAF6grT8%3D), includes nine songs with arrangements and performances that will please any family member or friend this Christmas season. Songs include:
| | Joy To The World
Star of Wonder
A Christmas Medley of Joy To The World, O Come Let Us Adore Him, Angels We Have Heard On High
Oh Holy Night
Go Tell It On The Mountain
The Glory Of Christmas
I Wonder As I Wander
Christ Is Born

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baeed45918344d58abf7b5fd82e87813&_e=O7TNivatvFB2NoRxQFeyegUJH6nJI6Aj-8iKnbock1q9W756BDoSRTThqm09mIX0yGyx4EYZT6WXuNax6GP0PqXaSUjxd6t_A7IjfOYXvUa7RnV9PUEcCYwDnl2nDnAPWhazBb4veycQg9NvUv4n7cresQN5CYf4aA7H1A5xdm5tmwX9vYIzVyv7JUNPSXMG1xPjTb3hA2LAqrxSOoaF6JBbkLyHEVzSF_rZLA9r9SCIcznvDL86s1ilXMtbMKIOVoMaQjTBq_U0W66mmFaoZnCaVfvTrKVbP3r_Hj4M4bDbTeYq90l8-SrQNEm-8te_a04oomHtZwDZ8ZbtgHnBhhtdhKJEw25xN-F8CCoMsMizBV8V4JWhjpLGSW-i3XCR1fQEz-li_xoqMlWA4mR6JwXylVz9XNkujNE_OQnmUuQ%3D)

| Don't wait--**[request your copy today](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=baeed45918344d58abf7b5fd82e87813&_e=O7TNivatvFB2NoRxQFeyegUJH6nJI6Aj-8iKnbock1q9W756BDoSRTThqm09mIX0yGyx4EYZT6WXuNax6GP0PqXaSUjxd6t_A7IjfOYXvUa7RnV9PUEcCYwDnl2nDnAPWhazBb4veycQg9NvUv4n7cresQN5CYf4aA7H1A5xdm5tmwX9vYIzVyv7JUNPSXMG1xPjTb3hA2LAqrxSOoaF6JBbkLyHEVzSF_rZLA9r9SCIcznvDL86s1ilXMtbMKIOVoMaQjTBq_U0W66mmFaoZrqoOp2jKxP86TLId7LVsjdWYVrek0TqnhsY4wG1X4PbLaPF5qaCraOEF3CatAyxgGNRUky7n1eNkYnpHhBpc6QruD7ihkdvCMTWdCaHxPrxeIoUdw7PQOqcxRZilyR4SNGUBbkbyDMfRxbaByqClfk%3D)** with our thanks for a generous ministry gift to support _Pathway to Victory_ so we can ship it to you in time for Thanksgiving gatherings and for you to play as you decorate for Christmas.

I pray that this music will be a blessing to you and your family this holiday season,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I joined five of my Republican colleagues at COP27 (the 27th annual Climate Change Conference) where we were practically the only elected officials fighting for American energy independence and clean natural gas/carbon capture technology. I also introduced legislation that would hit the Mexican drug cartels where it hurts the most: their bank accounts.
As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your campaign brief:
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| WHY I WENT TO COP27
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03J04xCHbKXAil5P2Kqbf9vwkyr7FR-hIIVLhK7FnM3bwpzFrYJPCHLxHSlx99cFESSCGXoozFS1g-SGuREkVFZbLpdqTBc7XL20yWGZVEoENo7ucMbnT6B1umGQcR1ELfCm-uDNrZGH2pwMkRvp5YnPk=&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03J04xCHbKXAil5P2Kqbf9vwkyr7FR-hIIVLhK7FnM3bwpzFrYJPCHLxHSlx99cFESSCGXoozFS1g-SGuREkVFZbLpdqTBc7XL20yWGZVEoENo7ucMbnT6B1umGQcR1ELfCm-uDNrZGH2pwMkRvp5YnPk=&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==)
---
| |
---
| There's only one reason I went to COP27 (the 27th annual Climate Change Conference), and that's to do what Democrats won't--advocate for real solutions to America's energy crisis.
America has every opportunity to be energy independent, and it's time we start focusing on that. We can't rely on countries like China to offer us "clean" energy solutions while they continue to be the world's largest emitter, with no concerted effort to decrease their own emissions. We don't need to fool ourselves with the idea of a solar and wind only future, either. We need a real discussion on reliable solutions.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03J9JDq-nNytQOVEWQKPwzXrcsDBUKcGj__EXR7z980fY4wm9pA8tfWz2U1jTL8542T571RjcI9ApuIsAsXxAO7CxYlkJCSb2d8wbAJeNyIzZcugd8uec86Ak47i72rkvhhtaRvilcWQk3zrIROgFw4XKr_gxCyhvWSHdYrU6GFvcF7SVn467QOgb4Dwz6nZTBYy596kUVdHlAYM6Gm9gvbjEEabmUVXTSk585OE6xU9f6NOvN3-HSgK8697DcawUVK10vQd4tnJ6ZZkQiVpiUtTHh1JYF92E6vA==&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==)
---
| | | [XMAS GIFTS FROM THE CRENSHAW SHOP](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03J9JDq-nNytQOVEWQKPwzXrcsDBUKcGj__EXR7z980fY4wm9pA8tfWz2U1jTL8542T571RjcI9ApuIsAsXxAO7CxYlkJCSb2d8wbAJeNyIzZcugd8uec86Ak47i72rkvhhtaRvilcWQk3zrIROgFw4XKr_gxCyhvWSHdYrU6GFvcF7SVn467QOgb4Dwz6nZTBYy596kUVdHlAYM6Gm9gvbjEEabmUVXTSk585OE6xU9f6NOvN3-HSgK8697DcawUVK10vQd4tnJ6ZNCQblhbSmMRlSbwrFfrD0A==&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| DECLARING WAR ON THE CARTELS
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03JxOZjmMc10_cKGHpu6wDKF5QHddl7zvkmOKQ_Dj-w9enyopeFr0XEMO4bk_umOIzWhpqqhrXfZaXGWAZwVfNq9IKKx1t98nrecfSgOG_s2JtLgUMxMyhn4vpNztcmF6hn-NLjcwuexb4gLKqKGOXcsymrZNJZ6MogEg3c4kugcsHNwikXAGFYWXhvdce4KZvGlUP_vpOSStGj1-mOx18C34=&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03JxOZjmMc10_cKGHpu6wDKF5QHddl7zvkmOKQ_Dj-w9enyopeFr0XEMO4bk_umOIzWhpqqhrXfZaXGWAZwVfNq9IKKx1t98nrecfSgOG_s2JtLgUMxMyhn4vpNztcmF6hn-NLjcwuexb4gLKqKGOXcsymrZNJZ6MogEg3c4kugcsHNwikXAGFYWXhvdce4KZvGlUP_vpOSStGj1-mOx18C34=&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==)
---
| |
---
| This week, I introduced H.R. 9312, the Declaring War on the Cartels Act. It's long overdue that we take the cartels seriously. It's time that we deter & target them the same way we do terrorists. That's the only way we win. Here are some highlights from the bill:

* For cartel members convicted of various crimes, this bill increases their sentence anywhere from 10-20 additional years--solely for being a member of a transnational criminal cartel.
* Allows asset forfeiture and prohibition of access to U.S. financial institutions for convicted cartel members. Captured money is designated to the CARTEL Fund which will then be distributed to CBP, ICE, and DEA.
* Permits denaturalization and revocation of legal permanent residency status for people convicted of crimes on behalf of cartels.
* Freezes foreign aid to countries that enable cartel activity in their territories.
* Foreign individuals who are involved in or facilitate cartels may be sanctioned.

In summary, this bill hits the cartels where it hurts the most: their bank accounts.
You can track the status of my bill, and every bill under consideration or passed by Congress, at [Congress.gov](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RRvomzxFvr5zsOeaXMSz8ojSjzajFjqHpZ4KhN_WfjJJGdDEIB03J04xCHbKXAilk9G4PafJu5d8IDp2WarvU3xHO9bdudeQ6aU4kc23GtumE0zbH8Ehmrp3cvafmQilvIKpCQhXMuPGh7VACK2cRBJ6lRfT3DXTvQEAJPcXnYJELAcWr6G5yPDAJz6qR-34t_DwhqnUdkwsJ12T_TBSZjZ8NAwGqZMAHU6bA_Asojcc0znWhBM1C8YFFpTZiYKP7AGeh_lIBq4R90XxTZHxsaf3qG2F7-rWijvm_qYcVoA=&c=eVGDAW2Opn6bEV5W8_gD48PzEgwr6wAxqfKooD1pRIBOM2_FwZ5Pgw==&ch=xGVBbVXAX4XRqmzO1hdn6dCcqKDlVLnAQisKmr2LXLCLHbZdMB7jDg==).
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| ON SOCIAL MEDIA
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I joined five of my Republican colleagues at COP27 (the 27th annual Climate Change Conference) where we were practically the only elected officials fighting for American energy independence and clean natural gas/carbon capture technology. I also introduced legislation that would hit the Mexican drug cartels where it hurts the most: their bank accounts. As always, thank you for your support. Now, here's your campaign brief: | | | | | | | | WHY I WENT TO COP27 | | | == | == | | | There's only one reason I went to COP27 (the 27th annual Climate Change Conference), and that's to do what Democrats won't--advocate for real solutions to America's energy crisis. America has every opportunity to be energy independent, and it's time we start focusing on that. We can't rely on countries like China to offer us "clean" energy solutions while they continue to be the world's largest emitter, with no concerted effort to decrease their own emissions. We don't need to fool ourselves with the idea of a solar and wind only future, either. We need a real discussion on reliable solutions. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | DECLARING WAR ON THE CARTELS | | | == | == | | | This week, I introduced H.R. 9312, the Declaring War on the Cartels Act. It's long overdue that we take the cartels seriously. It's time that we deter & target them the same way we do terrorists. That's the only way we win. Here are some highlights from the bill: For cartel members convicted of various crimes, this bill increases their sentence anywhere from 10-20 additional years--solely for being a member of a transnational criminal cartel. Allows asset forfeiture and prohibition of access to U.S. financial institutions for convicted cartel members. Captured money is designated to the CARTEL Fund which will then be distributed to CBP, ICE, and DEA. Permits denaturalization and revocation of legal permanent residency status for people convicted of crimes on behalf of cartels. Freezes foreign aid to countries that enable cartel activity in their territories. * Foreign individuals who are involved in or facilitate cartels may be sanctioned. In summary, this bill hits the cartels where it hurts the most: their bank accounts. You can track the status of my bill, and every bill under consideration or passed by Congress, at ==. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | Recommended Reads | FOX NEWS: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == HOUSTON CHRONICLE: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | P.S. If you like my message and want to help me grow our conservative movement, ==. body:
On June 9, a poll of 868 Georgia registered voters showed Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock in a tie: 46 to 46.
#
Derek -
On June 9, a poll of 868 Georgia registered voters showed Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock in a tie: 46 to 46.
VoteVets started our $3 million ad buy in Georgia that day. It was a spot going after Herschel Walker for his role in a company defrauding veterans and it is the largest outside buy in the race.
A few weeks later, a poll came out showing Raphael Warnock grew a significant lead.
And how do we know it was us? Because we were one of the only independent expenditures in the field at the time.
Afterward, Republicans were forced to spend significant sums just to get it close to a tie.
The point is: our ads cut through the clutter. They move polls. We did it once, we can do it again.
But we cannot do it alone.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We will put your donation right to work helping ensure Senator Warnock is re-elected in Georgia’s runoff in a few weeks.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221118-1-15&t=1&akid=7171%2E3013755%2EnvxvLo)

subject: I signed a copy of my new memoir for you 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910524:6rumJ1GNX:m:1:3359512271:55DDD6B74D7B439E9BB255F58F2B6564:r "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative
supporter!")**_

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910524:6rumJ1GNX:m:1:3359512271:55DDD6B74D7B439E9BB255F58F2B6564:r "Kristi Noem book
image")
---
_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910524:6rumJ1GNX:m:1:3359512271:55DDD6B74D7B439E9BB255F58F2B6564:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! exclusive offer expires >>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Kristi Noem

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Lame Pelosi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Pelosi still holds the gavel for the next 6 weeks!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908724:6-QhJ1GNa:m:1:3345639852:F7853731B053D5044601DA2022BEAD23:r "Headline") Peter: We've done it! We've officially taken back Congress from Nancy Pelosi. Only one problem. She still holds the gavel for the next 6 weeks and plans to ram through last-minute Marxist legislation while she and the radical left are still in power. I'm ready to hold Pelosi's feet to the fire in her last grasp of Leftist lunacy. But I need you right by my side if we're going to stop her from completely ruining this country in this final lame-duck session. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me fend off Pelosi's final attempt at passing her Marxist programs?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908724:6-QhJ1GNa:m:1:3345639852:F7853731B053D5044601DA2022BEAD23:r "Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help me
fend off Pelosi’s final attempt at passing her Marxist programs?")** Now more than ever we MUST fight to stop Pelosi from pushing Biden's Marxist agenda in the final days of her reign:
* That's why I'm fighting to stop their spending bills.
* That's why I'm fighting to audit each and every one of the left's socialist spending programs and root out the corruption!
* That's why I'm fighting to investigate Hunter's Laptop.
* That's why I'm fighting to impeach Brandon.
* That's why I'm fighting to secure our border, our 2A rights, and our right to live freely.

**[I can only make this happen if you stand with me. Will you make a $50, $100, or $500 donation and help me show Pelosi that we refuse to let her ramrod her Marxist wish list in the waning days of her rule?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908724:6-QhJ1GNa:m:1:3345639852:F7853731B053D5044601DA2022BEAD23:r "I can only make this happen if you stand with me. Will you make a
$50, $100, or $500 donation and help me show Pelosi that we refuse to let her ramrod her Marxist wish list in the waning days of her rule?")** Even with the election still fresh and the holidays upon us, now is not the time to give up. **You can be assured Pelosi and the Left HOPE you will be too depressed or too distracted to care!** Instead, we've got to stay extra vigilant. We've got to show Pelosi that the people of this great country FLATLY reject her Marxist dream for this country. And you can do that by making your voice heard. **[The bigger the donation, the louder the noise we America First Patriots make.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908724:6-QhJ1GNa:m:1:3345639852:F7853731B053D5044601DA2022BEAD23:r "The bigger the donation, the louder the noise we America First
Patriots make.")** And while you and I know Pelosi has done a masterful job of making a mess of our nation, she can cause even more damage in her final days. I promise. **That 's why I need your help to stop her before she wrecks this country for good.** It's time to stand up for America by helping me fight back and protect our country from Pelosi and her Leftist allies. **[Please donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908724:6-QhJ1GNa:m:1:3345639852:F7853731B053D5044601DA2022BEAD23:r "Please donate today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. As we get ready to celebrate Thanksgiving and the holiday season, I want you to know how thankful I am that there are still so many freedom-loving patriots willing to stand by me and fight against the radical left. Your support has made a real difference this year and I apologize for having to deliver this news, **[but it's been a grueling year of legal and political battles which is why I need your donation of $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT to help me keep up the fight!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908724:6-QhJ1GNa:m:1:3345639852:F7853731B053D5044601DA2022BEAD23:r "but it’s been a grueling year of legal and
political battles which is why I need your donation of $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT to help me keep up the fight!")**

Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910540:6L27J1GEN:m:1:3360412034:448BB243F175A22878A4F50C93CA0B05:r "so I need

clean_body: America can't handle this loss | | | | | | | | | | Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick. It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6. Once again, it all comes down to Georgia. Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself. If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time. My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate. You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Peter? I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?" | | | | To victory, Herschel Walker U.S. Senate Candidate | | Paid for by Stand for America PAC. Friend,

With the stakes higher than ever in this race, I've got a simple question for you:

**What would you do if I told you how your donation of $5 today would help keep Georgia blue?**

Would you give $5, knowing it would keep the message of our people-powered campaign on TVs, computer screens, and radios across Georgia?

Would you give $5, knowing it would keep our offices open and our incredible staff on the ground, speaking heart to heart with Georgia voters?

Would you give $5, knowing thousands of other grassroots supporters like you are doing the same so that my campaign can reach every corner of Georgia?

That's how long we have before Dec. 6th’s runoff election to defend this seat.

**7 million.**
That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message.

That's how much more we’re aiming to raise before midnight to ramp up our voter mobilization efforts in this final stretch. **[Rev. name: Kristi Noem
subject: Claim your signed copy now Peter

body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908659:6gwba1GNp:m:1:3331703221:50C2A301298DAF14FA855F5394320ADB:r "Claim your signed
copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908659:6gwba1GNp:m:1:3331703221:50C2A301298DAF14FA855F5394320ADB:r "Kristi Noem book image")
---
_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908659:6gwba1GNp:m:1:3331703221:50C2A301298DAF14FA855F5394320ADB:r "CLAIM YOUR
SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! So, act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908659:6gwba1GNp:m:1:3331703221:50C2A301298DAF14FA855F5394320ADB:r "But I can’t sign one for everybody! So act now to secure your signed copy before this
exclusive offer expires >>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Kristi Noem

Orientation was a little bit surreal this week. Walking into the very same building I first entered as an intern in college some 20 years ago — and now seeing my name outside the door saying ”Senator-elect” is humbling. I’m going to work tirelessly every single day in the Senate to make Alabama proud for entrusting me with this incredible honor, responsibility, and privilege.
---

clean_body: | | | | | OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER | | Katie Begins Senate Orientation Orientation was a little bit surreal this week. Walking into the very same building I first entered as an intern in college some 20 years ago — and now seeing my name outside the door saying ”Senator-elect” is humbling. I’m going to work tirelessly every single day in the Senate to make Alabama proud for entrusting me with this incredible honor, responsibility, and privilege. | | Katie On Election Night I am going to work tirelessly in the U.S. Senate to better the lives of hardworking Alabamians in every corner of our great state. We are already busy building out a dynamic staff that is best suited to execute this mission. Together as a team, we will be ready to hit the ground running on Inauguration Day. I am eager to get to work on behalf of our state and our nation! | | Article Alert "We worked hard to reach out and to spread the conservative message to even atypical groups, to bring as many people into the fold as possible. Because I believe when people hear our plan, when they hear our vision, when they hear where we are on the policies, we will win. So it is my hope that we can do that, that we can come together, that we can step up and be a real force for change." | | Katie On Fox & Friends I was happy to visit with ahead of Senate orientation in Washington! I’m ready to hit the ground running to fight for hardworking families across our state and nation. | | Artemis I Launch Congratulations to everyone involved! Alabama is proud to elevate our legacy of space exploration to new generations through . It’s the innovation, talent, and grit of Alabamians that has Americans poised to return to the moon and then go where we’ve only dreamed of. | | Katie Britt Mugs | | | | | Check out these Katie Britt mugs! name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=303d3cd61d68476fa30d4548c00784ec&_e=Y5dwCIVqnlImjFVqOwA3NHuySUwCkIzDbPgbyGljhCjrvOhi-Vqb2kFvRAjafut8OIzYhFGuH1dfxeGZrUwZqrEJQQNI9s3_DXtRLL9d2dXRA9cIaNHHDdjKvNaydvSX3tXSTqi-d2ZQtZyzkBOyqCm2VBIauLBx-Ib_yHqGjl66urpg-XyYIUSYhOtecbnQ9fKhRNjYFHlXneuK-HsA1kzRN4Tl5ZBtoAWq1v9sVvrbZ_BKJ2EpZ5k6L05Zj_yB)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=303d3cd61d68476fa30d4548c00784ec&_e=Y5dwCIVqnlImjFVqOwA3NHuySUwCkIzDbPgbyGljhCjrvOhi-Vqb2kFvRAjafut8OIzYhFGuH1dfxeGZrUwZqrEJQQNI9s3_DXtRLL9d2dVGdcWn9djP_x6-pQMGPVVP7D40MV7dAcSiWwlZXLD0R0sGKkfYcAwMyUBROILN0sqBnhUYl7imdWFxL6FtDuOhUYJ3oxsvNn7UvpNHmc2mNy4Sm8iRsW2d3tqqQXerkD80fINaEBc_ARLN5j4L1Y0m)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=303d3cd61d68476fa30d4548c00784ec&_e=Y5dwCIVqnlImjFVqOwA3NHuySUwCkIzDbPgbyGljhCjrvOhi-Vqb2kFvRAjafut8OIzYhFGuH1dfxeGZrUwZqrEJQQNI9s3_DXtRLL9d2dVc14TnjJu-CdkHMqTnuk_BstjCVAYs7J9Dqg6Vz7u4HLkBKHQES75J4eKXVP3CYuwxSoicedAT8eAKOlwoqaqsxnJclEQpWmMn9QJdLsoifvL0gLeajClYfz-S4CWRh1qVtlCZk1ZSewAE9-DHrl94)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund

body:
Bringing Black voters to the GOP is KEY to helping Herschel win next month!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909247:JL3UP1GNq:m:1:3331421248:A66E0E6E1EA00A46CDA0E492603CF270:r "Headline") Peter: The Senate races in Arizona and Nevada were both within striking distance of flipping for the GOP...but that didn't happen. These were bitter losses -that will be questioned for a long time to come. But we've got another fight that needs to be won, and we can't afford to be demoralized for a moment. Electing the Republican candidate in Georgia, Herschel Walker, is the only way to help slow down Biden's agenda in the Senate. **We. Must. Help. Herschel. WIN!** **Campaign Finance records show that a Soros-backed PAC is dumping large sums of money targeting Black Voters to ensure Warnock defeats Herschel.** We have worked tirelessly for over a year on behalf of Herschel, but we need the resources to continue this all-important fight to conclusion. **[If you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help stop Chuck Schumer, who will be the Majority Leader from simply rolling over Republicans at every turn in the next Congress.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909247:JL3UP1GNq:m:1:3331421248:A66E0E6E1EA00A46CDA0E492603CF270:r "If you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more today, you can help stop
Chuck Schumer, who will be the Majority Leader from simply rolling over Republicans at every turn in the next Congress.")** We have the ability and the plan to help Herschel win, and we can help bring enough Black voters out for the GOP by December 6th. **We just need $83,928.21 to fully fund our "Get out the Republican vote" program in Black communities. The runoff election next month will depend on one thing and one thing only - turnout.** Warnock and the Democrats already think they've bought enough votes with liberal spending programs, loan forgiveness, defund policies, and their so-called fight for "abortion rights" Fortunately, we know that Black Voters, like most Americans, care about their family's safety and the high cost of living and prioritize kitchen table issues and belief in the Lord over allegiance to the Democrat Party, who has tried to keep them dependent on government handouts. And with your support, we'll be able to remind them that if Warnock wins the runoff, we're not going to be able to fix the damage he and Biden have done to this country. It's that simple! **[Will you help us reach our goal and help Herschel win the runoff? Donate TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909247:JL3UP1GNq:m:1:3331421248:A66E0E6E1EA00A46CDA0E492603CF270:r "Will you help us reach our goal and help Herschel win the runoff?
Donate TODAY!")** | | [SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $50 ››](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61909248:JL3UP1GNq:m:1:3331421248:A66E0E6E1EA00A46CDA0E492603CF270:r "SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER WITH $50")

name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: What’s next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
There's a lot we can learn from these midterms... | |
###### You are receiving this email because you're a supporter of Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. If you would like to unsubscribe or receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.php?r=140553949&l=48787&s=24CB&m=1190073&c=632087).
---
| | |
---
###### _A Message from..._
##### John Philip Sousa IV
###### National Chairman of Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
###### _Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee_
| Dear Peter, While it's true that minority voters are waking up and leaving the Democratic Party in increasing numbers year after year, we just did not convince enough Latinos and African Americans to vote Republican this year as it would take to win in the major battleground states. Nonetheless, thanks to your support, Stars and Stripes Forever PAC was able to run ads two weeks up to the general targeting Latino voters in the hottest/closest races in Connecticut, Georgia, Rhode Island, Nevada, North Carolina and Texas with mixed results. And though we hoped that Herschel Walker would be victorious over Democrat Incumbent Senator Raphael Warnock, Walker did garner enough votes to take the election to a run-off on Dec. 6. That is in itself an accomplishment since you and I both know how hard it is to defeat an incumbent and especially an incumbent that was able to outraise and outspend Walker by about $5 million. But frankly, the victory we are most excited about is TX-15 where Monica De La Cruz became the first Republican elected to serve in that Rio Grande Valley district. Yes, we are disappointed that there was not a RED SURGE as advance polling indicated, however, Republicans in Florida and New York experienced a Red Wave. In Florida, Latinos turned out in droves to hand GOP Sen. Marco Rubio and Gov. Ron DeSantis reelection victories in Florida, and in BLUE New York, Republicans picked up three House seats - including defeating the chairman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee. And, the best news of all, it's confirmed that Republicans won the majority in the House and that means Speaker Pelosi will be forced to relinquish her gavel and Republicans will have more power to thwart the Liberals' and President Biden's socialist agenda. More encouraging news is that preliminary exit polling suggest that Republicans had some continuing success eroding the Democratic Party's dominance with Latino voters by capturing 38% to 40% of the total Latino vote. **And that 's momentum for 2024!** There's a lot we can learn from these midterms as we dissect the battle plans, strategies and issues of those who won and those who lost. In addition, we need to analyze the effect Donald Trump had on many of these races and how many votes can be attributed to an _" anti-Trump"_ or _" pro-Trump"_ vote. And lastly, we must encourage the Republican Party to unite together before the 2024 Presidential Elections. **In the meantime, WE NEED TO GET ADS UP IN GEORGIA REACHING OUT TO AFRICAN AMERICANS (32%) AND LATINO (5%) VOTERS ON BEHALF OF HERSCHEL WALKER IMMEDIATELY.** **[Please donate today](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=140553949&msgid=1190073&act=24CB&c=632087&pid=30200371&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.starsandstripesforeverpac.org%2Findex.php%3Finfo%3D2022EU0401&cf=48787&v=acae857a81aed3e037c3f8a30846ca528f35d34a09a946dbd11e06996e00c11d) so we can go on the air to help secure a win for Walker in Georgia.** As always, it's my honor to fight alongside to you _" Take Our America Back"_ and thank you for your support.
---
|
---
_With gratitude,_ |
---
John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_

body:
|

Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904516:6c1Gf1GNQ:m:1:3368395361:25EF39C09BCD08765677BF0B75CFF569:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904516:6c1Gf1GNQ:m:1:3368395361:25EF39C09BCD08765677BF0B75CFF569:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904516:6c1Gf1GNQ:m:1:3368395361:25EF39C09BCD08765677BF0B75CFF569:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904516:6c1Gf1GNQ:m:1:3368395361:25EF39C09BCD08765677BF0B75CFF569:r)**

Thank you,

subject: Peter, I signed a copy of my new memoir for you
