body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So, this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908970:Jwevf1GNi:m:1:3350876382:95CDD8AA16B2E8A374ADF8043ADD4F16:r "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative
supporter!")**_

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908970:Jwevf1GNi:m:1:3350876382:95CDD8AA16B2E8A374ADF8043ADD4F16:r "Kristi Noem book
image")
---
_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908970:Jwevf1GNi:m:1:3350876382:95CDD8AA16B2E8A374ADF8043ADD4F16:r "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

_**[But I can't sign one for everybody! So, act now to secure your signed copy before this exclusive offer expires >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908970:Jwevf1GNi:m:1:3350876382:95CDD8AA16B2E8A374ADF8043ADD4F16:r "But I can’t sign one for everybody! exclusive offer expires >>>")**_

Thank you,

Governor Kristi Noem

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r "so I need
your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_
---
| | | | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r)
---
| | | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $10](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r)
---
| | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $20](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r)
---
| | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $30](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r)
---
| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Peter?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910532:6Xvdf1GzN:m:1:3359512271:65B604EA1822C063EE76C8664F1BD83C:r "so can I count on you
IMMEDIATELY?")**_
---

To victory,

Herschel Walker
U.S. Senate Candidate

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need you to stay on the field
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3536ca04b64348bc94402afb76926108&_e=y-GcPy2bL-erQAcZl9OBkS333Y28ii8aArJbWGudiYBn72k6cULhL3gjHwspthNoQX6xaJj00vAQfcjkNWZm8I3gBEe__O-4Am8dphfjSexeg_SjjrUdtS4hOIL7DNHt3yUlHeHBYxGc0YCbhJczIVTsJYvhzq9Yxp5Nx44GOwBxixTWK_-kTk9tT6ttEMcs6Ef79AcRPuyn088iCb3j_I42oWKBzcO9l7Auc7EHpeoY1R4L5gzr6sBGYFVimgPk8J2DZVfRKyB9UQoGeA1QYPQ9X26FAA-ofrSlAEljNa_N0LE912xvMki5cP1Xpw4oVsUDeWIXG6PRG15T2rBepik-fM_Nf_e666j-s1EHaue3m8Q_PwXPO9JBXdijWANf)
---
| | **RUNOFF ELECTION ALERT!!** **Runoff announced for Dec. 6**
---
| | Friend — my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.
---
But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we’re headed to a runoff election in Georgia. **_In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME._**
---
[**SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3536ca04b64348bc94402afb76926108&_e=y-GcPy2bL-erQAcZl9OBkS333Y28ii8aArJbWGudiYBn72k6cULhL3gjHwspthNoQX6xaJj00vAQfcjkNWZm8I3gBEe__O-4Am8dphfjSexeg_SjjrUdtS4hOIL7DNHt3yUlHeHBYxGc0YCbhJczIVTsJYvhzq9Yxp5Nx44GOwBxixTWK_-kTk9tT6ttEMcs6Ef79AcRPuyn088iCb3j_OGuE2NRDE5vG29LOO1YXXhpmlZ4TRzotN-pVAczRQYuNjAB-jFHLm5AuFT47WDzUBKc7fcmOVfTgUTPSBHXjFRi_Bv2xAFz3Vydu3Awz8y3Btmh4obkLq04Z-E3FcQDGLI9FTjvkN9ZyNDaJ8SERafP-zz_2427dQfThVL8z1Le)
---
I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team’s grit and determination. Overtime is grueling when you’ve been playing hard for four quarters. But we need to leave it all on the field if we’re going to pull off this win.
---
[**STAY ON THE FIELD FOR OVERTIME**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3536ca04b64348bc94402afb76926108&_e=y-GcPy2bL-erQAcZl9OBkS333Y28ii8aArJbWGudiYBn72k6cULhL3gjHwspthNoQX6xaJj00vAQfcjkNWZm8I3gBEe__O-4Am8dphfjSezYOZHhnlbGm76CDmxuLQIqsCBHUrWU0-fjO_RHJrvO1sIOLjf6uyqCboESDzP4bCZB0LUL4x1nNDD0u7DuJ6JcOcGuBg2sdJb5w1pnOMRQO7iE9o1e7Cp4u23z_3w_rIZJJXKFJCmoqNbaEV06MP6rBNhPkkdjvVkA96DT-Q3Xq6fq2ZxHZSUnERTBfT3KDzHCnQbLK0VaHmp92XLekvP2uZStmrfExUITGgB9vVPFaJ-shvX39lbjBqeW3DW0qYs%3D)
---
**If Republicans lose to Raphael Warnock for the second time in a row, Georgia will have two Democrat senators for at least the next four years.**_ _ We have a clear path to stop this liberal takeover of the Peach State._We must knock on every door, call every voter, and leave no stone unturned. But that only happens if every conservative pitches in._
---
[**SAVE GEORGIA NOW**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3536ca04b64348bc94402afb76926108&_e=y-GcPy2bL-erQAcZl9OBkS333Y28ii8aArJbWGudiYBn72k6cULhL3gjHwspthNoQX6xaJj00vAQfcjkNWZm8I3gBEe__O-4Am8dphfjSexeg_SjjrUdtS4hOIL7DNHt3yUlHeHBYxGc0YCbhJczIVTsJYvhzq9Yxp5Nx44GOwBxixTWK_-kTk9tT6ttEMcs6Ef79AcRPuyn088iCb3j_JhvgMx8PL3Eyh-g3bZXoaY1VaRluUQw1gZnNBoHdYFUoXAKOKIDosqQuSFdmPo3auSppEKyfWRH589gVWaRy0AoZvMmx-4qM4FBL2JNXi52sgK7yIb9VOHTJgc0BwmALY11hbmH__1DyZ7gi0kKiS8k_8UAS18JlqdG-CcOsvgX)
---
Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer have virtually unlimited resources to blanket Georgia with ads, but our resources are depleted after a long and expensive campaign. We need immediate support to flip this seat **RED** and execute our plan. **[Please, friend, will you rush $35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3536ca04b64348bc94402afb76926108&_e=y-GcPy2bL-erQAcZl9OBkS333Y28ii8aArJbWGudiYBn72k6cULhL3gjHwspthNoQX6xaJj00vAQfcjkNWZm8I3gBEe__O-4Am8dphfjSexeg_SjjrUdtS4hOIL7DNHt3yUlHeHBYxGc0YCbhJczIVTsJYvhzq9Yxp5Nx44GOwBxixTWK_-kTk9tT6ttEMcs6Ef79AcRPuyn088iCb3j_CU3kZeZ1eO7UIrAESFvN5iomElv6ecx-OBDvN0hyuS7uj2t23XIIL4MgILduLyFFZcxMphh3O1T6L_3mllpqI3Z9OpKKfQ7ezbNVYR8Pw3tIpQMingBvRFvx8gdGgZdrrWUkc3gYpKlg33j7fyMASoTiKzX9zVXaQ6S_yLv12W5)** Onward to victory,_ _ Herschel Walker
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=3536ca04b64348bc94402afb76926108&_e=y-GcPy2bL-erQAcZl9OBkS333Y28ii8aArJbWGudiYBn72k6cULhL3gjHwspthNoQX6xaJj00vAQfcjkNWZm8I3gBEe__O-4Am8dphfjSexeg_SjjrUdtS4hOIL7DNHt3yUlHeHBYxGc0YCbhJczIVTsJYvhzq9Yxp5Nx44GOwBxixTWK_-kTk9tT6ttEMcs6Ef79AcRPuyn088iCb3j_O74Q-Gknn0TDJzIF9ndVjNnHxwm5ynn4eE9sA5by8Tnswia1kEFrVfwevafA_Csuw1dhBG54U5C3MNFDeda7EAN38tfP3O6eqGZETFpVikV8j1DfMdSAdJ5h2Fc55VdpO-RFOthaHaa18oGDfuWx_z2LaMH66lxxNak_zKzSGDm)

clean_body: | | | | | RUNOFF ELECTION ALERT!! Runoff announced for Dec. 6 | | Friend — my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day. But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we’re headed to a runoff election in Georgia. In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME. I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team’s grit and determination. Overtime is grueling when you’ve been playing hard for four quarters. But we need to leave it all on the field if we’re going to pull off this win. If Republicans lose to Raphael Warnock for the second time in a row, Georgia will have two Democrat senators for at least the next four years. We have a clear path to stop this liberal takeover of the Peach State.We must knock on every door, call every voter, and leave no stone unturned. But that only happens if every conservative pitches in. Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer have virtually unlimited resources to blanket Georgia with ads, but our resources are depleted after a long and expensive campaign. We need immediate support to flip this seat RED and execute our plan. Onward to victory, Herschel Walker | | | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. Dear Hoosier Democrats, This week, the U.S. Senate voted to move forward on the Respect for Marriage Act which would enshrine federal marriage protections for LGBTQ or interracial couples. Now, all this bill needs is a majority vote from the Democratic Congress. How did Senator Mike Braun vote? He said "NO". _Are we surprised?_ This is not the first time Braun has expressed an extreme opinion on marriages. Let’s roll the tape from earlier this year: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782184/379639641/-1312324436?s=20&t=kqbayIiuNI7oSPQDe6s2lw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=&emci=a18897ff-4867-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=552fb8da-6267-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4925535) 3.22.2022_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782189/379639646/-1312324436?s=20&t=kqbayIiuNI7oSPQDe6s2lw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=&emci=a18897ff-4867-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=552fb8da-6267-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4925535) In response to the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act and Mike Braun’s “NO” vote, the Indiana Democratic Party released the following statement: _“The Respect for Marriage Act is not perfect, because should the ultra-conservative U.S. Supreme Court overturn nationwide marriage rights for LGBTQ or interracial couples, the ability to marry who you love would be[up for debate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782193/379639678/1235979006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=&emci=a18897ff-4867-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=552fb8da-6267-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4925535) in the Indiana General Assembly and up to a supermajority that has proved to be hostile toward minority communities._ _But even with these flaws, there's still much to celebrate with The Respect for Marriage Act since it would enshrine federal protections for LGBTQ and interracial marriages.[About 65-percent](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782198/379639680/1364277165?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=&emci=a18897ff-4867-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=552fb8da-6267-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4925535) of Hoosiers believe the right to marry who you love is an American right, and this legislation is a necessary step in the right direction._ _Despite high approval of this policy, Republicans like Mike Braun sided with his party's extremist wing. He opposed a measure that's business-friendly and would create a better future for everyone in the Hoosier State._ _Indiana Democrats celebrate the passage of The Respect for Marriage Act, because the more inclusive Indiana could be as a community, the closer the state gets to halting its brain drain and closer we get to creating a brighter economic future for everyone." -**Mike Schmuhl, Indiana Democratic Party Chair**_ **\- One Year since Democrats Passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act -** One year ago, Democrats like **André Carson** and **Frank Mrvan** delivered what Indiana Republicans never could: a once-in-a-generation investment in our nation’s infrastructure. The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act ([The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782207/379639684/2091091387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=&emci=a18897ff-4867-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=552fb8da-6267-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4925535)) is already transforming Indiana’s roads, bridges, railroads, ports, airports, and water systems. And, it’s connecting more Hoosiers to high-speed broadband than ever before. **[Click here for a full breakdown](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782226/379639724/-251687808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=&emci=a18897ff-4867-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=552fb8da-6267-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4925535) of The Jobs Act’s impact in the Hoosier State.** ******Indiana Democratic Party Chairman Mike Schmuhl** provided this statement on this one year anniversary of the law: _“While Indiana Republicans talked a big game about infrastructure on the campaign trail, they ultimately failed. Instead, Democratic leaders like André Carson and Frank Mrvan have delivered an infrastructure decade – no thanks to any elected official in the Indiana Republican Party._ _From Fort Wayne and Indianapolis to Tell City along the Ohio River and Northwest Indiana, Hoosiers are already starting to see progress on delivering safer roads, bridges, and drinking water, more affordable and accessible high-speed internet, good-paying jobs, and more — all because Democrats put the kitchen-table issues - not partisan agendas - first.”_ While Democrats’ leadership made The Jobs Act possible, every single Republican in Indiana’s Congressional Delegation voted against the law. Republicans put their extremist agenda ahead of creating a brighter future for the Crossroads of America. **DEC. 16 - INDEMS’ ANNUAL HOLIDAY PARTY** INDems wants to personally invite you to our annual Holiday Ball on Friday, December 16th! The event will be at the Skyline Club, located on the 36th floor of the One America building in Downtown Indianapolis (1 American Square Indianapolis, IN 46282). **Click[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782241/379639747/855522537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=) to purchase tickets. Event details are below:** **** This event is a great opportunity to celebrate the holiday season with fellow Hoosier Democrats. Heavy hors d’oeuvres and cocktails will be served. Additional sponsorship opportunities are available. Sponsors’ Reception tickets: $250
General Reception tickets: $100 Please RSVP to Daniela Cuervo at daniela@indems.org or purchase your tickets [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54782244/379639754/855522537?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJmYjhkYS02MjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vo0Jk46kWjJops1atdN86L8RNiA3nAcczh5bt_YKVWY=).
**\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring! -** **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at https://www.indems.org/jobs/ ###

Hi, friend, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

name: Claire, NDRC
subject: post-election update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
The bottom line is that this election gave our work a solid push forward, but there’s still much to do.
|
---

Hi team – emailing you today to bring you a post-election update on the NDRC’s effort to secure fair maps and strengthen our democracy. While this election gave our work a solid push forward, there's still much to do. The reality is that **many states are still gerrymandered – and that had consequences for the 2022 election results.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54783194/379641598/1926255334?amount=30&refcode=20221117.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEzN2U3YjZlLTYyNjctZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I9YUEvVis3cGD94yh_VDyuxNpBV5mk2x_utstaOKPJI=)
---
No one can deny our success in preventing gerrymandering in many key states – but, we can’t stop here. While this election gave our work a solid push forward, there's still much to do. A number of gerrymandering lawsuits are making their way through state and federal courts. Maps are expected to be redrawn in some states. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Speaker Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
We all owe Speaker Pelosi a debt of gratitude. |
#
---
Peter, Yesterday, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that she will not seek re-election to Democratic leadership, marking the end of an incredible, heroic tenure that spanned nearly two decades. Speaker Pelosi was the nation’s first woman to become the top Democratic leader of the House, and her ability to unify Democrats to deliver bold progress for the American people is unmatched. Thanks to her leadership, Democrats overcame immense obstacles to expand health care access to millions of Americans through the _Affordable Care Act_ , and provided a lifeline to struggling families and businesses during the COVID-19 pandemic through the _American Rescue Plan._ I remain honored to have witnessed Speaker Pelosi’s masterful work up close when I was the lead counsel during Donald Trump’s first impeachment trial, and I’ll never forget the grit with which she took to the important task of defending our nation’s integrity in the face of his blatant corruption. And when the chips were down on January 6th and insurrectionists were hunting down Speaker Pelosi and Democratic leadership, she acted with immense courage to ensure that our democracy would persevere and the transfer of power would occur. Our nation owes her a debt of gratitude for her actions to preserve our democracy. **Please join me in thanking Speaker Pelosi for her leadership and her remarkable legacy by adding your name next to mine.** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54801506/379685810/1711961897?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjY2MTVjMi04ZDY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVTZBqGY5i4qjXu88UhWKzxpq7uMKoWO5fHDoLdr5w0=&emci=5d6f7a91-8567-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9b6615c2-8d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=13556823)
---
Speaker Pelosi leaves big shoes to fill, and words cannot do justice to her service to the American people. I hope you will join me in honoring her by adding your name next to mine today.
Thank you,
Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54801507/379685811/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjY2MTVjMi04ZDY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CVTZBqGY5i4qjXu88UhWKzxpq7uMKoWO5fHDoLdr5w0=&emci=5d6f7a91-8567-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9b6615c2-8d67-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**

name: Primary Sinema
subject: Kyrsten Sinema is lying. Again.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_6AZqhw2I7b7qNcq0-JiOMaaKDLQlhXOss3fubc-haYnS7C-AW5_VA57coG2S1cCGWuvUC0-NM95EolhjQLaYdFXbMhD5JzjmHI7-3Ne7_6lHssaoiheX1ctvab9lYezcojBU2bds4VQHNpKDKgnx1kP2QhTTcVyCehmTTtw4llQx5lux8g_GPH5h35mSD2spPF_5ep2oBnXebjmgncYFO/3r9/viHPfjHLR-OIhKh0WJcn6A/h0/WPovPJQ06fkg5ujGdR96ERMcGixusnfB7XZ3mTVfwfg)
Peter, , **Kyrsten Sinema doesn’t care about abortion rights.** Of course she says she does – she’s even fundraised off it. But she’s lying. How do we know she’s lying? Because she’s still preventing the Senate from passing important abortion rights legislation that would reverse the damage done from the Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision. Simply put, we could have already passed the Women’s Health Protection Act if not for Sinema. Instead, Sinema is not only standing by the filibuster, she’s even doubling down on it. Sinema’s position, no matter how much she tries to obscure it, has allowed right-wing state legislators and Republican Governors across the country to enforce extreme abortion bans in dozens of states. In turn, those state laws have curtailed the freedom of millions of women and even put lives at risk. We’ve all heard the horror stories – pregnant minors forced to cross state lines, people in dire medical conditions refused life-saving interventions, women forced to carry non-viable fetuses. Remember: Sinema refuses to allow Senate Democrats to put a stop to this madness. The House, under Speaker Pelosi, has already passed the Women’s Health Protection Act. But in order for it to become law, the Senate has to pass it * **before the end of this year** * during the “lame duck” session. After January, Republicans will be in control of the House, and our chance to reverse the damage of Dobbs is gone. Then, Republican state governments will be free to keep placing more and more restrictions on our right to choose. (The same goes for voting rights, by the way.) When the people of Arizona elected Kyrsten Sinema in 2018, they did so with the belief she would protect our fundamental rights, not limit our freedoms to whatever Republicans agree not to filibuster. It’s up to us to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a REAL Democrat who will stand up for our rights and fight back against Republican efforts to limit our freedom. [**Can you contribute a few dollars to help us replace Sinema with a better Democrat in 2024?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSXrI5OMCUb8D2C24_lIUf3q82WxA5q441g_LnEAZXrv_qwjaBisRgBne4a4NkxK1AHTc9DIAQeW6wiT-7LghOXB-_vybp-eS8PdO3C8nZb6jfla-B_kLRaOMNs14qlWZq9X5A6dkiErdiF9if9DLP0Ue-2GXG0AFu0Do28bYZBtY8ZTcz5bAwcJ_zciPfIv7KEvvI4_4ezcA0p-l4nR0ebb4Fm4KaHMmi7DLpBmmTbYRqrCvYbwBmcITcQpDraLoHho8LmjvBH-b0EL12Ac50zQYNtk-5B3UZXIK3Sl0hZv0/3r9/viHPfjHLR-OIhKh0WJcn6A/h1/gBCpeNb40niMN_ZIler1gR4uyqJxXbrEFIT0T1Aa5XE) [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSXrI5OMCUb8D2C24_lIUf3mn4h3LAAAwtEqQyGHabrfZ5stKcpME2qhBFBshm_rmHqG9_Eoi_kRoL1M8v_Q7fSFntZjJ6MSViHqcOpVSIj4y2y2wbtdm6ARYVjxWVHWh7TF1OPCwKJ59s-qXULGRF35P8h-LVNz4pNanTMFnk_TUf25rTeSS8MBpSHJ8UKeoXrFYH_dOq1wojSo3m6OqTlcvuxQnkMnwPGD-8sM_6BtYxUZDee3Kgtt2QAWBowB32snnSXzMmmHZPPDOFiDtBSvEefpLSST_49qUIjdDAJW8/3r9/viHPfjHLR-OIhKh0WJcn6A/h2/XKyHLXZ1sAUNxcxqY64WvKuOveQmm-tM8-2GUma2eE4)Thanks for all you’re doing to help. -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: American Briefing

body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6450%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=rThUCi7ZRy5kf3q8EzFSqg&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83970%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2f%2fNlZ0u41pTluI9PcsN8g&sysid=1)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83971%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4IOpnhYbcwW4aJZrksry5Q&sysid=1)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83972%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dYii1r0c1sEcfzIv73AgUw&sysid=1)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83971%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4IOpnhYbcwW4aJZrksry5Q&sysid=1)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83973%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RyRAkYYn3Te5%2fjRPfusigA&sysid=1)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83974%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rpJfIRm4TO7LBTQ6Em1dsQ&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Tim Scott
subject: An oxymoron
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

First, Joe Biden told voters, "you ain't black" if they were still deciding between voting for him or Donald Trump.

Then, a liberal MSNBC guest called Winsome Sears 'The Black Mouth Of White Supremacy' when she became the first woman elected to the office of Lt. Governor in Virginia as a Black Republican.

Now, the co-host of "The View," Sunny Hostin, recently said on air that she "doesn't understand black Republicans," and that a black Republican is "an oxymoron."

I've seen more than my share of vicious opposition from "liberals" who want to tear me down simply because my life story is a direct rebuke to everything they're constantly saying about how our nation is "irredeemably racist" and how the "deck is stacked against" people like me.

I am the first African American Republican to serve in the U.S. Senate since 1979. And I am the first African American EVER to represent South Carolina in the U.S. Senate.

Peter, Democrats' divisiveness only hurts our country, and it is deeply saddening to see.

**[I'm reaching out to you today because I know I can count on you to show the Democrats that the GOP is indeed the big tent party - and we won't let their divisiveness tear our nation down.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908056:J5ANM1G-N:m:1:3317145305:CE04F57567083582AD7E9654428918A2:r "I’m
reaching out to you today because I know I can count on you to show the Democrats that the GOP is indeed the big tent party - and we won’t let
their divisiveness tear our nation down.")**

As a Black man from South Carolina who was raised by a single mom who routinely worked double shifts to provide for my brother and me, I will always be grateful for the opportunities our nation has provided me and my family.

And I will defend those opportunities for your family and for the next generation. **[That's why I am asking that you join me and support State GOP Leaders that are upholding the values that make our country Great.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908056:J5ANM1G-N:m:1:3317145305:CE04F57567083582AD7E9654428918A2:r "That’s why I am asking that you join me and support State GOP Leaders that are upholding
the values that make our country Great.")**
---
| | [JOIN ME & SUPPORT STATE GOP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908057:J5ANM1G-N:m:1:3317145305:CE04F57567083582AD7E9654428918A2:r)
---
Your support today is crucial to help more State Republicans stand up against Joe Biden's radical administration and protect the American Dream before it's permanently destroyed by open borders and Socialism.

Thank you in advance, Peter for supporting State Republican candidates at this important time for America.

Sincerely,

Senator Tim Scott (R - South Carolina)

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: We WON Re-Election! ...but a recount is imminent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | | [WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907749:JsVkM1GZN:m:1:3370555685:A6C289A002B413909371924F2419D792:r "WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY
>>")
---
| Dear Peter --

_**We have won this race!**_

With less than 200 votes left to be tallied, we are up by over 500 votes. So, I am very delighted to confidently declare victory in this hard-fought race.

I recorded a quick video last night in front of ~~Pelosi's House~~ the _**People's House**_ to thank supporters and update them about next steps. [Watch >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907749:JsVkM1GZN:m:1:3370555685:A6C289A002B413909371924F2419D792:r)

**However, the fight is not over. Because of the razor-thin margin, Colorado law mandates an automatic recount. This will be an ongoing process that will conclude in early December.**

Our lawyers are telling us we need to brace for a bitter fight, and because of this we have to double down on our fundraising efforts. Please support our special [ Recount Fund ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907749:JsVkM1GZN:m:1:3370555685:A6C289A002B413909371924F2419D792:r) with your most generous donation.
---
| [URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907749:JsVkM1GZN:m:1:3370555685:A6C289A002B413909371924F2419D792:r "URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>")
---
| Big Democrat donors are flooding my lying, leftwing opponent with cash in the hopes of him winning the recount. _**Our House majority is so slim, it's never been more clear that we must HOLD THIS DISTRICT.**_

Sources tell us the [recount may be announced tomorrow](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907749:JsVkM1GZN:m:1:3370555685:A6C289A002B413909371924F2419D792:r). So time is truly of the essence.

I cannot tell you how grateful I am to patriots like you, Peter, who have supported my campaign.

**But time is of the essence and we can't become complacent.** So I must ask that you too [double-down your support by making a quick online donation right now >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61907749:JsVkM1GZN:m:1:3370555685:A6C289A002B413909371924F2419D792:r)

We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans occur during the recount and affect the outcome of this race.

clean_body: | | | | | | | "WATCH: Lauren Declares VICTORY >" | Dear Peter -- We have won this race! With less than 200 votes left to be tallied, we are up by over 500 votes. So, I am very delighted to confidently declare victory in this hard-fought race. I recorded a quick video last night in front of ~~Pelosi's House~~ the People's House to thank supporters and update them about next steps. However, the fight is not over. Because of the razor-thin margin, Colorado law mandates an automatic recount. This will be an ongoing process that will conclude in early December. Our lawyers are telling us we need to brace for a bitter fight, and because of this we have to double down on our fundraising efforts. Please support our special with your most generous donation. | "URGENT: Donate to the Recount Fund >>" | Big Democrat donors are flooding my lying, leftwing opponent with cash in the hopes of him winning the recount. Our House majority is so slim, it's never been more clear that we must HOLD THIS DISTRICT. Sources tell us the . So time is truly of the essence. I cannot tell you how grateful I am to patriots like you, Peter, who have supported my campaign. But time is of the essence and we can't become complacent. So I must ask that you too We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans occur during the recount and affect the outcome of this race. My friend, Larry Hogan's time as Governor of Maryland is coming to the end, and he has begun a peaceful, smooth, and orderly transition of power to the incoming governor, Wes Moore. Look, Governor Hogan and Moore are from two different parties, and they have different philosophies – but they are both committed to the people they serve. That commonality is what should provide every public servant with a baseline respect for one another and the office they hold. Governor Hogan refuses to allow partisan politics to be a detriment to the people he has worked so hard to support, uplift, and lead for the last eight years. A peaceful transition of power will ensure that government continues to function and serve the people as efficiently as possible.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=892abb074e4644ec91c8d491e13fcdc6&_e=Z9R1WqSGBJp3sMM5zAuSnVJuVcHCtfl5WeqFcMbkpUaQz9mb8duR3tnsYoGc5y2l3xbRhHjq7MtiyxtNTjDsNaxo0pwWnnbpzZDqOajAdrUixsqoG53WJjmCg6KXqN9-VKwHpWfMXMp7ERWvj1Icw1dqx6wfG1WS3B4SKZHmBDaIzs9dll5UqSulF3A0_JIH5BCLld86r7uPVxh67KslHp0T_8MFdWSTl1C6myH6mkt0ae4Z4hWbKbtFk8r5bQcpkxOVVQXbQbktwVeQLGoVOA%3D%3D)

name: Team Tuberville
subject: ** Save College Sports Petition **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Take a moment to add your name >>>
| | | Peter, There’s no two ways about it – the NCAA’s interim name, image, likeness (NIL) policy is a complete and total mess. Regulation of compensation of student athletes has largely been left to individual states, conferences, and universities, **creating a free-for-all described as a “race to the bottom” that has put the future of college sports at risk.** This is an issue that is near and dear to Coach’s heart. For months, he’s been working with Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia on bipartisan legislation to establish guidelines that will promote success for students both on and off the field. Coach believes top collegiate athletes should be able to make money. He also knows they need clarity and fairness when navigating the NIL landscape – it’s time to have everyone operating under the same rules. Today, we’re asking you to show that you support Coach’s work on this issue. [**Take a moment now to sign our Save College Sports Petition >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/c3747abafb76d8e3/96a422b455c96505c3d6b838967d376c/33013) It’s vital that we demonstrate a groundswell of grassroots support to FIX this mess. \- Team Tuberville

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: My thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
My thanks to you and to all who made this campaign possible.

We chose to take on the greatest attack on democracy, on decency, on
individual freedoms and constitutional rights anywhere in America.

And we did so regardless of the odds or the challenges we’d encounter
along the way. When many were tempted to submit to the status quo, we
chose to fight.

In a country where so many Democrats found themselves on the defensive,
trying to hold seats and majorities, we made Texas one of the few places
in America where we could take the initiative.

The staff that our manager Nick Rathod put together was dedicated and
relentless in bringing their experiences and expertise to bear on the
challenge of winning political power in Texas.

The volunteers that, by the tens of thousands, signed up to knock on doors
and meet voters where they are made this campaign about the people of
Texas, and importantly, about the people who are so often written off or
taken for granted... those who have not always voted, or registered or been
heard from or counted in the past. Our goal was to make the targets of
suppression and intimidation a decisive new force in the Texas electorate.

Our donors funded the best-resourced campaign to ever challenge the status
quo in Texas. We broke fundraising records, out-raised the incumbent in
three reporting periods, and gave the campaign a fighting chance against a
Governor who started $50 million ahead.

Our message: after eight years of failure from a governor who couldn’t
keep the lights on, who couldn’t keep our kids safe in school, who was
failing in the basic responsibilities of public education and public
health, who signed the most extreme abortion ban in America, who has made
it harder to vote in Texas than in any other state, who has kept the
minimum wage at $7.25 and whose extremist agenda and incompetent
management hurts business growth and economic development — we need to
turn the page on Greg Abbott and vote for change.

That change is something most of us — Democrats, Republicans, Independents
— want: a Texas where a woman makes her own decisions about her own body
and future; one where the lives of our kids are prioritized over the
interests of the NRA; one where a high quality, fully funded public
education is available to all children; one where we expand Medicaid so
that we are no longer the least-insured state in America, where you can
afford to see a doctor, fill a prescription, take your child to a mental
health care provider; one where we create high-paying, high-value jobs
that allow us to successfully confront the climate crisis by renewing our
energy leadership, a Texas where we are no longer defined by our
differences or asked to be afraid of or hate our fellow Texans.

In other words: a Texas where we are free enough and healthy enough to
pursue our potential and fulfill our promise as the greatest state in the
Union.

We took that message everywhere, no town too small or
Republican-represented, no neighborhood too urban or reliably Democratic.
We refused to write anybody off or take anyone for granted. We held
hundreds of town hall meetings all over the state, where folks could ask
any question, raise any issue, elevate any idea or need.

Spearman, San Antonio, Dumas, Dallas, Texarkana, Fort Worth, El Paso, Del
Rio, Pampa, Beaumont, Buda, Quanah, Amarillo, Pecos, Muleshoe, Houston,
Wichita Falls, Port Arthur, Pittsburg, Palestine, Arlington, DeSoto,
Austin, San Angelo, Abilene, McAllen, San Benito, San Juan, Sherman,
Edinburg, Eagle Pass, Brownsville, Paris, Brenham, Childress, El Campo,
Victoria. Literally hundreds more to name.

As I write the names of these towns, faces, stories, emotions come to
mind. Unforgettable hope that I felt, the way in which being together,
listening to each other, gave us all something and someone to fight for,
showed that we could come together despite our differences to do right by
one another. We are truly part of something bigger than any one of us.

[1]Photo of Beto speaking to crowd

The sheer size of this state and its monumental beauty, constantly being
revealed as we traveled down its highways, freeways and county roads,
reminded us of just how big. The stark skyline of the Panhandle, broken by
giant grain silos and the dramatic unexpected appearance of canyons and
gorges. The palm trees, neighborhood parks and Taco Palenques, the
brightly painted homes of the RGV. The peaceful rolling unwalled river of
Laredo. The deep green pine curtain of East Texas, eighteen wheelers
loaded with timber lumbering down the highway. The rolling hills of
Fredericksburg and central Texas. The mountains and desert of far west
Texas, home. The vastness and incomparable beauty of this land.

Throughout this great big state, we sought out coalitions and
constituencies that had been ignored or neglected by the political process
and candidates from both parties in the past.

We complemented that with a dedicated team of social media storytellers
who elevated the experiences and perspectives of our fellow Texans in
videos that allowed them to tell their own stories in their own words. We
sought out and engaged with local press in all 20 markets, everywhere in
English and Spanish.

We created ads to carry our message that ran on broadcast, cable, radio
and digital platforms to reach those whom we couldn’t meet in person.

And we made significant investments in data, cleaning up a voter file that
had millions of wrong phone numbers, bad addresses and incomplete voter
information, all of which allowed us to target current and potential Texas
voters much more accurately, efficiently and effectively.

But as strong, determined and disciplined a campaign as we ran, it wasn’t
enough this time.

Though we raised an unprecedented amount of money, Abbott outspent us by
2-1.

Though we fielded the largest volunteer army in Texas electoral history,
one that grew to over 100,000 people by election day, we had to contend
with the most repressive voter laws in the country making it harder to
register and cast a ballot in Texas than in any other state.

And though we gave this everything we had, including a year of our life on
the road away from family, fighting with every ounce of effort and energy,
we lost the election.

Greg Abbott won another four-year term and it is likely that the deep
damage he and those in power are doing to this state will continue.

I am disappointed but I am not deterred or defeated. Good has come from
our efforts and good will continue to come from them.

Though we lost our race, we helped those in other key races win theirs.
More than $15 million was spent against judges and key leaders that we
helped to elect in 2018 in Harris County. Our efforts in this cycle foiled
these attacks, preserved the valuable gains we made in the past, and even
increased our majority on the commissioner’s court in the largest and most
diverse county in Texas.

The expected “Red Wave” that threatened to sweep the Rio Grande Valley was
met by superior organizing, investment and work ethic by our campaign and
allies in South Texas. We helped reclaim a Congressional seat, hold others
that were targeted by national Republican leaders and restore the ability
for Democrats up and down the ballot to win important races in one of the
most hotly contested regions in the country.

And this campaign produced value that will live far beyond election night.
Whether it is the data, the systems, the trained volunteers and organizing
staff, or the lessons learned, we are committed to applying all of this to
the continued fight for a better Texas.

This election is a battle in a much larger fight for the future of Texas.
The issues we fought for — from reproductive freedom to safe schools to
the right to vote — and the people who inspired us — like the families in
Uvalde — are too important for us to simply give up after this one
outcome. The threats directed against our fellow Texans are too grave to
abandon them just because the path ahead is difficult and uncertain.

Plus, there’s something else that we produced in this campaign that is
impossible to measure but more important than anything else that our
efforts generated. We gave each other hope. Hope that Texas can be better,
that we will be able to deliver on the expectations that we raised. That
we are going to win this fight, one way or another, one day or another.
Hope that we are better than our current circumstances and current
leaders.

It's a powerful, precious thing and cannot be wasted. Our responsibility
is to ensure that this hope is not a false one. We must stay in this
fight, we must keep this faith with one another, we must ultimately win.

If anything, last Tuesday and this entire last year, the last five years
for that matter, show us that this is going to be a long, tough road. We
don’t know how long, how tough, but we know that we must travel it
together and keep moving until we get to our destination.

Think of those who came before us that made our fight possible. Think
about the roads they traveled, at the risk to and sometimes loss of their
lives, long lonely roads that stretched for decades before the Civil
Rights Act and the Voting Rights Act were signed; the steady unrelenting
march that led to reproductive freedom, marriage equality and workers’
rights. In the shadow of their sacrifice, service and struggle — now that
everything they’ve won is under attack — who are we not to do our part?

And it sure beats the alternative — waiting for someone else to rescue us,
or for things to get better of their own accord, or just accepting that
the status quo will be our future, our fortune, our fate. Action at this
moment of truth is everything. It is the antidote to despair and the key
to victory.

Amy and I hold you in the deepest gratitude and respect for your
commitment to this fight, to being on this road with us and so many
millions of our fellow Texans. We are in this fight for life. Though we
don’t know the role we’ll play, we know the way is forward and with you.

We look forward to seeing you out there before long.

Sincerely,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=217271%2E444211%2E2ON-ET

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
clean_body: My thanks to you and to all who made this campaign possible. We chose to take on the greatest attack on democracy, on decency, on individual freedoms and constitutional rights anywhere in America. And we did so regardless of the odds or the challenges we’d encounter along the way. When many were tempted to submit to the status quo, we chose to fight. In a country where so many Democrats found themselves on the defensive, trying to hold seats and majorities, we made Texas one of the few places in America where we could take the initiative. The staff that our manager Nick Rathod put together was dedicated and relentless in bringing their experiences and expertise to bear on the challenge of winning political power in Texas. The volunteers that, by the tens of thousands, signed up to knock on doors and meet voters where they are made this campaign about the people of Texas, and importantly, about the people who are so often written off or taken for granted... those who have not always voted, or registered or been heard from or counted in the past. Our goal was to make the targets of suppression and intimidation a decisive new force in the Texas electorate. Our donors funded the best-resourced campaign to ever challenge the status quo in Texas. We broke fundraising records, out-raised the incumbent in three reporting periods, and gave the campaign a fighting chance against a Governor who started $50 million ahead. Our message: after eight years of failure from a governor who couldn’t keep the lights on, who couldn’t keep our kids safe in school, who was failing in the basic responsibilities of public education and public health, who signed the most extreme abortion ban in America, who has made it harder to vote in Texas than in any other state, who has kept the minimum wage at $7.25 and whose extremist agenda and incompetent management hurts business growth and economic development — we need to turn the page on Greg Abbott and vote for change. That change is something most of us — Democrats, Republicans, Independents — want: a Texas where a woman makes her own decisions about her own body and future; one where the lives of our kids are prioritized over the interests of the NRA; one where a high quality, fully funded public education is available to all children; one where we expand Medicaid so that we are no longer the least-insured state in America, where you can afford to see a doctor, fill a prescription, take your child to a mental health care provider; one where we create high-paying, high-value jobs that allow us to successfully confront the climate crisis by renewing our energy leadership, a Texas where we are no longer defined by our differences or asked to be afraid of or hate our fellow Texans. In other words: a Texas where we are free enough and healthy enough to pursue our potential and fulfill our promise as the greatest state in the Union. We took that message everywhere, no town too small or Republican-represented, no neighborhood too urban or reliably Democratic. We refused to write anybody off or take anyone for granted. We held hundreds of town hall meetings all over the state, where folks could ask any question, raise any issue, elevate any idea or need. Spearman, San Antonio, Dumas, Dallas, Texarkana, Fort Worth, El Paso, Del Rio, Pampa, Beaumont, Buda, Quanah, Amarillo, Pecos, Muleshoe, Houston, Wichita Falls, Port Arthur, Pittsburg, Palestine, Arlington, DeSoto, Austin, San Angelo, Abilene, McAllen, San Benito, San Juan, Sherman, Edinburg, Eagle Pass, Brownsville, Paris, Brenham, Childress, El Campo, Victoria. Literally hundreds more to name. As I write the names of these towns, faces, stories, emotions come to mind. Unforgettable hope that I felt, the way in which being together, listening to each other, gave us all something and someone to fight for, showed that we could come together despite our differences to do right by one another. We are truly part of something bigger than any one of us. [1]Photo of Beto speaking to crowd The sheer size of this state and its monumental beauty, constantly being revealed as we traveled down its highways, freeways and county roads, reminded us of just how big. The stark skyline of the Panhandle, broken by giant grain silos and the dramatic unexpected appearance of canyons and gorges. The palm trees, neighborhood parks and Taco Palenques, the brightly painted homes of the RGV. The peaceful rolling unwalled river of Laredo. The deep green pine curtain of East Texas, eighteen wheelers loaded with timber lumbering down the highway. The rolling hills of Fredericksburg and central Texas. The mountains and desert of far west Texas, home. The vastness and incomparable beauty of this land. Throughout this great big state, we sought out coalitions and constituencies that had been ignored or neglected by the political process and candidates from both parties in the past. We complemented that with a dedicated team of social media storytellers who elevated the experiences and perspectives of our fellow Texans in videos that allowed them to tell their own stories in their own words. We sought out and engaged with local press in all 20 markets, everywhere in English and Spanish. We created ads to carry our message that ran on broadcast, cable, radio and digital platforms to reach those whom we couldn’t meet in person. And we made significant investments in data, cleaning up a voter file that had millions of wrong phone numbers, bad addresses and incomplete voter information, all of which allowed us to target current and potential Texas voters much more accurately, efficiently and effectively. But as strong, determined and disciplined a campaign as we ran, it wasn’t enough this time. Though we raised an unprecedented amount of money, Abbott outspent us by 2-1. Though we fielded the largest volunteer army in Texas electoral history, one that grew to over 100,000 people by election day, we had to contend with the most repressive voter laws in the country making it harder to register and cast a ballot in Texas than in any other state. And though we gave this everything we had, including a year of our life on the road away from family, fighting with every ounce of effort and energy, we lost the election. Greg Abbott won another four-year term and it is likely that the deep damage he and those in power are doing to this state will continue. I am disappointed but I am not deterred or defeated. Good has come from our efforts and good will continue to come from them. Though we lost our race, we helped those in other key races win theirs. More than $15 million was spent against judges and key leaders that we helped to elect in 2018 in Harris County. Our efforts in this cycle foiled these attacks, preserved the valuable gains we made in the past, and even increased our majority on the commissioner’s court in the largest and most diverse county in Texas. The expected “Red Wave” that threatened to sweep the Rio Grande Valley was met by superior organizing, investment and work ethic by our campaign and allies in South Texas. We helped reclaim a Congressional seat, hold others that were targeted by national Republican leaders and restore the ability for Democrats up and down the ballot to win important races in one of the most hotly contested regions in the country. And this campaign produced value that will live far beyond election night. Whether it is the data, the systems, the trained volunteers and organizing staff, or the lessons learned, we are committed to applying all of this to the continued fight for a better Texas. This election is a battle in a much larger fight for the future of Texas. The issues we fought for — from reproductive freedom to safe schools to the right to vote — and the people who inspired us — like the families in Uvalde — are too important for us to simply give up after this one outcome. The threats directed against our fellow Texans are too grave to abandon them just because the path ahead is difficult and uncertain. Plus, there’s something else that we produced in this campaign that is impossible to measure but more important than anything else that our efforts generated. We gave each other hope. Hope that Texas can be better, that we will be able to deliver on the expectations that we raised. That we are going to win this fight, one way or another, one day or another. Hope that we are better than our current circumstances and current leaders. It's a powerful, precious thing and cannot be wasted. Our responsibility is to ensure that this hope is not a false one. We must stay in this fight, we must keep this faith with one another, we must ultimately win. If anything, last Tuesday and this entire last year, the last five years for that matter, show us that this is going to be a long, tough road. We don’t know how long, how tough, but we know that we must travel it together and keep moving until we get to our destination. Think of those who came before us that made our fight possible. Think about the roads they traveled, at the risk to and sometimes loss of their lives, long lonely roads that stretched for decades before the Civil Rights Act and the Voting Rights Act were signed; the steady unrelenting march that led to reproductive freedom, marriage equality and workers’ rights. In the shadow of their sacrifice, service and struggle — now that everything they’ve won is under attack — who are we not to do our part? And it sure beats the alternative — waiting for someone else to rescue us, or for things to get better of their own accord, or just accepting that the status quo will be our future, our fortune, our fate. Action at this moment of truth is everything. It is the antidote to despair and the key to victory. Amy and I hold you in the deepest gratitude and respect for your commitment to this fight, to being on this road with us and so many millions of our fellow Texans. We are in this fight for life. Though we don’t know the role we’ll play, we know the way is forward and with you. We look forward to seeing you out there before long. Sincerely, Beto

subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgcj0jma7crn7krhtmkg0qi2qpgv93e0c9be8nqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfasjh65gjbc5gmjge3cr3mipnapjkmdiecc5jmiqm6pbjckqe1oj5eup33d726srt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9o6ctj4mdgefchmcoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm1o74chgm6o324no)
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm20k21fr2im1icb6na80ib5af0kg439l98dkc30_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i68ob3c1h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z78hqn3hh1fev7kbdh35h29k4miteqj1i515anco_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i68ob3c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ctunc0sf1mg8k1cfkdgctsbuvae63s5uqs95s8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i68ob3c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Illinois Review: Weekly Recap of our Top Stories You Won't Want to Miss
body:
>From Nancy Pelosi stepping down to Donald Trump announcing his 2024 run, it's been a BIG week, and we have it all covered! Check it out now!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/2faa7340e4f4/illinois-review-weekly-recap-of-our-top-stories-you-wont-want-to-miss?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Subscribe today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Failed Leadership to Blame for Illinois Losses, Not Donald Trump (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/failed-leadership-to-blame-for-illinois-losses-not-donald-trump.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Blaming Donald Trump is a play out of the Democrats playbook – so why are Republicans using it as well? If there was ever a case for “collusion” – this would be it. Republicans borrowing attack lines from the Democrats. And in the end, it’s the people of Illinois who lose – especially Republican voters. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/failed-leadership-to-blame-for-illinois-losses-not-donald-trump.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Nancy Pelosi, You're Fired! (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/nancy-pelosi-youre-fired.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The results are in – and Nancy Pelosi is fired. In a speech that paralyzed Washington, outgoing House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that she would not seek re-election as leader of the Democratic Caucus in the next Congress – bringing to an end a two-decade career as Democratic leader. Pelosi served as the first female Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. She has served in the House for 35 years. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/nancy-pelosi-youre-fired.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Rep. Miller: Illinois Can No Longer Afford to Ignore Business Community Warnings (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/lllinois-can-no-longer-afford-to-ignore-business-community-warnings.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

There is no reason for Illinois to be losing companies. Bad leadership has created a hostile business environment – an environment the business community has warned us about for years. If we want to become a destination for jobs and opportunities, then we must heed the warnings of job creators and enact better policies. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/lllinois-can-no-longer-afford-to-ignore-business-community-warnings.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

President Trump Makes it Official: America's Comeback Starts Right Now (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/president-trump-makes-it-official-americas-comeback-starts-right-now.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a highly anticipated speech, former President Donald J. Trump made it official and announced on Tuesday evening that he is running for President of the United States in front of a packed ballroom at his Mar-a-Lago residence in Palm Beach, Florida.

“In order to make America great and glorious again, I am tonight announcing my candidacy for president of the United States,” former President Trump said. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/president-trump-makes-it-official-americas-comeback-starts-right-now.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The 2022 Aftermath: Learning Lessons, Day by Day (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/the-2022-aftermath-learning-lessons-day-by-day.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
We expected a red wave, and we were told we didn’t get one, but then, as the dust settled, day by day, this turns out to have been an unusually mixed election. Writing from here in Illinois, of course, we were blindsided, though perhaps we shouldn’t have been. Illinois had no bright spots at all, losing all the statewide races, state supreme court races, even all the competitive US House seats. Why? How? Well, even if there’s a national trend and you spend tens of millions of dollars campaigning, it still matters how you campaign, and how you spend those millions. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/the-2022-aftermath-learning-lessons-day-by-day.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Leading Conservative News Publication Illinois Review Welcomes New Ownership Team (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/illinois-review-welcomes-new-ownership-team.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Illinois Review (IR) announced on Tuesday a new ownership team that includes conservative radio show host and Newsmax columnist Mark Vargas and Chicago attorney and former US congressional candidate Scott Kaspar. The widely recognized and conservative publication on Illinois news was founded in 2005 by conservative leaders Fran Eaton and Dennis LaComb. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/illinois-review-welcomes-new-ownership-team.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================

** Vargas: Time for Illinois' Failed Political
Consultants to Close up Shop (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-time-for-illinois-failed-political-consultants-to-close-up-shop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The Election Results are in, and I know many of you are disappointed – even depressed. It wasn’t just a bad night for our statewide candidates – it was a bad night for all Republicans in Illinois – up and down the ballot. From the governor’s race down to state House and state Senate races – we lost big. ** Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-time-for-illinois-failed-political-consultants-to-close-up-shop.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=19cb519877-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_18_04_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-19cb519877-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Just five bucks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z18hvv94tjgrrj9p455soqekgdso1g25i3pdnn20_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6cp68stmc3ij5dpmehi69c36m6or8phke5imccjlc5geas74e5i7dc7665qj1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36epib6ob7mpj6cd30m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z08l4itmart9altt0o597k3nc9tjkt3cr6itk410_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8ek9m8213acb0o1ltmqp2lk1go3aog3qmhhlen8_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk6u1debllg6b3b4m4mmvlnjsp2iu3mcdbimsts8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zecflmtv8gaps04c5949ak8snpdna96esa97ogv0_)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1e34qhq9b213t57devrgr7qmte8k9bkkjk0olig_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfskpt61ce31obkqmqq5bfhgm6d93k3me724p54o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjhunpog8sdthbjpdeqa6f2gllrvkrhhkatpkmog_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfldv0a9rfejp46q9l0n2gb44oo3npn801ms5eeo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i64o33c1h2bs)

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Herschel Walker
subject: I will be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910528:671Wz1GkN:m:1:3373497171:C9F9C8FF47F22808946BF36316997CD0:r)
---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910528:671Wz1GkN:m:1:3373497171:C9F9C8FF47F22808946BF36316997CD0:r "so I need
your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

---
| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Peter?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910528:671Wz1GkN:m:1:3373497171:C9F9C8FF47F22808946BF36316997CD0:r "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?")**_

To victory,

Herschel Walker
U.S. Senate Candidate

| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910419:Jjazz1GCN:m:1:3253819041:D31AD85972966F200BCEF87570256621:r "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_
