name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Ticketmaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Price gouging doesn’t stop at concert tickets.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221118-3628-header&t=1&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)
We’ve known for a long time that monopolies are trouble, but this week’s Ticketmaster debacle is causing major bad blood.
As Alexandria pointed out this week, Ticketmaster is a monopoly and its merger with LiveNation should never have been approved.
Ticketmaster needs to be reigned in. It’s time to **break them up**.
[There’s a movement pushing the Department of Justice to investigate Ticketmaster and take on their monopoly. If you agree, will you send an email to the Justice Department here to add your voice? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/ticketmaster-doj/?source=em20221118-3628-P&t=2&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)
**[Break up Ticketmaster →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/ticketmaster-doj/?source=em20221118-3628-P&t=3&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/ticketmaster-doj/?source=em20221118-3628-P&t=4&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)
Alexandria has been very outspoken about the impact of corporate monopolies and how the consequences can be deadly.
Take the national baby formula shortage in May of this year. The ENTIRE U.S. infant formula market is controlled by just three or four companies. That means that if something happens to one supplier, the entire supply is crippled. And that’s exactly what happened.
In addition, corporate monopolies are also one of the root causes of inflation. The consolidation of market power and the fact that the most basic goods – housing, food, etc. – are concentrated into oligopolies means that these huge corporations will price gouge just because they can.
Whether it’s power companies like ConEd price gouging customers on their electricity bills, or Ticketmaster price gouging on concert tickets, the principle is the same: **When one company controls the entire market, regular people have to fight for access, and are often shut out**.
[**We must hold Ticketmaster — and all corporations from Amazon to Facebook and Exxon — accountable. Send a message to the Department of Justice now.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/letter/ticketmaster-doj/?source=em20221118-3628-P&t=5&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)
Thank you for speaking out.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20221118-3628-P_ENG_ANO_MIS&t=6&refcode2=3628_2526796_KFant4&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221118-3628-P_ENG_ANO_MIS&t=7&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3628%2E2526796%2EKFant4)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: I like the sound of that Friend, I don't like to keep secrets from you. That's why I am telling YOU IMMEDIATELY about my plans to run for President of the United States in 2024. When I was President, we had a booming economic recovery, the strongest and most secure border in U.S. history, energy independence, and even energy dominance, historically low gas prices, no inflation, a fully rebuilt military, and our Country was RESPECTED all over the world. Very simply, we had Made America Great Again - and we did it by putting WORKERS first, by putting FAMILIES first, and above all, by putting AMERICA FIRST. But now, our Country has been brought to its knees. I plan to turn this Country around - something Joe Biden could NEVER do - which is why I am starting my run for PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES IMMEDIATELY. Your support is what will allow me to WIN BIG over the radical Left. I am calling on YOU to get on the right side of history with me as the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder. This is your chance to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN with me. I 'll look at the official roster when I get back to my office, and I want to see YOUR name. Thank you, Donald J. Peter — The closer we get to the Georgia runoff, the harder the Georgia GOP is working to suppress Black votes.

Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger’s office has stated that Georgia voters won’t be able to vote early on Saturday, November 26th, due to a state holiday immediately preceding it — **_a holiday initially created to commemorate Confederate general Robert E. Lee._** (We wish we were making this up, Peter.)

So we’re fighting back the only way we know how: **by going all-out to mobilize as many Black voters as we can before the runoff.** But grassroots activism like this isn’t cheap, and we _desperately_ need your help.

[We need you more now than ever, Peter. It’s time to step up. Please, we’re begging you, make your contribution to The Collective PAC and help us fight back against the Georgia GOP’s racist voter suppression efforts — before it’s too late.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRWVTxGCHTlic31RArRUvXWKhDNSgfh-P_fMYZOZGLSl5QUTZ71dc7n3g6MTxccde0t4yHTeGgmPiyNO4cUG-QQkFLV7XQwZakwsfTyYDV6Q-yZYKexdXXClKVyTB3IPFQYvwjWWRT0ACXNO1TBgX0wkpIyQgX4L5nNVXiBLjAyqC5nam0oiG4ctGgcFbYe5Y1cw81eDG_xqswE2CEOtdSowzIsVg1Cdq8-tV2FCXwR2EVORqEey5XIJ6QjiyTpR4sVt5TICRivISJRPKbCjG8R8j2QYAzGa_nLp1gMMufphCnf4ZRTuiMjDHmkugxcXlxGquDqXE-DHR4Fzy2k2aogeH9DLI2KERVVp-7Ed3wSEU/3r9/z0_vJ9ikTIi6-DfvCkeiJA/h4/QKryj5X1bRzjvYGoi_LSpUjbZuEnm2CGCLwS6BioLUg)

name: Vince Speranza, American Veterans Center
subject: I fought at the Battle of the Bulge
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdaq2EvzeG-qDREQ-o2liTJ89p2ZtVy-dEbWXuw_T-CBAdvleIyc17zPDYKx_yeupixN3zXUzgeD0KotOmoF5QIvElUUhV-3euBj9q0ysRFATubcEeK_QlXlCrzoTdU9USJmJtVvUSAO6ejMbYtnjaL0U%3D)
---
Fellow American, I was a 19-year-old machine gunner at the Battle of the Bulge in World War II. _And I didn 't talk about my Army service for more than 65 years after that._ **But my life changed forever when, as an 85-year-old, I returned to Bastogne, Belgium to pay my respects to my fallen comrades.** On my first day, a local man hugged me and thanked me for my service. Then he took my daughter and me to the area that my division - the 101st Airborne, also known as the "Screaming Eagles" - had held. I even identified the _exact_ location of my foxhole.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdakfvb4QjPdbaxFirVFWl4Q-EKWCFt2b08u4WR3OxLJPOM2G9ml8Yi7fTq0MW5nZCbqSzAAvpPLh--Ds-DNVoKg_oWvf8ewti50GzTOFaGJSBEfBwTuLay5T3Ztat313H9bMbhKCXb7vFxxr89b7q4wY%3D)
---
_Above: My friends at the American Veterans Center released a video documentary about my World War II service in July 2021._
---
Today, I've shared my story with thousands of Americans, and my 56-minute video documentary with the American Veterans Center (AVC) has been seen nearly 1 million times online. **So when my friends at the American Veterans Center told me they were launching an urgent campaign to honor even more veterans ' legacies, I knew that I had to act.** I know how powerful - and critically important - the American Veterans Center's work is to honor servicemen and women like me. [**Can I count on you to help AVC continue their important mission with your generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdap4K4MellC2N_wLdbMoWDv96IRI18OtLbejRl-sHvAnCeHYdoMHXn7Ao4CMMV-o_x4qejbfDnqHag3mTKJSyxBc3f6SmrEUQI_AFrvemNLnphWFcu0EQaLf_TzxM-Wr3LjE1j9s7iojoy-CIHdqTTwo%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdahXiNNKTfEIR7-UAc6WR2Id-TbNNGZ1rgrsBF0DIGGloSh_jO6Y6a9hVTEt-GvOFWhSDHcWL_pRSH8TcDHDV9ZIFADqTSjk_5SXH3_lbP5f05DdSlR-YCUpHD5VSSbQJx3SZT0CfY0QUYvpX1a3Xte0%3D)
---
**When I visited Bastogne for the first time since the Battle of the Bulge, I was stunned to learn that I had become a local legend.** More than 65 years ago, I'd brought back beer for wounded soldiers in my unit - and, since there were few taverns open and no glasses to be found, I'd poured it all into my helmet. I told this story to a few locals on my trip to Bastogne ... and I couldn't believe it when they led me to a bar that served "Airborne Beer" in honor of the event. **I never imagined that a Belgian beer would be part of my legacy, but thanks to American Veterans Center supporters like you, it 's now part of our shared American history, too.**
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdandOENgoMcM1fUn4hWHf6mcqQNsOMBDghn2imdwU4w_M2CqSmrE3yrppaRuUPf4fo-bT_qAlaQVzCxrO4xBLX9wTscKGEU7qDp7VLawyJPupZ9m-u1zo2WPhQ53sJ4boCX1DGGzWogXSN-4sTKuhRI8%3D)
---
No other organization does as many programs - or as deeply thorough work - to preserve and honor our veterans' legacies like the American Veterans Center. The many important programs of the American Veterans Center include:
* **The Annual Veterans Conference in Washington, D.C.,** where I was honored to speak on a panel of fellow veterans and share our hard-won lessons with the students and military cadets in attendance.

* **The powerful oral history and video documentary project.** These videos are recorded at _no cost_ to veterans; in fact, AVC usually sends their video team to veterans' homes and, after the production is complete, gives veterans and their families a keepsake copy.

* **The National Memorial Day Parade** , which AVC brought back to its full glory after it hadn't been held for many decades. Today, it's the largest Memorial Day commemoration in the country, and thousands of servicemen and women, from World War II to active-duty forces, march in it.

But the American Veterans Center is only able to offer these programs with the generous support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That 's why I hope you'll make your most generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more to help support the American Veterans Center today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdascIOhSCJRSTf0cmBaRPhFesDFCOENorqva4pcc-FDFoND1kciEmjFgNotWrlXcu0DJsz4-OXzwFcdPmHl56GBuMuin9G9QqW2F2s5VyUDfLxNWabLME1A71SKxomw9kOz7uWNbeSKTzC9VMYXUR12o%3D)
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdalI7EMyWQyyNSFM4X2KT8P1grptOGj37MMUHPQ9DQdXjvsdSuingokPmCILYx3isBH2G6qq4njkndvcqatC_cZj579nNDe_Q7I_GbduCtiNVpy7jNVQuobLfKWeyj_tG3qjT8aXRiJWdHRwF7Jl54-A%3D)
---
I didn't tell the story of my World War II experience for 65 years. I didn't even watch movies about the military - I just couldn't. But once I returned to Bastogne and met men and women who remembered the war, everything changed. **Sharing my experience as a World War II veteran - at AVC's Annual Conference, in AVC's video documentary, at special events, and in my own memoir - changed my life tremendously and for the better.** Now you have the opportunity to help veterans like me share their stories and know that their legacies will be recorded, preserved, and honored - today and in future generations. [**Please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdaufPmEmUPXbjLi96c1WKc3iRRDfSmjBCRvjHiQgd9zR7PMc8SwOFYXX4gZpBiB7axTiaupN84FwjU33kAVjIjaHSXpKBcGnNbjk0ctd73D5Qk0ciTGff7huJ97MNFxBDBUOAFsDuMcZBqo_FqssnDXE%3D) Thank you,
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdag_iEYlhfuSwG6GTksjNMtkcXK2TwynqdOfCimhDm7BEgMVfVHnrNL72PV4g_VlckNz6vccZUNg-Qq8FKyEWDWbwzxwQ8J0Oe-yBtj7ledmMAgk1aS5iKcOn6604Nm73Mqzs6-UcM11xcjnLmwSEruY%3D)
---
Vince Speranza World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3df259b73f34d108a90f7fedaa8ce47&_e=fn_Qy_IW-vigMuSyXWmT6ZSYjTMWossTmp9rvMph3NsDooRhwvDK5buir2HoUfgxyqnbHZ31wE1QS0vS8SQi0GWb0ueqwFVACqKmLewfuIMDqjBt7WxO5VDSylJPxULsB55FiTvU3hi_vM1aN5bdalqqS66VfyFenpiLxpif0bBBC9dCSvcoQHqHI_-fjgsw6v5Oq-Uwqa7NU3fPCI281Ybca7OY5IMpAg-zLKMexJr9A56qnjM3_b4vRNkcMGp1MzkP913WAlMgP453JFE2rS0QaEibE2KCJ-PQUgh9zZU%3D)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Ron DeSantis Update (via State GOP)
subject: DeSantis said WHAT?! 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Do you know what kids are learning in school?
body:
Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. That's why I wanted to do something about it by crea
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8adhof8oknn28oddejqlhvq9qubuio9v8bjretg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i62oj6c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjeio6cobi66oe2ojlegob2o71mdqm6dr7mtjm2c9hc1jrad1kcqor2dr6ceon1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6kq60tj4coqe5cr2cuobapbi4no)
|
---
| | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.

That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program.

The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America.

We provide this curriculum **free of charge** for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's why I am emailing you today.

I have written a brand-new children's book, [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z311c4l7la9079onnkeffclioe77c3pc9t998ri8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i62oj6c5h2bs), to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsuemo23lj2rggkvh2igclbnqsqofs7jmq5kb4g_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i62oj6c5h2bs)
__
I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3733812cfp39s3chqd4tsfpjfjcn1p7f1juhre0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s3i62oj6c5h2bs) with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: All hands are on deck in Georgia!
body:
We will be working on the ground to make sure our people know WHY they need to vote again. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/all-hands-are-on-deck-in-georgia?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | Good afternoon nuestra gente,
All hands are on deck in Georgia! One of the biggest factors we are primed and ready to address in Georgia is making sure that Latino voters know about the runoff. We will be working on the ground to make sure our people know WHY they need to vote again, WHY the stakes are higher than ever, and WHY Herschel Walker has no intention to help our community. Every 30 seconds, a Latino turns 18 years old and is eligible to vote. We are the fastest-growing electorate in the country, but it takes year-round engagement to mobilize any group of people. We are so close- we did it once in 2020, now let us do it again in 2022, and get that extra seat closer to 52, and our new Senate majority. Nuestro PAC is the largest independent Latino-focused super PAC in the country, bringing culturally competent and carefully crafted messaging and support to turn out Latino voters across all key races. Let's get the job done in Georgia! [Join us in the fight! Could Nuestro PAC count on you to chip in?](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=4d404f0c14&e=b8f90417f9)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I vow to devote the rest of my life to helping Democrats WIN and preserving our progress.

---
| | | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54795230/379657185/1694517773?refcode=20221118_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGMwNTdiNy02ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTYPEPuvVAaOEBD9X95lJGqqPMQetOPpEjy9kmuuFX0=)
---
| | [**It’s been the honor of my life to serve you as Speaker of the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54795231/379657186/1694517773?refcode=20221118_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGMwNTdiNy02ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTYPEPuvVAaOEBD9X95lJGqqPMQetOPpEjy9kmuuFX0=) [Although I just announced I’m stepping down from Democratic Leadership – I vow to devote the rest of my life to helping Democrats WIN and preserving our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54795232/379657187/1694517773?refcode=20221118_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGMwNTdiNy02ZjY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTYPEPuvVAaOEBD9X95lJGqqPMQetOPpEjy9kmuuFX0=) [**_Which is why I just launched my Pelosi Legacy Fund. It would mean so much to me if you’d help me reach 100,000 donations before midnight. Every last cent will fund my fight to elect Democrats across the country and preserve every ounce of progress we’ve worked so hard to make. [] Please, will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now to split between me and DASS PAC so we can defeat Walker and keep Georgia blue? [] Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in $250 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] Let's go win this. – Rev. Warnock DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections. Peter,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Peter, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908238:J0DUB1GN1:m:1:3370555685:31ACA662B3B6A1F32724E70E09445A76:r)**

Your personalized link to take the survey expires SOON. Our team is counting on you to answer the questions openly and honestly, Peter.

**[Use this personalized link to tell the NRA how we can best protect your right to keep and bear arms.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61908238:J0DUB1GN1:m:1:3370555685:31ACA662B3B6A1F32724E70E09445A76:r)**

Thank you,

Wayne LaPierre

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901525:J7W0B1GDN:m:1:3372944669:1963CC70DCC647B20EA0443F616A437C:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901525:J7W0B1GDN:m:1:3372944669:1963CC70DCC647B20EA0443F616A437C:r)**

I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901525:J7W0B1GDN:m:1:3372944669:1963CC70DCC647B20EA0443F616A437C:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901525:J7W0B1GDN:m:1:3372944669:1963CC70DCC647B20EA0443F616A437C:r)**

---
| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910600:JXBmZ1GNV:m:1:3369487795:35803430E678447B8F5FEF83D8CE03B7:r "so I need
your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_

subject: our opponent is better funded
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. **[We don't need to outraise Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I'm counting on key supporters like you, Peter, to ensure we keep it close.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904572:6niDZ1G9N:m:1:3360412034:BF9FAF67AF2BB970392F853A31204FC7:r)**

[** Chip in before Midnight -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904572:6niDZ1G9N:m:1:3360412034:BF9FAF67AF2BB970392F853A31204FC7:r)
We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. **[If every person reading this email right now would send in just $25, we'd easily hit our goal.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904572:6niDZ1G9N:m:1:3360412034:BF9FAF67AF2BB970392F853A31204FC7:r)**

**[So Peter, I'm personally asking you today to chip in $25 or even $34 to my campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so that we win this critical runoff!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904572:6niDZ1G9N:m:1:3360412034:BF9FAF67AF2BB970392F853A31204FC7:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61904572:6niDZ1G9N:m:1:3360412034:BF9FAF67AF2BB970392F853A31204FC7:r)

Herschel Walker

Friend, this is important: **Herschel Walker and I are officially in a runoff election, meaning he and I will be facing off once again in December.**
With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, defending this seat will come down to your grassroots support. **So I’m urgently asking:[Will you give $5 or more right now so we can win this race and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54795987/379660433/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5067-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTNjMjIzNy03MzY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-GNTLxOi72plV-TDA5qkvDY8RObnHjUn9Svhb1GDm4g=)**

Friends, Since you elected me the next U.S. Representative of NM-02, I had the honor of spending the past week in Washington, D.C. getting oriented and ready to serve in Congress. I joined a group of bipartisan freshman lawmakers from across the country to learn about setting up a congressional office and serving the people of New Mexico on Day 1. I also met with longstanding Democratic members, including House Majority Leader Steny Hoyer here at the Library of Congress. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54803793/379697830/-840396548?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221118dc_gv_od90ds_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk4M2Y3OC05ZTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aHHHAlIOpTejR8v_ppq3ZP2gDy4KE3Ny8cgFIWQzV0g=)
---
Wednesday night, I had the opportunity to join Lawrence O'Donnell on The Last Word to discuss our campaign, the importance of the Latino vote, and what I'll be working on in Congress.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54803794/379697837/-840396548?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221118dc_gv_od90ds_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk4M2Y3OC05ZTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aHHHAlIOpTejR8v_ppq3ZP2gDy4KE3Ny8cgFIWQzV0g=)

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Fellowship for Community Building & Social Change
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
| | | I could not be more thankful for the mentorship this program provided me and the values this program reaffirmed in me. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBifvJsk--iyoy7IUZ20N1cSxodtgSpTVD91L3I0OTBt6peQJQmJbdCyXmWZp7S84ivCP0St699fvwoFswZguZUtxnQ5phkSINHeneOneSxLLfvJoRcxTJ3fhPVzJr_cjHKXPrK4v51kzs0BtkpSxu_rz4as52j07KP3qDcyhDrBtVnsVmiVmQIrfFiQ1U240sJ9j4uevA3volOZ6Lyb9lalmWS3p1ZDbCJcO0uSn9kvoBqLCeHqmmDdljQBQ4uSy_6ziteFIVpF3BK1bPCSYy_HFmWK9UIioUUoJReGOcUDRgL5ajs_GNiARYxmH_bovGL-2M2TEjuZf2Ukw0Tsc4HWvLIS0cZXhPxY50hlYJ4rn0jA4GGDNpA-TNnno_jVjV8A/3r9/5Yv7dtPiTcKthl8KYC0lQQ/h0/txJoAVE4d9v41tZWUcjl_Zc5PcxkSuBM2nd5cqb2wYY) | | Team, I wanted to share a special moment with you.

This past week, **I was honored to teach and speak with Emory University’s Community Building and Social Change Fellows** _about the power of community-driven change and how this very fellowship helped prepare me for my servant leadership journey._

My passion for community building and social change was cultivated early on before I even graduated from school. While at Emory University as an undergrad, I participated in the very first class of fellows in the Kenneth Cole Fellowship for Community Building and Social Change, and I could not be more thankful for this deeply enriching experience. I began to build a foundation of what it takes to create long-standing community-based change alongside the community rather than impose on them. I also worked in six community development corporations (CDCs) that also served as strong building blocks in my foundation for community building. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBifvJsk--iyoy7IUZ20N1cSxodtgSpTVD91L3I0OTBt6p-jdmsZ5fK7ZlnAkWqOgp3-oBDMcrlzAI5E_8VZr7_BXOlw7gr8-S2IFtDnfeU58YXuwO9HpmhS-groC5hyv6Rm8z61NxCvKM5bXqnWb8w6pOPeU1O7gcdXC53yAMxfdM_uHtyazkS0xZJlkxGNaN64i1QMkcTwuLUI0qGAhGK5KQ2iWld3J4y5rUP73hw5ND4huSRZVyiRysnRLT4pBpKIThPEkmZ7xXn8h3ubsOtx2b9WWu5v54F3kc4xxrNBcVOAsNFBpSZ7wzLKBz4dwCGotTlqVAmG0D-ZzWxEAj9XzMI2NvDVOzGcKHl-LZ90M0zM-R_s5Zk4RBQgq-XkwmgQ/3r9/5Yv7dtPiTcKthl8KYC0lQQ/h1/ZO0kPVDNeOU1rHmmDfgYysb9BpttSSKy9slzcFra0AI) **When doing community first, we must engage the community by working hand-in-hand with them to truly ensure their voices are heard and their needs are truly met.** As Houston’s next mayor, I will use these same community-based organizing strategies that the Kenneth Cole Fellowship for Community Building and Social Change instilled in me to create results for those who need it most. But to get there, I need your help.

**_[So, team, will you help me continue my journey of creating community-driven change by donating $10 right now? Your grassroots support today will help build a Houston where everyone can thrive.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBifvJsk--iyoy7IUZ20N1cSxodtgSpTVD91L3I0OTBt6phS5syTR-dw44KWXF-Dn6NUHmpVPb6oO8JRgv4Z4IcuVBH0TAESPKNbvgygzYZwmUWcKXQq79QWFq1N5e3psauHbez1qd_RmLy-WkrNeOipo0f_rWrpfz0ACMBTaUr18L-Sr1NvKQrMfncs1SD0FxrqgJPMnzZDjyt4Dk1U1OLx8m990BhP8UP9FVZ8FsfeL80UyJJoDEiGMsg_xpr1HWdNPPWo0lqfqDAnrYFTN8IFQ-g7lr7VnJP-ZZaNOKixh_PK8B0sGW0GGGrf6XTavEYOpKSmeklhBSqKbvseb2DqFvIDVlKcc-peWZ_l3-v-pPnpf_N4uT404sBp45UAPEgmc6sisNhtk0Ldh01s2YL2g/3r9/5Yv7dtPiTcKthl8KYC0lQQ/h2/ijF8Qn1DP7z28RRp7tjXzMZehyleUOEkfyMUfHYZZBg)_** clean_body: | | | I could not be more thankful for the mentorship this program provided me and the values this program reaffirmed in me. | | Team, I wanted to share a special moment with you. This past week, I was honored to teach and speak with Emory University’s Community Building and Social Change Fellows about the power of community-driven change and how this very fellowship helped prepare me for my servant leadership journey. My passion for community building and social change was cultivated early on before I even graduated from school. While at Emory University as an undergrad, I participated in the very first class of fellows in the Kenneth Cole Fellowship for Community Building and Social Change, and I could not be more thankful for this deeply enriching experience. I began to build a foundation of what it takes to create long-standing community-based change alongside the community rather than impose on them. I also worked in six community development corporations (CDCs) that also served as strong building blocks in my foundation for community building. When doing community first, we must engage the community by working hand-in-hand with them to truly ensure their voices are heard and their needs are truly met. As Houston’s next mayor, I will use these same community-based organizing strategies that the Kenneth Cole Fellowship for Community Building and Social Change instilled in me to create results for those who need it most. But to get there, I need your help. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your continued support, Amanda K. Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. clean_body: You still have time | | Folks- ** Because of our collective efforts, we were able to deliver New Hampshire, Oregon, Washington, Arizona, Nevada, and FLIPPED Pennsylvania for the Democrats in the Senate. Now we are on the cusp of 51 seats in the majority. How great would it be not having to rely on a certain someone from West Virginia or Arizona to get things done? We got 50 seats. We want 51 seats. That means we’re doing all that we can to re-elect Senator Warnock down in Georgia. We showed everyone in the country how crucial the Youth Vote was in stopping the Red Wave. Now, we’re looking for help to do it again. YDA is taking the leap and paying for a bunch of Young Democrats to go canvass to doorknock for Warnock and fight for the 51st seat in the Senate. We need to show everyone that we don’t need a Walker. We need a Runner. In Solidarity, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats,** | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This time in 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Now that the midterm elections are over, it’s time for us to pivot to the
future. Right now, our number one priority is making sure we have the
resources we need to power our work as we prepare for another extensive
round of recruitment.

Every step of the campaign process takes time and resources, so even
though one election just ended, it’s our responsibility to start looking
ahead. We’ve been reviewing our budget, including checking where we’re at
now compared to previous cycles:

Time Period Amount

November 2022: $62,903

November 2020: $114,856

Difference: –$51,953

Peter, this time
in 2020 we were way ahead in our fundraising, so we need to make up this
$51,953 difference ASAP. We’re being transparent with you in the hopes
that you’ll step in and help us close the gap.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121419?refcode=em20221118-26135&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1 ]We’re not asking for you to donate any more than you can afford — even
$5 will help us along. Can you pitch in $5, $3, or more so
we can get back on track?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121419?refcode=em20221118-26135&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1 ]Contribute $3

Here’s the thing about our work: it doesn’t stop (ever). That’s because
we’re truly committed to building an entire new generation of progressives
in Congress. It takes a lot to go up against Democratic leadership and
far-right Super PACs.

We’re serious about our fundraising because the right amount of money can
make the difference between winning and losing a race — and we plan to
grow the Squad with every election year.

We helped Summer Lee and Greg Casar win in a huge victory for our
movement. But if we don’t start to raise funds at a much higher rate now,
it will significantly impair our work down the line — a possibility we
want to avoid.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121419?refcode=em20221118-26135&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1 ]Support from our grassroots base makes all the difference to us when
things are tight. Will you take a moment and contribute,
Peter?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221118-26135-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26135_1203867_huJVU1&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26135%2E1203867%2EhuJVU1

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Here's the deal. Raphael Warnock does not believe in our country. He has voted with the Democrat line over 96% of the time for things like **raising taxes on small businesses and the middle class, sending taxpayer-funded stimulus checks to criminals in prison, and voting against border security.** Herschel Walker, **believes in America** , and has risen up from college football all-star to playing in the NFL and even representing the USA in the Olympics. He believes that America is the land of opportunity for **everyone**.
The radical Left is pushing hard on Georgia - dumping over $100 million in vicious negative and personal attacks. _**[We need 34 patriots to chip in $35 or more to keep the American dream alive in Georgia and get Herschel Walker elected in this runoff race.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910470:6kjj91GBN:m:1:3317145305:078D6E93771F1DE1579F4F8D51AE5538:r "We need 34 patriots to chip in $35 or more to keep the American dream alive in Georgia and get Herschel Walker elected in this runoff

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Herschel’s in trouble
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61906516:Jy0s91GcN:m:1:3331703221:668C1EBADB80B03BA1958B9159C359D2:r)
---

Herschel Walker is in trouble.

In last week's Georgia Senate election, **Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock got more votes.** That means as the two candidates head into a runoff, Herschel is the clear underdog.

But as a legendary football player, Herschel knows a thing or two about a "comeback."

clean_body: We have no time to waste. Friend, Did you see Donald J. Trump's announcement LIVE from Mar-a-Lago? HE IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES IN 2024, AND THERE IS NO TIME TO WASTE. You have 30 MINUTES to donate to our Official Trump 2024 Victory Fund to receive a 1300%-IMPACT. Don't wait another minute, Friend. We are counting on you. Thank you, Team Trump 2024 \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Subject: 2024 To: < > Friend, Recently, I was in MAR-A-LAGO and announced that I am running for PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES IN 2024. In two years, the American People can make their voices heard - LOUDER, STRONGER, and MORE PASSIONATE than ever before. This road will not be easy, but if every red-blooded Patriot does their job, freedom WILL prevail. The Democrats want to distract you from EVERY problem they have created, but the American People will never fall for their tactics. Your unwavering support is the backbone of my SAVE AMERICA movement, so I have ACTIVATED a 1300%-IMPACT offer on ALL GIFTS made towards our Official Trump 2024 Victory Fund. I'm counting on you, Friend. My team will hand me an updated Donor List in 30 MINUTES , and I want you to know that I will be looking for YOUR NAME. You have never let me down before, and I know you won't start today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: We just won a huge victory = FIRST: The Georgia GOP enacted their near-total abortion ban as soon as the protections of Roe v. Wade were dismantled. THEN: Georgians got fired up to protect abortion rights and showed up strong, sending 24 new House Democrats to the legislature, picking up an additional 3 seats. NOW: A Georgia Superior Court judge overturned the state’s law banning abortions after 6 weeks, ruling it unconstitutional and saying it cannot be enforced. = This is BIG, Peter. With 62% of Georgia voters overwhelmingly opposing Kemp's extreme abortion ban, Georgia’s pro-choice majority has won a decisive victory in protecting our reproductive rights. Even though it looks like the fight is over, the extreme Georgia GOP could still reintroduce another restrictive abortion ban in the next legislative session. Our 3 new Democratic seats narrow the odds of it passing, but we need your help to ensure abortion rights are protected in GA for good. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Together, Georgia House Democrats The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JeJYdMVDgPsR64k7YiuK3dLvsZzZah-w51p1BnzqwxbTt8X9giiubPWZ1W-uq6K_Z2uKw51y8lwSMz53c01DPTMCMKW-wJi7GJ27y9107hMcSrX-qEdAUITrGoi15npR0ltwLM7-3lz2aGFVo02fUWWcyzz-Jh4uwPIijByfvWjxvfwJdRdTI0IYLQWGypLxxSpotLtRwO4ZWEFu8wV_aPyUFH7hswV_DimqPY01q9oIFO069_33ejsKMcF0V4eaL8glYzr7jau2z3mYC2udAR3BhKVmjB74h4Eb05QyRoux67wEPefL9K5r-G18ORkVcQ%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **When Rubber Hits The Road 👊**
---
| |
---
Let's get real about plastics. The majority of the plastics that you and I toss into the blue bins at home are headed to our landfills whether we like it or not. In August, I learned this reality when I toured the businesses, organizations, and manufacturing plants of East Tennessee that have firsthand experience with composting, recycling, and waste management. Around [5%](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JbG69vrddXknOPT15nMMGKs-Z3Czmn3B7ZuWOADLF8wPjBFQO6yPILVcpBgR7xAMSjY3Ha2nhqoaPGN4KIMzgOmNyO2HpSiBQiARmUNpfT3SPCy97WU90MQ0apxdJxdyuzNqBF0a2dhd0pJ3SK8kOENNPx4KdJxMbZOFX6qkWznybhdzXGqCN5EVlkRG-IoCoyFrSSTm3eLWxFdTzkV2ibeZT8HFE8_HTk7k8wf-6jpzybywwL9tPHYUTcBtX6mozhsk3_K75SM-HOtG4gcdhXCW2fRxdbnJDvgKX5er7UCYd9rKavyvHW0VRtyREwhNCQ%3D%3D) of plastic is turned into new materials, and the more plastic we produce, the [less likely](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JWWbqmNc40RCIsqrhM6nSGmU0pQunvKwiBeXvij6H2lY9JR-EThve7WiIQTdhBuyjO3mEIm8uKEZRDo5hQduvxZd9JO3SqFsJwtfxfeF280r4AJsWIUxxL5ZiwXeZdJW8b8uZ3gAJPk6ZFnwnUZ8wnxpZa8GGx-6JAhfYgNvkj6OisipTfnp5hPZQlkqtMrLaAtZN5TegAoB2NrDWorwokGvVRkcjpmfqqmgzThsbn15ksIu9ii_1_h2Elzs0EaSjnF7lUNBQtFaJAL6hls3fT8%3D) it will be recycled. I want to change that. That is why I introduced the [Recycled Plastic in Asphalt Act.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JcIq6kM06EdGPD6U4ldoc_OU9369-GATG4eLZHsx9KZ7tMlrTLYm4b6PtdjpiQz2uFsJ9x4vyFZMPWkbk7DSVxi3qPbKcxrDeyD1IFwiSn2VrqdRPJ7d0-HBpEJnEbcP6jr4IFrxpgcEXfO-ct-TjDMJrMZjBpT2H5oJmt8blx5KFUzmYgf9cgYYLhCS8Uc858AvaZYEnp1KAD3-3grk_OvaxnNKnmKQNqGQFKtBPRz9n0rZxpU9iqsZ3X6N7CR4cPD0hhuFQmSosExL9AkDAPY%3D) This legislation aims to drive innovation in the recycling and waste industry by using recycled plastic-modified asphalt mixtures. The [upside of plastic in asphalt](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JeN9Ib3XwT8MmhfiYbaOAmOJHXrdmjUQRnGLfo-gdwjNWyjG-7MtEmLPZQG02h9OY3kGPlj_3_LoM5z08X8Rjl4N-LI9z9vuiJTx5zqydffWmuS_VbK2rqqpkFG3XGHTb3KCoUhPc6rdPDuZNzrDBskBwtkdU62quTbWk654r_MKyOAB1cyEUSVbSHxBFZu1Y2GLGFuy5PMhjwJodIPoi7RW6zJ3mVFvoIwB43Hs3geVwYA6fFD7ys8ANMKj9vuNSTlcl26v2XVg48wj-tYtyM4%3D): It boosts roadway life and performance while providing another use for plastics that may otherwise end up in a landfill. The downside of plastic in asphalt: None
The road (_pun intended_) to taking care of our environment doesn't need to be complex and siphon billions of dollars from the federal government. Rather it takes some listening and commonsense action.
---
| | |
---
| | **Round Of A-Paws 😁**
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JaXTmxnObf9lDeP_fWYYQ7KhyW6jSSnkb-bllB9QkbPjqSh1lCISz4vo-8QCwF2bCpEFTnOstpnK4Em-avleWn5BRchFbSF8Ecx_JVucHJiV7cliX81mefmzu7yjp0Tg6WS61FcXUrCuLQdcmAEQhBSsPCQhnHzedNY0JJZk8xmWSg9rkp_Sp1-kUcpfDF3aJk_P3bROvGd3ueP3dmtLBhTbfBMLIQD6A2IzK2cTGdyp4waMi3pzEz2daz673Uyi8iaKQ0mSvpCnShIk5Xc1__MRkoy3htlaSybKIounc0N9RzSfKNP-9pCksnDhAJ5gGg%3D%3D)
---
The Young-Williams Animal Center—the largest animal shelter located in Knoxville—has been overwhelmed with [donations](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f5be03d203c84e599db4e3998f30b5fe&_e=ZD7Njfas7EULTO7yiP20JaXTmxnObf9lDeP_fWYYQ7KhyW6jSSnkb-bllB9QkbPjqSh1lCISz4vo-8QCwF2bCpEFTnOstpnK4Em-avleWn5BRchFbSF8Ecx_JVucHJiV7cliX81mefmzu7yjp0Tg6WS61FcXUrCuLQdcmAEQhBSsPCQhnHzedNY0JJZk8xmWWqdhEyU6T2zFc-35HuVF4EMvcq7H_2SjlBDN9eq8moKP5d-zFyn5Us5StzP2s8Yq0PPOyaT91Xz1yTTaRH1envjrWD9SXEIjoXXC-Mb-VcUgxs_WTrBN_GzKXvc4XyZQOcvR-pN3hXUbJY44c0HnZA%3D%3D) from community members this week after putting out a plea for help to feed more than 350 animals in their care. In a matter of days, treats, kibble, toys, and linens flooded their gates. To be exact, the shelter received more than 9,000 pounds of dry pet food and more than 162,000 ounces of wet pet food—enough food to fulfill the shelter's needs. A huge round of a-paws for those donors!

Friend,
---
It’s official: We’ve reclaimed the House majority from Pelosi’s control!
---
While this victory gives us a much-needed check on Biden and Kamala’s disastrous agenda, _the next Republican majority MUST be more than just a stopgap._
---
There’s no denying the outcome of the midterms was not the red wave so many predicted, but control of the House still gives us the chance to deliver victories for the American people.
---
**Simply put, this next majority needs to _FIGHT FOR YOU_. That is my measure of success for our majority over the next 2 years.**
---
_But to ensure I accomplish that mission, I’m counting on my most trusted grassroots supporters to tell me what issues matter most to you._
---
[**Please take my Official Survey: “A New Majority for the People” and let me know what YOU would like to see the next Republican House majority prioritize.**](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f34e65ddfc974c4680bf06671f6d3d28&_e=ieRLra6MAep6098spRFnvvrAhc1Mxk4maw8K3ybJmLgRdSlFw2pTrfZWzKvmucgAyWZZOnSYCtdsaed5cIpQ3aCy281RagrlXq3VhmvLvo7eESNM0D-f5yCtwZKSWLGVy0UqoZTVAhS6MVfS4UPoG7Zu8ut2OzQ3xK5M4RWavbFouFZkmsQKIoS2aDnTeRWKh8bVB3E7S6tFLeqNxpPzF7gWWWOw5fxzLXMuKOUHyPyPPgOAdMV8Z5k2RIBjxj0OZWeUlQIQAOuo5y5YNmdGscR_0y-qakIP-Y2kHZjsgX78l-9pSbItwvujVkc3u-CePfy5rw75-hrEgMzpsyv8E2I-ynyRfI0zyV7E-oHvh0S0x-pMGFmHIQCyS5pGuB2YkvtazvU-6t_J5IgPHZst39boPdusJNGQsWRGQ5Ga1AETNj2o_vmTlrbGcgjC3T0WVaZ-AwfeJwSar1jie2v9Dg%3D%3D)

clean_body: We’ve taken back the House. Now, let me know what YOU would like to see the new Republican majority prioritize. | Friend, It’s official: We’ve reclaimed the House majority from Pelosi’s control! While this victory gives us a much-needed check on Biden and Kamala’s disastrous agenda, the next Republican majority MUST be more than just a stopgap. There’s no denying the outcome of the midterms was not the red wave so many predicted, but control of the House still gives us the chance to deliver victories for the American people. Simply put, this next majority needs to FIGHT FOR YOU. That is my measure of success for our majority over the next 2 years. But to ensure I accomplish that mission, I’m counting on my most trusted grassroots supporters to tell me what issues matter most to you. Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901531:6b_X91GND:m:1:3373497171:9F253EB37961C5249732BAEFC279F411:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901531:6b_X91GND:m:1:3373497171:9F253EB37961C5249732BAEFC279F411:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901531:6b_X91GND:m:1:3373497171:9F253EB37961C5249732BAEFC279F411:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901531:6b_X91GND:m:1:3373497171:9F253EB37961C5249732BAEFC279F411:r)**

Herschel Walker

| |
Peter, it's Herschel Walker. I know you're busy, so I'll be quick.

It's official. Nikki Haley was right--Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we're not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He's weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we're quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910552:6KkAt1GMN:m:1:3361486117:61D1E21F609F632EE737ADA0C0B44018:r "so I need

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61910552:6KkAt1GMN:m:1:3361486117:61D1E21F609F632EE737ADA0C0B44018:r "so can I count on you

body:
We’ve got to fight with every ounce of energy we have over these next 18 days to get Senator Warnock re-elected. | |
---
In just 18 days, Georgians will head to the polls _again_ to choose their next senator. I’ve been in politics for a long time, so let me tell you: _This one is going to be a squeaker_. Right now, Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock and MAGA Republican Herschel Walker are crisscrossing the Peach State to get out the vote before the December 6 runoff. **With a little bit of elbow grease and help from a lot of loyal Democrats like you, I know we can win this.** **This grassroots team has spent the year helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. Now, Senator Warnock is counting on your support to bring this home. Will you split a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC today?**

Some folks call it a pipe dream that Democrats can win in traditionally red states. But I was born in Georgia, and I’ve seen firsthand what's possible when we roll up our sleeves and get to work. Last cycle, we turned both of Georgia’s seats blue for the _first time_ in nearly two decades -- all because the DNC invested early and folks like you stepped up when it mattered most. That’s the power of this grassroots team, Derek. But we can’t take last cycle for granted. We’ve got to fight with every ounce of energy we have over these next 18 days to get Senator Warnock re-elected and elect Democrats nationwide for years to come. **[Split a $10 donation between Senator Warnock’s reelection campaign and the DNC today.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xwBCZMAaDvd1Lam6EYqj7XRdG5M6LP6xDMqCMZezRAcBp6YQoxImcVFI4E9wVgePDJBf5ZCuiiqXsgHrrQdLodf2V1DkcY1XpCH_xZGB7tR2DL5UcwiA2NXb-tDi3MLtEl-7dK0felAdqBcPcIEVJrehtcBNOTqpAOSyC_6ZtQLLJI4KvVFvedzQXXUE8I9J-fV2v_oFJyPcoR7sJKZMdnzOY6PTSkq9AzaVo5h1pdmNWCV2mYUPu6fCYZs-QltUaq7liHcw2ie5krFnChyjPBNHrtgM8wH-cRoiQtsrO5ATFFU23UnQlyLgQwmZeAPmp5XSJeafSX_LqkTMxX-cCHDyIVRP4lfyZpptppl6rS0k8ucgZ1Ry9Gsifr5YVpJoFbrIXc1ZiinzGjPqcpMu8plxgIR-vibkQgAXbThVR4EGqEFOHgoBgn3X7O5qGwXPzflk8l56C7dGT78u2FxepVW_cvYAG8vrrm3sqLD9nQIwfF6LLpzKSQC9OZcWtWkm5vf98-2oboycpySW6iSlGyFnFeVYAtsJcUqTSDjxtIElCx2D5DmQDI5tJ8rTHxpT-26T2OlZdjZccKth12T1MskrJA2kazkVbc7BD7dZvYjtM2CNZMxMfsyCYY3BReRjWBlqtSdIxxllQ_X2gJDDcQhEnvLYKCFrrl9fwor-WHsNVnRAUNf_AAgjeJ3_xL9LA/3r9/W9kbL1y-T3yIg5Dto6RFTg/h6/Una6KE1PAc6cS_uZpqvi_X9V1-H9D8HRBn9T20bpMNY)** Let’s do the dang thing! clean_body: We’ve got to fight with every ounce of energy we have over these next 18 days to get Senator Warnock re-elected. | | In just 18 days, Georgians will head to the polls again to choose their next senator. I’ve been in politics for a long time, so let me tell you: This one is going to be a squeaker. Right now, Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock and MAGA Republican Herschel Walker are crisscrossing the Peach State to get out the vote before the December 6 runoff. With a little bit of elbow grease and help from a lot of loyal Democrats like you, I know we can win this. This grassroots team has spent the year helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. Now, Senator Warnock is counting on your support to bring this home. Will you split a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC today? Some folks call it a pipe dream that Democrats can win in traditionally red states. But I was born in Georgia, and I’ve seen firsthand what's possible when we roll up our sleeves and get to work. Last cycle, we turned both of Georgia’s seats blue for the first time in nearly two decades -- all because the DNC invested early and folks like you stepped up when it mattered most. That’s the power of this grassroots team, Derek. But we can’t take last cycle for granted. We’ve got to fight with every ounce of energy we have over these next 18 days to get Senator Warnock re-elected and elect Democrats nationwide for years to come. Let’s do the dang thing! James James Carville When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. Peter,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

**I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th.**

He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. Peter, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY. I've been on my fair share of teams that went up against a better-funded opponent and won because we had our hearts in the game. Now, in this race for the final U.S. Senate seat, I truly believe conservatives have what it takes to win on December 6th. However, we CANNOT afford to go into this fight without at least having the proper equipment. We only have a few hours left to pick up the pace. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 18 days for Georgia to decide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Rev. Warnock’s runoff election is in 18 days. His campaign left everything on the table to make it this far. Now, he needs our support to rebuild the resources to defeat Herschel Walker — Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
Derek, Democrats officially secured 50 votes in the Senate, giving us the majority for two more years with Vice President Kamala Harris’s tie-breaking vote.
**Now, let’s make it 51._By electing Rev. Warnock, and beating Hershel Walker._**
Rev. Warnock’s runoff election is in 18 days. His campaign left everything on the table to make it this far. Now, he needs our support to rebuild the resources to defeat Herschel Walker — Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate.
**[Will you split $10 or any amount you can spare to Rev. Warnock’s campaign and ours to help him keep Georgia blue?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Raphael Warnock and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.xHzBB4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.Pekub1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=6&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.yqvkFX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=7&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.lSmETc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=8&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.kanJGq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=9&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.KIdsjB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=10&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)
---
Make no mistake about it: We need Rev. Warnock’s seat. **We. Can. Do. This.**
Rev. Warnock finished in first place in the election that sent him and Herschel Walker to a runoff. He’s won the Georgia runoff before. And adding a 51st vote to our Senate majority will be critical to our progress for the next two years.
Confirming federal judges, and President Biden’s administration appointments. Forcefully advocating for working families, for voting rights, for our democracy. No, we can’t lose Rev. Warnock’s voice in the Senate.
I’m all-in to defend Rev. Warnock’s seat, and I hope you are too. So I’ll ask you one more time, because this is important:
**[Derek, will you chip in $10, $25, or even $50 to support Rev. Warnock and our campaign to help him KEEP Georgia blue and win this critical Senate runoff election on December 6th?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221118_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=11&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)**
Thanks for standing with Rev. Warnock today. With your support, I know he will have what it takes to win.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1374%2E5257348%2EuGg-kt)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.
body:
House leadership is up for grabs
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffcf1241-43e0-47e6-9c7a-f7fcdd23e40a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T549a0524-5cb4-43a6-87da-205d76929c64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-22 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bc682ca-2bfc-4679-8706-ac59628ec6b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We must ensure Salas has the funds for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or two, so every vote is counted, we can take this seat and make it less likely there is a Speaker McCarthy, and more likely a power sharing arrangement that ensures the issues we care about don't get buried._** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02c7c38f-d35e-4399-8e06-cd7b4e066ec7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can._** **_Cliff_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cd3c7e4-87b7-44a5-80de-ec87827ae08b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Tina Kotek
subject: The work begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter — I’m not wasting a single moment to start moving Oregon forward.

One of the things I heard from people around the state during the campaign is that the challenges facing Portland affect the whole state.

Earlier this week, I had a constructive first meeting with Portland Mayor Ted Wheeler, where we discussed several urgent issues.

We discussed the City's efforts to address homelessness and street camping, the Portland Police Bureau's staffing challenges and action plans to improve response times, and how we can partner with major employers to revitalize downtown.

I also requested to meet with him every two weeks going forward to ensure we continue to share information and take on the biggest issues facing the state's largest city.

And it’s not just about Portland. I made a promise to be a Governor for all of Oregon, and I know that we can tackle the biggest issues through partnerships with local leaders across the state.

This is just the beginning of working together to build a stronger Oregon. As Governor, I will be committed to working directly with community members and leaders to implement plans that will solve issues that face Oregonians daily.

Like my meeting with Mayor Wheeler, I am excited to dig in and get the job done.

Thank you, and I’ll keep you posted on my progress.

— Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901582:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901582:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61901581:6kY7X1GnN:m:1:3374012347:30D7D83FEFA7AEF05D62242D0B4D362C:r)

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54804809/379724650/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3765-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWIzMzA5Ni1hZTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8DxwvktW6Rtzxb1grLWmuHmbo-uZtwXhvVmTy8GlcA=)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**
**[Please, friend, will you split a donation of $5 or more now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54804810/379724651/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3765-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWIzMzA5Ni1hZTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8DxwvktW6Rtzxb1grLWmuHmbo-uZtwXhvVmTy8GlcA=)**

name: Our Revolution
subject: what should we focus on before the House falls to Republicans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Bernie launched Our Revolution because he knew deep in his bones that corporate control of the Democratic Party ensures that it will never deliver results for working people.

We live through the consequences of corporate Democratic rule in an age where Republicans have fully embraced far-right fascism. It means we lose our rights while Joe Manchin smiles smugly on his yacht.

That's why we've been building power for years to create lasting change in how the Party operates.

Peter Willis, this weekend, Our Revolution is leveraging the long-term organizing we've done inside the Democratic Party to fight for a series of rule changes to make the Party representative of American voters, not corporations. Take our official survey, and let us know what you would change about the party!

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/change_the_party/?t=1011&akid=3776%2E5885482%2ExE7e5C

How would you fix the Democratic Party?

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/change_the_party/?t=1012&akid=3776%2E5885482%2ExE7e5C

Over the past 5 years, Our Revolution leaders and allies have succeeded in making real change in 15 of the 57 Dem Parties.

We’re not cheerleaders for the party, and we are never shy to let you know what we think is very wrong.

But here’s the bottom line: we’re not giving up on changing it either.

Right-wing and corporate money is flooding democratic primaries, and there are currently no rules to address it. We can truly make elections fairer and more just — join us in this push!

We need reform at every level, from the presidential nominating process down the ballot. Please take our survey and let us know your thoughts on what needs to change.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/change_the_party/?t=1013&akid=3776%2E5885482%2ExE7e5C

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_SV_3MU_20221118_1_1.DeklCn&t=1008&akid=3776%2E5885482%2ExE7e5C ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_SV_3MU_20221118_1_1.pKC9cR&t=1009&akid=3776%2E5885482%2ExE7e5C ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_SV_3MU_20221118_1_1.B3xZ11&t=1010&akid=3776%2E5885482%2ExE7e5C ]GIVE ONCE
