| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=85248900&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODUyNDg5MDAsImlhdCI6MTY2ODgwNTgxMCwiZXhwIjoxNjcxMzk3ODEwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.4VvQJMs0OB3TyNhLUiQbr9Oz50NR5SY0vAaKfBqCkus)
---
| | [Save](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFoaWRidXR0YXIuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvYW4tb2xpZ2FyY2gtc3RlcHMtYXNpZGUtd2hpbGUtc3RpbGw_.nP9ByD6DzokPybBCryGEolVHtp1-dUlyiX5xDlC7RBk?)
---
Yesterday's [announcement](https://substack.com/redirect/9106727d-0f80-4f32-a96a-6126c204db57?r=1hvr60) by Nancy Pelosi was as significant for its omissions as it was for what she said. While resigning the Speaker's Gavel as she had [previously promised](https://substack.com/redirect/73c2a4d3-74f7-45ea-809a-688fc8bd77cf?r=1hvr60) to do, she also indicated her plans to retain her seat in Congress, and to support a [new generation](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f068db-8fb2-4e4e-98ca-dd41f331bb3c?r=1hvr60) of Democratic House leaders ultimately poised to continue her dedication to Wall Street and the Pentagon.
Journalists predictably launched into fawning reviews of Pelosi's career in Washington, overlooking her policy legacy, documented corruption, and renowned record of ducking debates since winning her congressional seat in 1987. From continuing to place her stock portfolio before the public interest, to her [longstanding aspiration](https://substack.com/redirect/e5ee9c5f-1c7a-4525-8c0a-e519ca419fa2?r=1hvr60) to install her daughter in her seat when she finally retires, too many narratives remain unnoticed in the aftermath of yesterday's announcement.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9b2c0cd3-697a-4071-89ce-405188df5715?r=1hvr60)|
---|---|---
### **What this means**
Democrats have [conclusively lost](https://substack.com/redirect/b36db53f-d29c-4a45-802f-fb9ed1ef2daf?r=1hvr60) the House, ensuring GOP control of the lower chamber of Congress for the remainder of Biden's presidency. Pelosi's decision to retain her seat--and likely, most of her influence, given her role as the party's [leading fundraiser](https://substack.com/redirect/aa25fb7c-0c6e-4624-9a36-0f6205536c60?r=1hvr60)--ensures that Democratic opposition to the Republican House majority will continue to prioritize Wall Street's interests before the needs of working Americans.
Even while Democrats held the House, under Pelosi's leadership, it made little progress on establishing the basic human right to healthcare [long](https://substack.com/redirect/2e91f0c4-7164-4e2e-9777-0d69e3ff788e?r=1hvr60) enjoyed in more generous ([even far less wealthy](https://substack.com/redirect/3458165e-a3fd-44ce-b079-a746f0100827?r=1hvr60)) countries. While her sycophants are quick to cite the 2010 passage of the so-called "Affordable Care Act" as a moment defining Pelosi's legislative legacy, its results have proven nuanced. It did expand coverage and remove pre-existing conditions as a pretext for insurance companies to deny coverage, but ultimately held working Americans hostage to arbitrary and predatory pricing by insurance companies, whose premiums [continue](https://substack.com/redirect/5cedf28b-fc31-446b-bd48-18189034713a?r=1hvr60) to escalate even after [dramatic expansion](https://substack.com/redirect/6ccc4d96-9ad7-4995-b1b7-740d8c8e5251?r=1hvr60) (at times as much as nearly 30% per year) in the years since it was passed.
Even while Democrats held the House, under Pelosi's leadership, Congress made little progress on advancing climate justice despite the [acceleration](https://substack.com/redirect/d333fa89-ca88-44aa-83c8-197398517d3e?r=1hvr60) of the global climate catastrophe. The Bipartisan Infrastructure package passed in 2021 included the largest investments in climate resiliency that Washington has ever made, but it does not adequately respond to the need and ultimately remains a [drop in the bucket](https://substack.com/redirect/ef7560d6-d5c8-4de0-ad23-a0744bb7357c?r=1hvr60).
The Bipartisan Infrastructure package also [prioritized corporate profits](https://substack.com/redirect/a833d162-d7ce-41a0-b8b2-ef81dea76d04?r=1hvr60) as much as climate justice objectives, and left in place billions of dollars in [public subsidies](https://substack.com/redirect/6703498f-3c82-4e01-874d-90aa96018670?r=1hvr60) for an ultimately predatory industry. It damns the future to mounting degrees of inevitable misery.
That is Pelosi's legacy.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..c2Z69B6XG45fz_YiFzU6IqNG6xjEGc5jCCVSexrjs-c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=85248900)
Even while Democrats held the House, under Pelosi's leadership, Congress made no progress on restricting the open and unapologetic [corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/adeb136f-13c1-4248-b464-7378911093bd?r=1hvr60) of insider trading by policymakers, their families, and their staff. The handful of bills introduced to curtail parts of the problem all invite [continuing conflicts of interest](https://substack.com/redirect/2022d158-37c6-406d-9971-26a1287a7341?r=1hvr60) through less visible and transparent [alternatives](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca54f7c-98d2-4d05-9349-9153e986038d?r=1hvr60) to public equities--and in any case, have remained the subjects of [hearings](https://substack.com/redirect/dabf0d31-26ce-40ae-af4d-bdd0dbe219fe?r=1hvr60) rather than votes.
Now that Democrats have lost the House to impending GOP control, expect not only partisan gridlock going forward, but also potentially new rounds of debate--and [dysfunction](https://substack.com/redirect/5ca1cbaf-fef5-4683-aacd-797c35e0fcdd?r=1hvr60)--surrounding the federal debt ceiling and [risks to the global economy](https://substack.com/redirect/494b86c5-ca40-4af3-8482-0216fc209ddd?r=1hvr60) should the U.S. fail to pay its substantial debts.
Have you found politics recently tumultuous? Strap in!
### **How we got here**
Pelosi's governance has been defined more by self-protection and self-promotion than by public service. Her tenure--as well as the [remarkable performance](https://substack.com/redirect/fa4ab178-e969-448f-93e0-ce71f9ff0c32?r=1hvr60) of her family's stock portfolio--in office could not have been possible without the complicity of press outlets that have placed access (essentially, the business of) journalism before their professional ethical commitments to transparency and accountability.
Editorial voices from across the political continuum--ranging from [CBS](https://substack.com/redirect/2d0615b7-9e21-415b-90e2-5f9c91108606?r=1hvr60) and the [Wall Street Journal](https://substack.com/redirect/3f34dc97-6821-4f3d-b7a7-daeba88152b5?r=1hvr60) to even [Mother Jones](https://substack.com/redirect/4931db64-e59c-4724-b25d-0a382f9ce66d?r=1hvr60)--continue to fawn over Nancy Pelosi, creating a cult of personality by emphasizing her power while downplaying the many communities marginalized by her so-called "leadership." Who could ever imagine that a media landscape so dominated by corporate conglomerates could prove so deferential to a figure whose policy legacy has been defined by fealty to her stock portfolio?
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=85248900&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODUyNDg5MDAsImlhdCI6MTY2ODgwNTgxMCwiZXhwIjoxNjcxMzk3ODEwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.4VvQJMs0OB3TyNhLUiQbr9Oz50NR5SY0vAaKfBqCkus)
The unwillingness among journalists to acknowledge her corruption is remarkable because Pelosi's profound influence over federal policy should invite more--rather than less--scrutiny from the press. For better or worse, the examples extend well beyond the mere broken promises for which politicians have grown renowned.
The most glaring example might be Pelosi's [history](https://substack.com/redirect/f904d02a-0cb6-4e95-95f1-e9d3159e4f7a?r=1hvr60) of insider trading and prioritizing public policy supporting the enterprises in which she has invested. That issue at least prompted [long overdue](https://substack.com/redirect/bb99cb2a-9718-4d8b-9953-429f10782977?r=1hvr60) press attention in 2022 after decades of the press ignoring it altogether.
Pelosi punching down at Ilhan Omar for supporting international human rights, however, might be even worse. Pelosi is a wealthy white woman tone policing the perspectives of a Somali-American colleague informed by her experience as a refugee. It's even worse than that: should the U.S. ever accept the jurisdiction of the International Criminal Court, as [Ilhan has urged](https://substack.com/redirect/dba10e2e-3e67-41a6-bcfe-3e1bed404384?r=1hvr60), Pelosi herself could [potentially face criminal liability](https://substack.com/redirect/3e5b9533-0063-4327-9561-d7974671c061?r=1hvr60) since she reportedly [knew at the time](https://substack.com/redirect/a2ddfab8-53a6-44ee-a860-956315f73c8a?r=1hvr60) about CIA torture under the Bush administration and failed to do anything to inform the public as [required](https://substack.com/redirect/207b5db2-58ad-4066-a322-e85f0c4c2bc7?r=1hvr60) under international law. In other words, every time Pelosi has punched down at Ilhan, she may have done so in order to protect herself.
A true public servant would show up for debates (and an independent press would require them to), but since winning her seat in a 1987 Special Election with the support of a political insider, [Pelosi has never once debated an opponent](https://substack.com/redirect/0286dd3e-65da-4939-b0d3-c3b1292f2b20?r=1hvr60) while growing fantastically wealthy in the ensuing 35 years.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4248ea89-0533-4e25-8d69-130476da19d4?r=1hvr60)|
---|---|---
The corruption indicated by Pelosi's pattern and practice of insider trading is even more offensive when considering its [various costs](https://substack.com/redirect/60a4107c-f469-4f16-b276-d30390ebac7c?r=1hvr60). Most bemoan the subversion of the marketplace, overlooking the subversion of policymaking by policymakers filling their pockets through legislation favoring enterprises in which they share ownership.
Congressional insider trading also introduces conflicts of interest that infect the policymaking process. For instance, many voices have criticized Pelosi for [failing](https://substack.com/redirect/55cb692d-9e9c-4e3c-8217-6a74f1a13e8f?r=1hvr60) to ever hold a vote on the universal healthcare vision that she [once](https://substack.com/redirect/17ba30ff-0106-4c4f-8baf-40be28a340ad?r=1hvr60) claimed to support. Beyond shielding her colleagues from democratic accountability, she has also taken action in the shadows to kneecap proposals to expand healthcare, offering [assurances](https://substack.com/redirect/dd4fb98f-122a-4d82-96a9-251e3a5f8b6e?r=1hvr60) to corporate supports that she will guard their interests first.
Similarly, Pelosi's recurring support for [increases](https://substack.com/redirect/13083201-e04f-4974-af9d-5974249bc6ef?r=1hvr60) in military spending and belligerent foreign policy has enabled wars that have left millions dead and many more maimed, including tens of thousands of Americans.
To what extent have those choices personally enriched her over time? And at what costs to the public?
Beyond the policy implications of allowing policymakers to wield conflicts of interest are political implications for particular figures emboldened and enabled by Pelosi's positions, including former president Trump. Neither of his impeachments included charges addressing his [misappropriation of public funds](https://substack.com/redirect/012e8354-4bfa-416f-a294-a99a9edf3d3b?r=1hvr60)--likely because Trump's counter-attack would have emphasized the complicity of Democrats in similar offenses, particularly Pelosi's trading.
Even while Pelosi enabled Trump--first, by [supporting](https://substack.com/redirect/f8efa82f-96c4-4ca9-985c-988dc24141bc?r=1hvr60) his policies, then by [delaying](https://substack.com/redirect/2fdc497b-9ad9-4f56-b3a7-56bb0271ac52?r=1hvr60) impeachment, and then by showing up for it like a [boxer throwing a fight](https://substack.com/redirect/2f8eac1e-56a0-45dd-b8b8-3a4aa933d352?r=1hvr60)--the American press establishment refused to report on the facts, preferring to fawn over [images](https://substack.com/redirect/c740a0e4-8a0c-4554-af38-f67486b33d08?r=1hvr60) of [theatrical](https://substack.com/redirect/d673944c-2290-476b-b28e-c4b1a0945c99?r=1hvr60) so-called "[resistance](https://substack.com/redirect/12a2f201-5a4c-4a7a-b83d-dc8cb0b3cf66?r=1hvr60)." Rather than promote accountability based on documented facts, journalists & editors opted to construct an ultimately false partisan narrative based on images reinforcing tribal divisions among Americans subjected to bipartisan corruption.
In the time since she announced her plans to remain in Congress, how many American journalists have referred to Pelosi's tone-deaf response to Dream Act activists [driven in 2017](https://substack.com/redirect/596865ea-c26f-4eb4-8fc3-6d7fb470403a?r=1hvr60) to interrupt her in order to observe her hypocrisy? How many referenced the Sunrise Movement marching from Paradise, CA to [dump wildfire ash on her front lawn](https://substack.com/redirect/24d5b2c9-fb4a-4fff-be97-cb308a3c6564?r=1hvr60) to thank her for her role in engineering global climate chaos?
How many American journalists ever observed that Pelosi faced challengers in 2022? Outlets from the [San Francisco Examiner](https://substack.com/redirect/12c60596-2bdf-4d8f-aeba-483f733a2608?r=1hvr60) to the [LA Times](https://substack.com/redirect/825528e2-44b9-4557-910a-5b64879711db?r=1hvr60) raced to publish stories prematurely prognosticating about her eventual replacement, ultimately undermining accountability, enabling Pelosi's corruption, and indulging the nepotism implicit in her reported goals of eventually installing her daughter, Christine, in her seat.
I've written elsewhere about how institutional failures by journalists that undermine accountability sadly [encourage](https://substack.com/redirect/24d5b2c9-fb4a-4fff-be97-cb308a3c6564?r=1hvr60)--and ultimately invite--the kinds of political violence that has emerged in our country. Because the media bias insulating Pelosi and other Washington figures from accountability remains unaddressed (and widely unacknowledged), I fear we can expect only more.
Paid subscribers can access a personal reflection below explaining how I feel about all this from the perspective of someone who offered an alternative...

body:
Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election.

| Peter,

I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.

[_So please, will you split $10 between me and BACKROADS PAC – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54800044/379679279/919785734?refcode=BLU-BRP-20221118-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGM2N2ZhMy04NTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ywR1uJpg71DYtEubYT-4JZxtpqkx3OMz_ji4XoZdm58=)**

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

We need to be prepared for the worst case scenario and gather grassroots support for our Recount Fund which will be used to fight for every single vote. _The election-denying GOP will do everything in their power to get ballots thrown out and sway this election, and it’s up to us to fend off those attacks._

It's too soon to back down. Adam is relentlessly fighting for us and we should be doing the same. [_Please chip in today to our Recount Fund so that we stop another MAGA landslide in its tracks._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54800056/379679320/1326559001?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20221118_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDRkNTZjYy04NTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcIakl3L6hmsbQPbOl9xtDZ6mSCAy6WSDZGcGbxGCKU=)

clean_body: | = Hi, Peter, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too. Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election. Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue. But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight. The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this. In a race this neck and neck, every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for all your support, Rev. name: Big Lie Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Update re: Justice Clarence Thomas
body:
Do you think Justice Clarence Thomas should recuse himself? | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** It was reported that Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas made _several_ attempts to interfere in the results of the 2020 election – directly contacting lawmakers in Arizona and Wisconsin and Trump’s Chief of Staff Mark Meadows. **THEN:** Leaked emails from Trump’s lawyers revealed that Trump’s team viewed Justice Thomas as “key” in their plan to delay the certification of the 2020 election. **AND JUST NOW:** Justice Thomas dissented from a Supreme Court ruling forcing the Arizona GOP chair to turn over her phone records to the January 6th Committee. So, we’re asking local Democrats to see if they think Justice Thomas should recuse himself from certain cases. clean_body: Do you think Justice Clarence Thomas should recuse himself? | | | | | FIRST: It was reported that Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas made several attempts to interfere in the results of the 2020 election – directly contacting lawmakers in Arizona and Wisconsin and Trump’s Chief of Staff Mark Meadows. THEN: Leaked emails from Trump’s lawyers revealed that Trump’s team viewed Justice Thomas as “key” in their plan to delay the certification of the 2020 election. AND JUST NOW: Justice Thomas dissented from a Supreme Court ruling forcing the Arizona GOP chair to turn over her phone records to the January 6th Committee. So, we’re asking local Democrats to see if they think Justice Thomas should recuse himself from certain cases. | Do you think Justice Clarence Thomas should recuse himself from any cases related to the 2020 election? Yes No Unsure The Supreme Court does not have a code of ethics, so that’s why we’re reaching out today. We’re polling local Democrats to see where they stand on Justice Thomas’s potential conflict of interest. | Hi , [**Help us build worker power by donating to our strike fund now! We’re sending strike funds directly to workers, so they can go on strike and force their bosses to meet their demands.**](https://gxdxdy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0Mjk4MyxcImxcIjo3MjE1MDc1NjE4NDAzMzEwNixcInJcIjo3MjE1MDc3NzY5MzQ3MjA2Mn0iLCJzIjoiYWIyOWNkNzQxOWE5OGQ1YSJ9) Starbucks has walked out of negotiations with Starbucks union members multiple times in recent weeks. And the company continues to fire workers and close unionized stores around the country. What have Starbucks workers done to deserve this? Exercise their legal rights to organize and demand better working conditions, a living wage, and better benefits. How dare they! That’s why I started Project Strikewave: because workers need our support. Since we started, we’ve used our donations to:

* Provide Amazon workers with strike funds.
* Incorporate our nonprofit.
* File for nonprofit status with the IRS.
* Produce our first video about the CEO of Starbucks.
* Hire a bookkeeper.

[**Thank you! We’re just getting started, so send a quick donation our way and let’s keep building worker power across the country.**](https://gxdxdy.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0Mjk4MyxcImxcIjo3MjE1MDc1NjE4NDAzMzEwNixcInJcIjo3MjE1MDc3NzY5MzQ3MjA2Mn0iLCJzIjoiYWIyOWNkNzQxOWE5OGQ1YSJ9)

-Rebecca Parson
Founder of Project Strikewave

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=237d368a45cf430c9c6ecf8294188507&_e=griZaIsbdo2uu9ieFINx2j0ZWT5CWvt1YvrxdnXnGtlpgV_zRhQCE3TqMPPqwTj3-uJpDF45rXQqMdVkrhDgpipv48RQAM1ZF-KvEc61dceIyPcgMqKJ8EZs9R8HaDDHXDC3oV0cMe2k1eI0kMN_3-lbQltGKsEa_8HSxSOcDwBK5GexGm06UPJ7gGt4o2hQMWPupcUjqeK2Yfw2S0huycxkHNDrBdjOyZ6rgc4o6VxCJH0XFg82dqQl4xEC8R5cZciVB-m7X4ePI2rvkyqtv_am4t3xH2Lc1p0C6i5Im2zBAmdjSnitHQJHNpU8kqr1eIZ3Y1JKJiAEywdkzKiScicOWXgAlAw79vF9Oh4FqcMd7axr8JT3JmUtMEBa4JWtDKpmiviYvX74HxCMxZ-2hA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=237d368a45cf430c9c6ecf8294188507&_e=griZaIsbdo2uu9ieFINx2j0ZWT5CWvt1YvrxdnXnGtlpgV_zRhQCE3TqMPPqwTj3-uJpDF45rXQqMdVkrhDgpipv48RQAM1ZF-KvEc61dceIyPcgMqKJ8EZs9R8HaDDHXDC3oV0cMe2k1eI0kMN_3-lbQltGKsEa_8HSxSOcDwBK5GexGm06UPJ7gGt4o2hQMWPupcUjqeK2Yfw2S0huycxkHNDrBdjOyZ6rgc4o6VxCJH0XFg82dqQl4xEC8R5cSBCJrO3Rj4ZeShxEu7bLAJ9s9q5TisuSFHd4mMYvL3nJEuf1VhyGRSCkAYIqFnV1sXq32UQ7ZZ-bJHVbI785Y7dpyM3--eADIVSVRRwpVmKT7L4menOoFmgq2UJAU3gogWggmKmjD7RwORWTvrkNBA%3D%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=237d368a45cf430c9c6ecf8294188507&_e=griZaIsbdo2uu9ieFINx2j0ZWT5CWvt1YvrxdnXnGtlpgV_zRhQCE3TqMPPqwTj3-uJpDF45rXQqMdVkrhDgpipv48RQAM1ZF-KvEc61dceIyPcgMqKJ8EZs9R8HaDDHXDC3oV0cMe2k1eI0kMN_3-lbQltGKsEa_8HSxSOcDwBK5GexGm06UPJ7gGt4o2hQMWPupcUjqeK2Yfw2S0huycxkHNDrBdjOyZ6rgc4o6VxCJH0XFg82dqQl4xEC8R5cx2dubY3sxOgNrO8MLPUeA9e5q1lzs0aTc29zwMW3Lw4S3uE-8mXI6mYUf0i4yXBycPGVyCK59BYeo5UGy8TcfwBVCCV_Pu2ncBc8oDOuUFXXHVoFv1wh_iz7txWuOPty4UHaXDWS0_l2oxkKSxM_4w%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| **Senator Steven Roberts to Host Free COVID-19 & Flu Shots Clinic**
State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, is teaming up with Affinia Healthcare and Urban League of Metropolitan St. Louis to host a free COVID-19 and flu shots clinic on Saturday, Nov. 19, 2022, from 10:00 a.m.-12:00 p.m. The clinic will be located on the second floor of the Victor Roberts Building at 1408 N. Kingshighway Blvd. in St. Louis, MO 63113. All are welcome, and no appointments or insurance are necessary.

“It is extremely important that folks take measures to protect their health as we embrace what may be another cold, hard winter,” Sen. Roberts said. “This is especially true for our most vulnerable citizens. Holding these clinics in the 63113 area helps ensure that even our underserved neighbors have access to a safe COVID-19 vaccine and flu shot.”

Senator Roberts has hosted several COVID-19 and flu shots clinics since 2020, particularly in the city’s most underserved areas.
---
|
---
|
---
**Senator Steven Roberts Helps Open McFarlane Place in STL's Latest Effort to Address Housing Instability**
State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, participated in a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Wednesday for the opening of the McFarlane House, St. Patrick Center’s latest addition for addressing St. Louis’ housing instability. The project was funded in part due to Sen. Roberts’ successful appropriation of $900,000 to St. Patrick Center during the 2022 legislative session.

“St. Patrick Center offers permanent solutions to homelessness for individuals and families, which in turn, uplifts entire communities,” Sen. Roberts said. “With this new McFarlane Place location, St. Patrick Center will be empowered to offer even more resources to those who need it most. I look forward to their continued success in transforming the lives of our neighbors struggling with housing instability and helping them achieve self-sufficiency and dignity.”

McFarlane Place is located at 4516 N. Market St., St. Louis, MO 63113.
|

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ce38bb9a49&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|

| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5ea89633d8&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=c71e1ed737&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d6e7a3b9f5&e=a088917f89).

clean_body: Free COVID-19 & flu shots clinic tomorrow! | | | | | | | Capitol Report November 18, 2022 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Senator Steven Roberts to Host Free COVID-19 & Flu Shots Clinic State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, is teaming up with Affinia Healthcare and Urban League of Metropolitan St. Louis to host a free COVID-19 and flu shots clinic on Saturday, Nov. 19, 2022, from 10:00 a.m.-12:00 p.m. The clinic will be located on the second floor of the Victor Roberts Building at 1408 N. Kingshighway Blvd. in St. Louis, MO 63113. All are welcome, and no appointments or insurance are necessary. “It is extremely important that folks take measures to protect their health as we embrace what may be another cold, hard winter,” Sen. Roberts said. “This is especially true for our most vulnerable citizens. Holding these clinics in the 63113 area helps ensure that even our underserved neighbors have access to a safe COVID-19 vaccine and flu shot.” Senator Roberts has hosted several COVID-19 and flu shots clinics since 2020, particularly in the city’s most underserved areas. | | Senator Steven Roberts Helps Open McFarlane Place in STL's Latest Effort to Address Housing Instability State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, participated in a ribbon-cutting ceremony on Wednesday for the opening of the McFarlane House, St. Patrick Center’s latest addition for addressing St. Louis’ housing instability. The project was funded in part due to Sen. Roberts’ successful appropriation of $900,000 to St. Patrick Center during the 2022 legislative session. “St. Patrick Center offers permanent solutions to homelessness for individuals and families, which in turn, uplifts entire communities,” Sen. Roberts said. “With this new McFarlane Place location, St. Patrick Center will be empowered to offer even more resources to those who need it most. I look forward to their continued success in transforming the lives of our neighbors struggling with housing instability and helping them achieve self-sufficiency and dignity.” McFarlane Place is located at 4516 N. Market St., St. Louis, MO 63113. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . subject: The GOP is descending on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, national Republicans are going ALL IN to prop up Herschel Walker and flip this seat.

**Ted Cruz held a rally in Georgia to fire up the GOP base, Lindsey Graham went on _Fox News_ to beg for donations for Walker – and now, hundreds of Republican staffers have descended on our state to mobilize swing voters and defeat Rev. Warnock.**
With less than 18 days to go, this massive influx of energy from the GOP could tip the scales against us unless we fight back ASAP. We're launching TV ads, boosting our on-the-ground efforts, and doing everything we can to win – but unless we hit our midnight fundraising goal, we may need to scale back at the worst possible moment.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de2a534582d4449490d095c0a003a1f1&_e=n4bILYEvU2hROIPD9wL8h3h_8RnI4Lp7Cs5wb2l0Id4wOAHoMba--GTC5kQxEC5CLzZq4MuitqPl2H7-19qDy-vFUmo_E1MJmgpsAsSC1cF-83Qne3K9iIlOxBPjoL0x5EKqqQLIpplrkBl-mqzVNRqJKx9Jk4Iv6vtDFdJY372Omj2OFkdUzYgpekT4FJ6gkJ1ufHnJ7wlVhZQvGCzmYZpUfPAZlmLq6vj0Ou39KzyEPlJKabEninbArXLgMTQfDv_4Rkpasc3zPZ7gyo2u3s3616VWuTEO2hcJSCiqDLgl-VfPtqBPwNCzlAMgSPqvXN36Cx26hUDDDwuQF3Av1dXfIqKlrgYWzXFlwLJJNCkRm6JLLdePC4HgB9lExYV-xquB-sY_uX4AYPhiALfP5w%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de2a534582d4449490d095c0a003a1f1&_e=n4bILYEvU2hROIPD9wL8h3h_8RnI4Lp7Cs5wb2l0Id4wOAHoMba--GTC5kQxEC5CLzZq4MuitqPl2H7-19qDy-vFUmo_E1MJmgpsAsSC1cF-83Qne3K9iIlOxBPjoL0x5EKqqQLIpplrkBl-mqzVNRqJKx9Jk4Iv6vtDFdJY372Omj2OFkdUzYgpekT4FJ6gkJ1ufHnJ7wlVhZQvGCzmYZpUfPAZlmLq6vj0Ou39KzyEPlJKabEninbArXLgMTQf-AAdtfIJxoUHWYJTXfZrf0FXuOaKj1-Vy4zgFlVm2o6Heh79K0UiTMM1ijQIlw5NgJzDNdgLzqpIELppdZeqB8r2JpiR7-7dV_W0hpSM3ApcRMgEg-UMg2cJk3eWk24CP_g2iwTjC6vlAp2UVczncA%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de2a534582d4449490d095c0a003a1f1&_e=n4bILYEvU2hROIPD9wL8h3h_8RnI4Lp7Cs5wb2l0Id4wOAHoMba--GTC5kQxEC5CLzZq4MuitqPl2H7-19qDy-vFUmo_E1MJmgpsAsSC1cF-83Qne3K9iIlOxBPjoL0x5EKqqQLIpplrkBl-mqzVNRqJKx9Jk4Iv6vtDFdJY372Omj2OFkdUzYgpekT4FJ6gkJ1ufHnJ7wlVhZQvGCzmYZpUfPAZlmLq6vj0Ou39KzyEPlJKabEninbArXLgMTQf6zYZejsCbDtx5K_5e6jaVQvyI8P2H2MvvFjiHZQwPWg1E5Kpnv9bxBYGilEh7xlX51e1d7M2HpEwHrvljvlAbEZ8PfrCYthRPFDtiSpPP8IGCVwxd7xokVDFCIFZ8HI_YyVd_jiKZ9bKgk0qBzX17A%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

subject: Georgia GOP SHORTENS early voting in the runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Senator Warnock is taking action – are you??
| **FIRST Georgia’s Senate election went to a runoff.** It was too close to call!

**THEN Republicans refused to allow voting two days after a holiday so that they can shorten the early voting period.** _They’re terrified Democrats will come out in droves on the Saturday after Thanksgiving to stop Herschel Walker!_

**NOW Democrats – _including Senator Warnock_ – are taking action. ** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_Warnock/?source=VPP_20221118_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2) [We need 50,000 Democrats to join us and join Senator Warnock TODAY to overcome this widespread voter suppression! Add your name to stand with Warnock and co-sponsor this lawsuit! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_Warnock/?source=VPP_20221118_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2) | [**I’M WITH SENATOR WARNOCK: CLICK HERE TO CO-SPONSOR THIS LAWSUIT AND HELP STOP THE GOP’S VOTER SUPPRESSION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_Warnock/?source=VPP_20221118_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2)
---
Look, the November election between Walker and Senator Warnock was WAY TOO CLOSE for comfort.

**And since Democrats squashed the GOP’s red wave, Republicans are DESPERATE to stop thousands of people from casting their ballot.**

If we want to protect our democracy, reproductive rights, and expand our Senate Majority, we NEED to reelect Senator Warnock. _And that will only happen if Georgians are allowed to vote on Saturday!_

[Please, don’t wait a single second to act: Add your name to stand with Senator Warnock and join Democrats’ lawsuit to overturn Republican voter suppression and co-sponsor this lawsuit!!! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_Warnock/?source=VPP_20221118_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2)
[**I’M WITH SENATOR WARNOCK: CLICK HERE TO CO-SPONSOR THIS LAWSUIT AND HELP STOP THE GOP’S VOTER SUPPRESSION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_Warnock/?source=VPP_20221118_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=10&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5406%2E878179%2ERRasR2).**

name: Team Beshear
subject: Medical cannabis: Andy is delivering for suffering Kentuckians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Tell the KY General Assembly to legalize medical cannabis. Peter,

This week, Andy announced executive orders legalizing medical cannabis for Kentuckians suffering from chronic pain and terminal illness. Andy took action, because the General Assembly failed to act.

90% of Kentuckians support medical cannabis in our Commonwealth. Yet, the General Assembly continues to ignore the will of the people and refuses to act on medical cannabis legislation. That's why Andy took action and signed these executive orders, but he wants to hear from you.

[**If you support the executive orders legalizing medical cannabis, will you add your name now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54802073/379687856/-1964644166?refcode=em22_221118_Cnnbs_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221118_Cnnbs_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2IxNjdhYS05MTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ePGjhp_-ejIUSjYNCsfyr43sFi76fNYetX2ZG7swtA=&emci=557c7f45-7067-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=33b167aa-9167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1437603) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54802074/379687857/-1964644166?refcode=em22_221118_Cnnbs_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221118_Cnnbs_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2IxNjdhYS05MTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ePGjhp_-ejIUSjYNCsfyr43sFi76fNYetX2ZG7swtA=&emci=557c7f45-7067-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=33b167aa-9167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1437603) While the legislature plays political games, Kentuckians suffer without legal access to highly effective, potentially life-saving medication. Andy's executive orders mean people suffering from chronic and terminal conditions will soon be able to receive the help they need without fear of being charged with a misdemeanor.

Peter – this isn’t a Democrat or a Republican issue. People deserve access to pain-reducing and potentially life-saving medication. And Andy will do everything in his power to make sure Kentuckians can live happy, prosperous lives free from needless suffering. But Andy's facing opposition from folks in the other party, so we need to show him we have his back.

[**Sign your name now to show your support of Andy's executive orders to legalize medical cannabis.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54802075/379687858/-1964644166?refcode=em22_221118_Cnnbs_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221118_Cnnbs_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2IxNjdhYS05MTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ePGjhp_-ejIUSjYNCsfyr43sFi76fNYetX2ZG7swtA=&emci=557c7f45-7067-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=33b167aa-9167-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1437603)

Thank you,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54802076/379687859/-2130874549?refcode=em22_221118_cnnbis_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221118_cnnbis_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2IxNjdhYS05MTY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ePGjhp_-ejIUSjYNCsfyr43sFi76fNYetX2ZG7swtA=)

That's why Andy took action and signed these executive orders, but he wants to hear from you. While the legislature plays political games, Kentuckians suffer without legal access to highly effective, potentially life-saving medication. Andy's executive orders mean people suffering from chronic and terminal conditions will soon be able to receive the help they need without fear of being charged with a misdemeanor. Peter – this isn’t a Democrat or a Republican issue. People deserve access to pain-reducing and potentially life-saving medication. And Andy will do everything in his power to make sure Kentuckians can live happy, prosperous lives free from needless suffering. But Andy's facing opposition from folks in the other party, so we need to show him we have his back. Thank you, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

subject: HISTORIC upset
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I'm in awe.

Democrats just made HISTORY in these midterms

– First, we shocked the nation and SHUT DOWN the “red wave” pundits predicted.

– Then, we PROTECTED our Senate Majority and kept Mitch McConnell out of power for good.

– Now, we’re making sure that EVERY last vote is fairly counted.

I’m so proud of Democrats across the country. We achieved what many said was impossible. But our work isn’t done yet. We need to close out strong to ensure every vote is counted and every American has their voice heard. But that takes resources. So I’m reaching out to grassroots Democrats like you to ask if you can chip in $15 or whatever you can to ensure every vote is counted in this historic midterm election. subject: Thank you for your support!
body:
| | |
---
| | November 18, 2022
---
| **Dear Friends,**

Let me just say _thank you_ for all of your support as we worked to bring common sense back to Congress. It was an honor to campaign across Montgomery and Berks counties this past year, and I was inspired by the people that I met along the way.

We have real challenges facing us today, but I've never been more optimistic about the future of America. Let’s all continue to work to make sure that this nation – our last, best hope on Earth – stands proud and strong for our children and our children’s’ children.

Again, thank you for your support and the honor of being your candidate for the 4th Congressional District.

For PA,

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Raphael Warnock is the kind of man we should have more of in the Senate--he understands how most Americans live, as he's lived an American story. Warnock grew up in public housing in Savannah, GA, with 11 brothers and sisters. He was the first in his family to graduate from a four-year college, and went on to earn a Ph.D.
body:
Keep a good Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b0d5513-4036-4f9c-aff1-790391513638/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **[With just a couple weeks until the runoff election in Georgia, we ask you to please make a contribution of any amount to the Warnock campaign to keep Georgia blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07049940-672b-4bc4-bcf5-f04e49d77e3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
Raphael Warnock is the kind of man we simply must keep in the Senate--he understands how most Americans live, as he's lived an American story. Warnock grew up in public housing in Savannah, GA, with 11 brothers and sisters. He was the first in his family to graduate from a four-year college, and went on to earn a Ph.D. _When an historic opportunity presented itself, and Warnock was given the honor of serving as senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta--preaching from the very pulpit where Martin Luther King Jr. once stood--he proved the perfect choice._

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Keep a good man in the Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taca4e834-74ac-4908-8d96-c85750f54b84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | A lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights, a fighter for a woman's right to control their body and keeping our schools, malls and other public spaces safe from gun violence, he next proved himself the ideal choice to take on these crucial fights in Washington.
---
**Because Warnock doesn't court corporate donors, he needs grassroots support from communities like Blue Amp Action, as Mitch McConnell has dumped $52 million into Georgia to attack Warnock with dishonest smears.** **[Can you join us in supporting him with a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford? They don't make many like Senator Warnock. We need his empathy, morality and work ethic in Washington.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf753f42d-599a-4e6d-9fc9-aefec7075dc9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you all for making this community a powerful supporter of progressive values across the country.
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. # What's With These Sudden Deaths?!
## With Dr. Neil Shah
**Friday, November 18th, 2022** Friend, Why are younger people dying at higher rates all of a sudden? Funeral homes are making record profits and we're learning about the death or heart failure of younger people, especially athletes, all the time. We try to uncover the truth with Dr. Neil Shah, who is well researched and not afraid to go against the mainstream narrative when looking at the evidence.

It is with your help that: WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left. We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign. As Jen Kiggans prepares to leave the Virginia Senate, Democrats need to be ready for a fight.

|

clean_body: As Jen Kiggans prepares to leave the Virginia Senate, Democrats need to be ready for a fight. | Derek, Last week, Jen Kiggans won her race for the U.S. House. As she prepares to take her GOP extremist ideology to Congress, she’s resigned from her seat in the Virginia Senate – which means Democrats have a unique opportunity to gain a seat in the nearly tied Virginia Senate. In Virginia’s 7th Senate District, a Democratic victory could mean the difference between preserving the right to choose or allowing Glenn Youngkin to dictate reproductive healthcare. That’s why the special election to fill SD-07 is going to be so critical. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** With reproductive freedom on the line, the race in SD-07 is going to be a must-win for Democrats. = Virginia Dems =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Friend,

I was riding in the car earlier today, and BANG!

Reality set in, and I came to a huge realization.

Once the Left gets their ducks in a row, they will be back to their old tricks. The red wave didn’t pan out how we expected it, and the left will go into overtime to advance their radical agenda. **[I’ll keep fighting until I’m out of breath, and we’re not out of this fight yet.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJyNUcuO3CAQ_Br7Zss0-DEHH2YzmRyiHHelnEYMtG2ygC0Mcfj7YGcme0wkhOiiqyi6sCdN03WEMahy2TPgZBC56qECIIR0QClhTSkZdDUl97auCa2rU8YqNFzpcnCIflL2HZ1MdSzFbPKpl0RSeoeOt1RwcRIDa1hddUQAtoRVItf95P2yZvScwTWtFUVwWG7KOpS7SMLe0VqUMZ2ebgr1I6x-4tJEo6y863mzfOOxmOMidiF6NbPFeFs0yhEzevEuYAaN2-WdsuMHZG7z4pX9AII3N4NSBZMwhz_Xibsnvs7BiV3vz0MH5tHtnYXmxYr2AQpuFq7GXfZfpp-M2Xq0_j8Ixy-LwcvimH3iczOHg0rrVN2sVjIVMnx27dfzdxQHOCmZ5ny5xPG6_Npo7nq5bEprtTZtynE8ctxjS9a1GmKftS8ZwEEDOBKC4Okbf3395mJx2s7Fl_oNxv0SPqXdxwX_dj5EyodFyNrLb13zxi0)**

I KNOW we did our best here in Louisiana. We had a **MASSIVE** victory, but unfortunately, we still have a lot of work to do to turn our country around. We don’t have time to sit around and cry over spilt milk. We need to get back on our feet and start fighting like the future of the country depends on it. Because it does.

**[Much like how a radical woker can’t live without a $20 soy milk latte, I can’t live without your support.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJyNUcFSwyAU_Jrklkx4JGk95FCt9aS36rGD8JJggWQIGPHrJbHVo84wDG95uyxvsSF1vd2SsoQiFU0JjLQ8lQ0UAISQLVBKyjoXJWwrSl43VUVoVdwkZYGaSZW3FtH10pzRiliHnA867RvS1oSxirbACt5SjoLwgsRDwTEq0FQ1vXPjlNBdAoe4JuTeYj5LY1EsIhE7ozEoQjxd3WTyzU-uZ0IHLY14VcNs2MxCNoSRL0L0oAeD4TQqFB0mdO-sxwRqu8hbabpfSJ-G0UnzC3inTxqF9DpiFt-nntkrPg3e8kXv-6EVc2iXzkyxbEJzATnTI5PdIvuX6StjMA6N-wdh_WXWOpGts498pge_UmkVq5NRUsTixUzefH4-3YcV7KWIc97vQ3cYP2aa2kaMs1RKTvUm5titOS6xRetKtqFJNrcJwEoDWBMC7-gzOx4fbchu5l32UD1Dt1zCXdxdGPGn8yKSXyxCstl_AaoNx04)**

clean_body: Wow! Wow! | Friend, I was riding in the car earlier today, and BANG! Reality set in, and I came to a huge realization. Once the Left gets their ducks in a row, they will be back to their old tricks. The red wave didn’t pan out how we expected it, and the left will go into overtime to advance their radical agenda. | I KNOW we did our best here in Louisiana. We had a MASSIVE victory, but unfortunately, we still have a lot of work to do to turn our country around. We don’t have time to sit around and cry over spilt milk. We need to get back on our feet and start fighting like the future of the country depends on it. Because it does. The days ahead will be long and arduous. I’m sure there will be many things said in Washington over the next few months that will make me wish I could bash my head against the wall. I’m asking for your support — do you have my back in the fight against the radical left? Best, John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. clean_body: Librarians need our support now more than ever | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. With an increase in book bans on LGBTQ issues and race coming from Republicans, with must stand with librarians in this critical fight. | The GOP is has banned books from schools that discuss gender, LGBTQ+ issues, and race. This fight won’t be easy. That’s why librarians must have Democrats with them to combat Republican bans on books that don’t fit their harmful agenda. Thanks for standing with librarians, Team Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . | | Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54803417/379693196/1583625711?refcode=20221119.5_RW_A31&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDUxOWViNC05YzY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfplKeQGy6Uy7R2TyPs5cLIRmAP2gSjum3hwXn67j5I=)_**

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

**_[Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $25 or more now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54803418/379693197/1583625711?refcode=20221119.5_RW_A31&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDUxOWViNC05YzY3LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfplKeQGy6Uy7R2TyPs5cLIRmAP2gSjum3hwXn67j5I=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking:= GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: David Kim
subject: Make Sure Your Vote Is Counted!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID KIM FOR CONGRESS
body:
CA-34 voters, you can check to see if your ballot was counted, here: | | | CA-34 voters, you can check to see if your ballot was counted, here: [http://california.ballottrax.net/voter/](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Esi6nwzs8Exib0g1JWeL80e2NnbF2QK_sfkmr0VGqoPwJFhn48W-Yf0VMgcQVNXqnQoyrGLkbJQQzlRwIaJDXUAFO1AIIxE_HX-X3g9Vri7Ju90K5-HkH3DIEsDYKs_FSybMB3bjvqXUgbz_B25SKlf8IbwUrm-6bQTrhSnm6Zy67KgagD5QiyRWKub9TFV7LaLU2SebtMLib2jMYfEze5Su7OZNiokrWRX_R_1d0JNBj-_CSyspPYF8sppOiSrQL0fyEg-LIi8Bv0i8GxmWp4TGBqD4zFb-Oi1m5p2vkhM/3r9/DLPCZJypQu2kkOY9z4nduQ/h0/fjHiTU1y27APgaERjnIZmoSlRway3uCumOuegm5e1zU) If you don’t see your ballot, please call the LA County Registrar Recorder’s Office at 800-815-2666 today to ask if your ballot needs be corrected through a process called “ballot curing”. The law requires election officials to notify voters and allow voters to correct signature or other errors through the ballot curing process.
Thank You!
**
** Votantes de CA-34, pueden verificar si su boleta fue contada aquí: california.ballottrax.net/voter/ Si no ve su boleta, llame a la Oficina del Registro del votantes del Condado de Los Angeles (800-815-2666) @LACountyRRCC y pregunte si su boleta necesita corregirse, tal vez debido a una discrepancia en su firma. ¡Muchas Gracias!
**
** CA-34지구 유권자 여러분, 여러분의 소중한 한표가 확실히 접수되었는지 아래 링크에서 확인하세요. california.ballottrax.net/voter/ 만약 위의 링크에서 Ballot Accepted라고 나오지 않는다면 엘에이 카운티 유권자 등록 사무소(800-815-2666)에 전화해서, 서명 불일치같은 사소한 이유로 무효표 처리된 것이 아닌지 꼭 확인하셔야 합니다. **
** CA-34 选民,您可以在此处查看您的选票是否被计入:[http://california.ballottrax.net/voter/](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Esi6nwzs8Exib0g1JWeL80e2NnbF2QK_sfkmr0VGqoPwJFhn48W-Yf0VMgcQVNXqbqwH3mGMqdrUJ4uIe7C0zzVdehT6jyLpcFsxp4areLs6LNz-P5rs6m7sdzoKs5A_pJw7Tu0mESD5g7DvErGgJmrxb2gNM-y5AgkG1k4rTMpPPslTB7-ByW58_tLLOunLjq0FpVsk9qawbba-VJxvDs7zlox01kXICJQ4H0yTOXSMLC97pwBnEo6LeW1Xb90nd_DT09sGCYri0fqgSSCYLwk7KN9lOFP22nXzF61-QdM/3r9/DLPCZJypQu2kkOY9z4nduQ/h1/bCrD1sd4_d51evTsJkveZWB87Y0rEkmg_3f2j5ZIEJI) 如果您没有看到您的选票,请致电 LA County Registrar Recorder's Office (800-815-2666) @LACountyRRCC 并询问您的选票是否需要固化,可能是由于签名不符. 감사합니다!
**
** Ca- 34 botante, maari ninyong i-sauri para malaman kung ang inyong balota ay napabilang, dito: california.ballottrax.net/voter Kung ang inyong balota ay di napabilang, itagwag sa LA County Registrars office (800-8152666)@LACounyRRCC at ipagpatanong kung ang inyong balota ay kakailanganing tamain dah sa mga pagkakaiba tulad ng lagda. Salamat!
**
** CA-34の有権者の皆さん、あなたの票の集計状況はここでチェックできます。 california.ballottrax.net/voter/ もしあなたの票が集計されていない場合は、LA County Registrar Recorder’s Office @LACountyRRCCに電話で問い合わせを (800-815-2666) 。署名の記入漏れか間違いかもしれません。 谢谢! ありがとうございました!
